CNN: Inside Trump’s gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws| | | On her first day as attorney general, Pam Bondi penned a memo requiring DOJ lawyers to “ _zealously_ ” advocate for administration positions or face disciplinary action and potential firing. **It's clear we can no longer depend on the office that was created to defend our rights to actually defend them anymore.** **[That's why we need your help, folks: RUSH $25 or more right now to help us protect your right to vote and so much more>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110955071/555754049/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=o1KqBF4PaHXOblrY2EAKhyoIZHfCUW5pJN/nPqkSVjGOPHMGG9bJ/G6kwLVHtfUiW06Dnu2ATx9g76EsLM0Hhk5SoOgio5lUXWgU1iNXnnU=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkMjhlZjQ4LWZjNTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4rpiGLhwzh1j93-ODQRfitKmvfAuNfa2xiZSrmFEgbk=&emci=db11fe85-5058-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5d28ef48-fc59-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and **turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them.** Under his watch, the DOJ and it's Civil Rights Division -- _once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department_ \-- has **abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote.** Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. **We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote** under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. **[In the face of escalating attacks on our right to vote, increasing amounts of voter disinformation, and voter intimidation tactics on the rise – will you stand with us and chip in $25 today to help us defend voting rights?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110955074/555754052/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=o1KqBF4PaHXOblrY2EAKhyoIZHfCUW5pJN/nPqkSVjGOPHMGG9bJ/G6kwLVHtfUiW06Dnu2ATx9g76EsLM0Hhk5SoOgio5lUXWgU1iNXnnU=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkMjhlZjQ4LWZjNTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4rpiGLhwzh1j93-ODQRfitKmvfAuNfa2xiZSrmFEgbk=&emci=db11fe85-5058-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=5d28ef48-fc59-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

| | **We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump** , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. CNN has reported that: "_During President Donald Trump’s first term, DOJ officials forced voting section attorneys to abandon the more high-profile work that had often been opposed by conservatives. But the gutting of the section during Trump’s second administration goes far beyond that, according to former department attorneys and outside voter advocates_." **We know our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration.** In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government as they try and consolidate their control forever. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: CNN: Inside Trump’s gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws| | | On her first day as attorney general, Pam Bondi penned a memo requiring DOJ lawyers to “ zealously ” advocate for administration positions or face disciplinary action and potential firing. It's clear we can no longer depend on the office that was created to defend our rights to actually defend them anymore. | | | Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them. Under his watch, the DOJ and it's Civil Rights Division -- once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department \-- has abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote. Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. CNN has reported that: "During President Donald Trump’s first term, DOJ officials forced voting section attorneys to abandon the more high-profile work that had often been opposed by conservatives. But the gutting of the section during Trump’s second administration goes far beyond that, according to former department attorneys and outside voter advocates." We know our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government as they try and consolidate their control forever. That's why we need to stand up and defend things from the outside. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. subject: New York Times: What is 'Dark Woke'? Democrats, led by Jasmine Crockett, are trying out a new attitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
For the first time in a long time, Democrats are fighting back.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90132?refcode=em20250705-9077&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9077%2E614464%2EChFoBR)
As liberals try to get their groove back, some party insiders say Democratic politicians have been encouraged to embrace a new form of combative rhetoric aimed at winning back voters who have responded to President Trump’s no-holds-barred version of politics.
It’s an attempt to step outside the bounds of the political correctness that Republicans have accused Democrats of establishing. And it requires being crass but discerning, rude but only to a point.
**Online, it has a name: “Dark woke” — enter Jasmine Crockett:**

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: New York is going to BURN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country. Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3gp20egiuq79a04hubf8djrev9qem2mfno58f9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)
Friend,

We need to have an honest conversation about who we allow into our country.

**Let me introduce you to Zohran Mamdani: The socialist candidate for mayor of New York City.**
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmatgq0qdoiqdncgrpp1ghk303e62hlpmv6ph9a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)
It took this guy approximately ZERO days to confirm our worst suspicions.

Mamdani, a self-declared socialist, wants to “globalize the intifada” and import values into the West that will destabilize our civilization.

_Everything about him runs counter to America First_.

**The fact that he could win in arguably America's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House, the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on.**

Turning Point PAC is working harder than ever to [BUILD THE RED WALL](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk66lkkjfbn1gedh8ps24trh8h99smuduh7unob0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs).

We must ensure that radical socialists like Mamdani do NOT gain power in cities, counties, and states across the country.

Help us [put America First](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt8ahh586sd1ntk932g7k8rh87j6tcougsmsq0tg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs) and [stop the spread of socialism in America](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh22tohrf0d7h1rfie1s5vi4iv6cjahklt78put8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs) by donating today.
[Build the Red Wall](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9a3v9vbht6k1u4scbbjlgp8ppsjq60cnii5cbao_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)
**Friend, the future of Trump’s agenda will be decided on the streets of Los Angeles, Chicago, and New York.**

While I frequently run into those who think that conservatives should just throw up their hands and leave New York to its fate, it's a mistake.

New York symbolizes America to the world.

It’s the nerve center for the entire global economy. It has America's most famous sports teams, museums, buildings, and more. It is the global capital of finance, media, and the arts.

America simply giving up on New York is like the British Empire giving up on London or the Roman Empire giving up on Rome.

**And of course, that's exactly why Marxists like Mamdani want to conquer it.**

If we won't fight for one of our nation's crown jewels, then we deserve to lose it.

Turning Point PAC is taking back critical swing states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire from radical socialists like Mamdani.

But we can’t do it without you, Friend.

**Please donate today to make America First the law of the land in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**
[Donate $10](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj6oenncon7fqdv16gatthboc6kd4r4b9ffl3mgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmnv4ephhhn50l2vkt09p9rkp32k4pof7htf8ud0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2kbefeif7t9nvu3r9c6fktl38ube8bdf3d5lodg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zs3ffae0oc3ih0ip0caj1v6lr0t80pecan4r6ir8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv3842c5quq5dedcj6gfoir44irrbhbjhb548gn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)

name: Kimberly Begg
subject: You should be peaceful – not defenseless
body:
What happened next is every woman’s worst nightmare.

| | |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Amanda Collins Johnson did everything right that night – but the results were terribly wrong. She parked in a well-lit garage, walked with a group of classmates, and followed campus policy, leaving her legally owned firearm at home.
---
| | But none of that stopped a man who was hiding behind her car, waiting with a gun in a gun-free zone. _What happened next is every woman’s worst nightmare._**At our 2024 College Women’s Summit in Nashville, Amanda shared her harrowing story of surviving an assault on her college campus – a place where women should feel safe.**
---
| [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbm7dvi0cbh78nru82fcpu3cphfgt5i6gtop17g0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
---
| | But because it was a gun-free zone, she was prohibited from carrying her legally permitted firearm, leaving her without the means to defend herself when it mattered most.Now, Amanda speaks out – so other women aren’t left defenseless like she was.She’s urging women to use their voices to fight for their Second Amendment rights and for policies that recognize every woman’s right to defend herself and her family. As Amanda puts it, women are too often first in line when facing danger.That’s why they must be prepared to defend themselves and the people they love.And at the **Luce Center** , we equip young women with the courage and skills they need to stand up for their Second Amendment rights. Through our _Day at the Range_ program, young women receive life-saving professional firearms training at ranges across the country. This program teaches essential self-defense skills while encouraging women to advocate for the rights that protect their freedom.But our _Day at the Range_ program wouldn’t be possible without the generous support of freedom-loving Americans like you. [**Will you help us equip the next generation of American women with the confidence and skills necessary to defend themselves and their rights by making a tax-deductible gift today?**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgrij2jqujnrqpo49otdjs2otmiaibqrqll2kijg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs) And here’s what your gift can do:
---
* Gifts of $100 provide the **essential training resources **needed for a single event!
* Gifts of $250 will **sponsor one young woman** to receive expert instruction and hands-on experience at the range!
* Gifts of $500 cover **ammunition****and gear** for a single event!
* Gifts of $2,500 underwrites **a complete Day at the Range** for a group of 10-12 young women!

---
But every gift, no matter how big or small, can mean the difference between a young woman being **peaceful versus defenseless**. Amanda’s story is a powerful reminder that every woman deserves both the right – and the ability – to protect herself. That right must never be taken for granted.Thank you for standing with the young women of America and our Second Amendment Right.In Friendship and Freedom,
---
**Kimberly Begg****President, Luce Center**
---
| | P.S. We can only share the stories of courageous women like Amanda because of generous supporters like you. If you believe in giving women the ability to protect themselves and their families, [**please consider making a tax-deductible donation today.**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkjtvvs2lc6f88j565qg0tf59bl4ubs21np67o90_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs) Thank you for your support!
---

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Historic Supreme Court Win! Fund the Fight to Defund Planned Parenthood Nationwide
body:
Great news as champions for life today!

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvolooi089ssl6ap43c6jd90pncesr9avq0s4l18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs)

##
Dear Champion of Life,

Great news as champions for life today! The U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling leaves states FREE to defund Planned Parenthood!

The decision in _Medina v. Planned Parenthood_ reinstates a South Carolina order that deemed abortion giants like Planned Parenthood unqualified for taxpayer funds via Medicaid.

This is a huge decision that could protect countless unborn lives, as well as women and young people across the country--especially if other states follow South Carolina's courageous lead.

Planned Parenthood has taken the lives of millions of unborn children over the years. It has also left so many women and children scarred--physically and emotionally--as a result of its pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda.

No American should be forced to fund businesses that profit from harming and taking innocent lives. Thankfully, the Supreme Court's ruling today means that funding can finally end.

And now we have an opportunity to call on other states to take a stand against Big Abortion.

Now, there is no excuse. Thanks to ADF's win for South Carolina, the Supreme Court has allowed **states to defund Planned Parenthood.**

[Will you help us take the next step for a pro-life America?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1hmhjlpul9jgsduqid1ifovio1gr73bog5e0ioo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs) Here at Alliance Defending Freedom, we're ready to work alongside the next states who are brave enough to say NO to Planned Parenthood. **But to do that we need your help, today.** [**Your gift of any amount will help save lives**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztr00t130r5pjh6rp541o4qqh89gocdjblvna8kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o32chh2bs) as we stand together to defund Planned Parenthood state by state.

In Christ,

**Julia Payne Koon**
Legal Counsel ****

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Dave McCormick
subject: A reminder of the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Here’s why

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpg3hns78a2prf8vatiabc1je0f2hdhncnh5jv4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)

Friend,

This weekend, millions of Americans are gathering to celebrate our independence, not just with fireworks and flags, **but with gratitude for the freedoms we hold dear.**

As someone who's worn the uniform, led troops in combat, and dedicated my life to public service, this time of year means a lot to me. **It 's a reminder of the promise of America and of our responsibility to protect it.**

**[Will you support my fight to protect the promise of America by chipping in a donation today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb8ev0besuq8qump97f6gg5dfvqnlrsntpr808mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs) **Anything you can give makes an important difference.
[CHIP IN](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqhovt39ki64hht5sp1jphqus2fflg3a5d7g5uu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
---

The promise America has to offer shaped my life.

I'm a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, a graduate of West Point, and a former Army officer who served in the 82nd Airborne Division. I've led soldiers overseas, led businesses here at home, and now, I'm honored to serve in the United States Senate.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zle5fmslqmb0441i9bp10ukfs65ggeplith5bpfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)

What guided me through it all were the same values that built this country: courage, service, faith, and a deep love for the freedoms we celebrate this weekend.

Those values are under attack by the career politicians in Washington. But I didn't run for Senate to play it safe. I ran to be part of a new generation of leaders who are ready to shake up the status quo, stand up for working families, and make government work for the people again.

Everywhere I go in Pennsylvania, I meet people who still believe in this country. People who work hard, give back, and want a better future for their kids. They're why I ran. They're why I serve.

And if you believe in the promise of America, [I'd be honored to have your support.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl2abnb29fo4ku05f5qruuhicfvhq55m46ntkkd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
[CHIP IN $25](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgcvspt6t1c2ds64sllq2kafrk3pv6fu69bk0t4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
---
[CHIP IN $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm84490osib04frfe2ohnva4nuksmovb5me88r30_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
---
[CHIP IN $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9cucjidg56vpts8duegmgffo5dda30cp4kf8cvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
---
[CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2r7sjb7hrru2eko482g9lhr7im30ojdca3vc20g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
---

The fight for our country's future isn't easy, but it's worth it.

Thanks for believing in what America can still be.

Sincerely,
Senator Dave McCormick
[CHIP IN](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2cqiscb3p0ro0gjmqh2qpavo5jvascag638s29o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
---

* * *

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztaj7dka985nldekg1m2a4s0k350m15mtin8m2to_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
_ _
I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, **and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.**

I've seen firsthand what great leadership looks like. I've seen that even on our worst days, you have to put the needs of others first.

That's why I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day.

Whether it's securing the border, reducing crime in our cities, ending the fentanyl epidemic, or bringing down the cost of living-**I 'm committed to delivering concrete solutions to the biggest issues we face.**

But in order to get the job done, it's going to take all hands on deck. I need every freedom-loving American to help me shake up Washington. I promise I won't let you down.

_Senator Dave McCormick_
[DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zebacb5a32ttnndg3br20dj0p5b64hlohn9gdjd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6o36cph2bs)
---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0vbi0btliudbavc454qdlh514oe5mop6meiihi8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6p76clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zob9h3glumhfg62sh9sfhijulnkh2l8fccuk1n00_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6p76clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z257jg62vr0kdvd8t3netg3fjmdlai51r5seutk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6p76clh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z30vs099iuo5t92rr7jl30tvkn8mkm95f6pe0lng_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6p76clh2bs)**

name: Kimberly Begg
subject: You should be peaceful – not defenseless
body:
What happened next is every woman’s worst nightmare.

| | |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Amanda Collins Johnson did everything right that night – but the results were terribly wrong. She parked in a well-lit garage, walked with a group of classmates, and followed campus policy, leaving her legally owned firearm at home.
---
| | But none of that stopped a man who was hiding behind her car, waiting with a gun in a gun-free zone. _What happened next is every woman’s worst nightmare._**At our 2024 College Women’s Summit in Nashville, Amanda shared her harrowing story of surviving an assault on her college campus – a place where women should feel safe.**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z907ts5isil77ov8r346nbqfrhr5f2pc1cnohmrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6p76clh2bs)
---
| | But because it was a gun-free zone, she was prohibited from carrying her legally permitted firearm, leaving her without the means to defend herself when it mattered most.Now, Amanda speaks out – so other women aren’t left defenseless like she was.She’s urging women to use their voices to fight for their Second Amendment rights and for policies that recognize every woman’s right to defend herself and her family. As Amanda puts it, women are too often first in line when facing danger.That’s why they must be prepared to defend themselves and the people they love.And at the **Luce Center** , we equip young women with the courage and skills they need to stand up for their Second Amendment rights. Through our _Day at the Range_ program, young women receive life-saving professional firearms training at ranges across the country. This program teaches essential self-defense skills while encouraging women to advocate for the rights that protect their freedom.But our _Day at the Range_ program wouldn’t be possible without the generous support of freedom-loving Americans like you. [**Will you help us equip the next generation of American women with the confidence and skills necessary to defend themselves and their rights by making a tax-deductible gift today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1l9pcnam0i34qbkd8d4lgvc1t6ulo8sa9f9j37g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6p76clh2bs) And here’s what your gift can do:
---
* Gifts of $100 provide the **essential training resources **needed for a single event!
* Gifts of $250 will **sponsor one young woman** to receive expert instruction and hands-on experience at the range!
* Gifts of $500 cover **ammunition****and gear** for a single event!
* Gifts of $2,500 underwrites **a complete Day at the Range** for a group of 10-12 young women!

---
But every gift, no matter how big or small, can mean the difference between a young woman being **peaceful versus defenseless**. Amanda’s story is a powerful reminder that every woman deserves both the right – and the ability – to protect herself. That right must never be taken for granted.Thank you for standing with the young women of America and our Second Amendment Right.In Friendship and Freedom,
---
**Kimberly Begg****President, Luce Center**
---
| | P.S. We can only share the stories of courageous women like Amanda because of generous supporters like you. If you believe in giving women the ability to protect themselves and their families, [**please consider making a tax-deductible donation today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhfm9lc16sdq2gohg3pf4tc8dlum5lkf9eg3ri40_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6p76clh2bs) Thank you for your support!
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zihrd7ektq2eiah9nqiqe372tj5lb5faimv77fu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctie6p76clh2bs)
---
Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women, 112 Elden St., Suite P, Herndon, VA

clean_body: What happened next is every woman’s worst nightmare. | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Amanda Collins Johnson did everything right that night – but the results were terribly wrong. She parked in a well-lit garage, walked with a group of classmates, and followed campus policy, leaving her legally owned firearm at home. | | But none of that stopped a man who was hiding behind her car, waiting with a gun in a gun-free zone. What happened next is every woman’s worst nightmare.At our 2024 College Women’s Summit in Nashville, Amanda shared her harrowing story of surviving an assault on her college campus – a place where women should feel safe. | | | But because it was a gun-free zone, she was prohibited from carrying her legally permitted firearm, leaving her without the means to defend herself when it mattered most.Now, Amanda speaks out – so other women aren’t left defenseless like she was.She’s urging women to use their voices to fight for their Second Amendment rights and for policies that recognize every woman’s right to defend herself and her family. As Amanda puts it, women are too often first in line when facing danger.That’s why they must be prepared to defend themselves and the people they love.And at the Luce Center , we equip young women with the courage and skills they need to stand up for their Second Amendment rights. Through our Day at the Range program, young women receive life-saving professional firearms training at ranges across the country. This program teaches essential self-defense skills while encouraging women to advocate for the rights that protect their freedom.But our Day at the Range program wouldn’t be possible without the generous support of freedom-loving Americans like you. And here’s what your gift can do: Gifts of $100 provide the essential training resources needed for a single event! Gifts of $250 will sponsor one young woman to receive expert instruction and hands-on experience at the range! Gifts of $500 cover ammunition**and gear for a single event! Gifts of $2,500 underwrites a complete Day at the Range for a group of 10-12 young women! But every gift, no matter how big or small, can mean the difference between a young woman being peaceful versus defenseless. Amanda’s story is a powerful reminder that every woman deserves both the right – and the ability – to protect herself. That right must never be taken for granted.Thank you for standing with the young women of America and our Second Amendment Right.In Friendship and Freedom, Kimberly Begg**President, Luce Center | | P.S. We can only share the stories of courageous women like Amanda because of generous supporters like you. If you believe in giving women the ability to protect themselves and their families, Thank you for your support! Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women, 112 Elden St., Suite P, Herndon, VA Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

Far too often, the bravery and vision of our Founding Fathers is forgotten. They risked everything to create a country built on the principles of freedom, justice, and equality.
Today, we're facing a new challenge. The Radical Left is working tirelessly to undermine our values and destroy the very fabric of our society. But we won't let them succeed.
That's why we're inviting you to join the 1776 Club, a group of America First Patriots dedicated to defending our nation's founding principles and promoting the values that have made America great. Your membership is pending and we would be HONORED to have you join our ranks!
As a member, you'd join a community that's committed to defending our Constitutional rights and freedoms, preserving our nation's history, and promoting the values that have always made America strong.
We need you standing alongside us and other like-minded Americans who share your passion for our country and its founding principles.

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjqv5kp35m0cutgr5uof4pvt0rb978gfqtd1asfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctieeo72clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsef5hlpcf0mls96krj0jp9496s0krrhcmbv6dtg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctieeo72clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zonodbrsibn543skolp35lnvbpi421to381lb0bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctieeo72clh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdj078933g0h6qlr381obfqk0ghl7gv2jmd87tj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctieeo72clh2bs)**

# **[Unlike Some Adults, These Teen Debaters Aren't Afraid of 'The Conversation'](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A few weeks ago, Incubate Debate held its national championships in Sarasota, Florida, for middle and high school students. After another year living in the... Read More
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._G6OpUOM3i5CBrwTUhaP_Q)
# **[The AI takeover isn't coming — it's already here](http://trk.libertyledger._G6OpUOM3i5CBrwTUhaP_Q)**
---
If you rewatch "The Jetsons," it's clear that robots were initially designed to help humanity. The show features a robot named "Rosie," who serves as the family’s maid, dusting in hard-to-reach places and vacuuming under the rug. For a long time, gadgets like Roombas seemed harmlessly novel, alleviating the burden of small, unwanted jobs. But our relationship with robots as quirky helpers has changed significantly with the proliferation of technology and artificial intelligence.It's a cheat code for a faster, more efficient life — but a life that is safe, sanitized, and numb.The rise of AI, for example, has transformed machines from helpers of humanity into its surrogate thinkers.Educators are sounding the alarm.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._G6OpUOM3i5CBrwTUhaP_Q)

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Historic Supreme Court Win! Fund the Fight to Defund Planned Parenthood Nationwide
body:
Great news as champions for life today!

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zinik7o0v565m9jrrs2r8qkackdlefev2hjpsk40_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g60pb4cjh2bs)

##
Dear Champion of Life,

Great news as champions for life today! The U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling leaves states FREE to defund Planned Parenthood!

The decision in _Medina v. Planned Parenthood_ reinstates a South Carolina order that deemed abortion giants like Planned Parenthood unqualified for taxpayer funds via Medicaid.

This is a huge decision that could protect countless unborn lives, as well as women and young people across the country--especially if other states follow South Carolina's courageous lead.

Planned Parenthood has taken the lives of millions of unborn children over the years. It has also left so many women and children scarred--physically and emotionally--as a result of its pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda.

No American should be forced to fund businesses that profit from harming and taking innocent lives. Thankfully, the Supreme Court's ruling today means that funding can finally end.

And now we have an opportunity to call on other states to take a stand against Big Abortion.

Now, there is no excuse. Thanks to ADF's win for South Carolina, the Supreme Court has allowed **states to defund Planned Parenthood.**

[Will you help us take the next step for a pro-life America?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0p9vd292fi27of07lis41vit1ulumdufruh9lkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g60pb4cjh2bs) Here at Alliance Defending Freedom, we're ready to work alongside the next states who are brave enough to say NO to Planned Parenthood. **But to do that we need your help, today.** [**Your gift of any amount will help save lives**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9f841cea7k847utp0o00fn7nd463uiafugm5m00_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g60pb4cjh2bs) as we stand together to defund Planned Parenthood state by state.

In Christ,

**Julia Payne Koon**
Legal Counsel ****

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Newsom’s deranged 8-minute rant…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
This didn’t happen by accident, it was by design.

| | |
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z48jlgt2dvsl1hp09k355n68f45gf1mhcsqvgm30_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g68ob4clh2bs)
---
| | Friend, I was on the ground in Los Angeles—glass shattering overhead, people struck by debris, American flags burning, and police under attack. I felt a sense of menace and lawlessness. I couldn’t contain my frustration. **You don’t see these scenes in other states.** This didn’t happen by accident, it was by design. This is the result of fifteen years of one-party Democratic rule, creating an upside-down morality where those who do the wrong thing are rewarded while people who do the right thing are punished. Governor Newsom, Mayor Bass, and the local officials in Los Angeles have failed us. They let rioters run rampant while law-abiding Californians suffer. But there is hope. Californians want violent criminals removed from their communities, and they don’t want a government that allows riots. If we are ever going to win back California, it’s now while this is fresh in everyone’s minds. I’m running for governor to restore law and order, back our police, and make California golden again. But I can’t do it alone. I’m all in. Are you? **Here is how _you_ can help right now:**
---
[ **DONATE TO END DEMOCRAT RULE** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf1n31qa66ss50gnshjmi6smpotqikr40ldk0jp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g68ob4clh2bs)
---
[ **READ MY PLAN TO RESTORE SAFETY** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1jk3ufbkveja4it3c9v5o7poidluq1i51evfn68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g68ob4clh2bs)
---
California and our country deserve better leadership. Together, we can stop the chaos, expose the forces behind it, and hold Newsom and the democrats accountable.
---
**Steve Hilton** Republican Candidate for Governor of California
---
**P.S.** Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is right around the corner. We need to put out a strong report to show the radical Democrats how powerful our movement to Make California Golden Again is. **[Click here to donate $50, $26, or $15](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zoum5fs34i933l8sinotf8udmdja19nnm06ncp28_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g68ob4clh2bs). **Even a small donation of $5 adds up if everyone chips in.
---

name: Dave McCormick
subject: A reminder of the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Here’s why

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztpmu2o0dqcmhao7u35t51dttbl20sv5uspnqe2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)

Friend,

This weekend, millions of Americans are gathering to celebrate our independence, not just with fireworks and flags, **but with gratitude for the freedoms we hold dear.**

As someone who's worn the uniform, led troops in combat, and dedicated my life to public service, this time of year means a lot to me. **It 's a reminder of the promise of America and of our responsibility to protect it.**

**[Will you support my fight to protect the promise of America by chipping in a donation today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1f9u8mv40ipus04e7q3sldqki26evoirm4ads70_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs) **Anything you can give makes an important difference.
[CHIP IN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlk73osjjgo9bf40uc74pa6d9gr6gcvl254d6nno_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
---

The promise America has to offer shaped my life.

I'm a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, a graduate of West Point, and a former Army officer who served in the 82nd Airborne Division. I've led soldiers overseas, led businesses here at home, and now, I'm honored to serve in the United States Senate.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbiaq6s2bv98e34t5inneddd7vivqo8kji40s728_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)

What guided me through it all were the same values that built this country: courage, service, faith, and a deep love for the freedoms we celebrate this weekend.

Those values are under attack by the career politicians in Washington. But I didn't run for Senate to play it safe. I ran to be part of a new generation of leaders who are ready to shake up the status quo, stand up for working families, and make government work for the people again.

Everywhere I go in Pennsylvania, I meet people who still believe in this country. People who work hard, give back, and want a better future for their kids. They're why I ran. They're why I serve.

And if you believe in the promise of America, [I'd be honored to have your support.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z265m7mhtr9n3s88b6u5uhmvqqojhnjhsg84l9t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
[CHIP IN $25](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7dj7nn7odc60sahbvipihsra4mq33uflev8bbn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
---
[CHIP IN $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6g3ee8qd7car1aom46padm5b7odme42r2i06i30_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
---
[CHIP IN $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuu7589sl9gblqgglafhhpa91tmbdd0l8rh2gjkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
---
[CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6r0ul7g17a08tc18cr1duefl8ce8paggm8qgpp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
---

The fight for our country's future isn't easy, but it's worth it.

Thanks for believing in what America can still be.

Sincerely,
Senator Dave McCormick
[CHIP IN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkkj8opn2qco7k6dm96um0ssormh7ecamhahk5p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
---

* * *

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za8amvt5puq3bosau10gkbkk6lfh3um40sgbese0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
_ _
I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, **and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.**

I've seen firsthand what great leadership looks like. I've seen that even on our worst days, you have to put the needs of others first.

That's why I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day.

Whether it's securing the border, reducing crime in our cities, ending the fentanyl epidemic, or bringing down the cost of living-**I 'm committed to delivering concrete solutions to the biggest issues we face.**

But in order to get the job done, it's going to take all hands on deck. I need every freedom-loving American to help me shake up Washington. I promise I won't let you down.

_Senator Dave McCormick_
[DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn4l0nsqo60rm23a69blqfou98h4nr5da4tfk3ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c3g62p34c1h2bs)
---
Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick.

subject: Discover how the Allied powers won World War II
body:
This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/h28ePeiLVsE9tACke1jocQ~~/AARclBA~/VaXYxj_PAYlUtNmOvZofyjFbQJmFkwUq44_bqb1Yf60_MVqiUIcEXGLjhxwmTezh2GhkOjdybK0n8IUNQDmwqs0padTI-U___pumiMSpI7VLqIb211Osm0aydxfUgx2nG2BOdVGEJ7MsilMMUXtpFk3NP-E1Tjrt_ToZjljOwG-RYRG9LOFr5TmMCGAyhr60h_qk0aMjBxDOvQNp0QC6N3J6sOemWtI1u6Yf2qioFErQItMkkXxzDRG07icc5Ayua1B2ebFFaEvMOQ1SKQafLHjDa7N1Ykz1g-iSAY9wmaoIah2OOttWbYwuVZNQmxATCmQYhvcGaRQ_I9rlrsi95A~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/h28ePeiLVsE9tACke1jocQ~~/AARclBA~/VaXYxj_PAYlUtNmOvZofyjFbQJmFkwUq44_bqb1Yf60_MVqiUIcEXGLjhxwmTezh2GhkOjdybK0n8IUNQDmwqs0padTI-U___pumiMSpI7VLqIb211Osm0aydxfUgx2nG2BOdVGEJ7MsilMMUXtpFk3NP-E1Tjrt_ToZjljOwG-RYRG9LOFr5TmMCGAyhr60h_qk0aMjBxDOvQNp0QC6N3J6sOemWtI1u6Yf2qioFErQItMkkXxzDRG07icc5Ayua1B2ebFFaEvMOQ1SKQafLHjDa7N1Ykz1g-iSAY9wmaoIah2OOttWbYwuVZNQmxATCmQYhvcGaRQ_I9rlrsi95A~~) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/h28ePeiLVsE9tACke1jocQ~~/AARclBA~/VaXYxj_PAYlUtNmOvZofyjFbQJmFkwUq44_bqb1Yf60_MVqiUIcEXGLjhxwmTezh2GhkOjdybK0n8IUNQDmwqs0padTI-U___pumiMSpI7VLqIb211Osm0aydxfUgx2nG2BOdVGEJ7MsilMMUXtpFk3NP-E1Tjrt_ToZjljOwG-RYRG9LOFr5TmMCGAyhr60h_qk0aMjBxDOvQNp0QC6N3J6sOemWtI1u6Yf2qioFErQItMkkXxzDRG07icc5Ayua1B2ebFFaEvMOQ1SKQafLHjDa7N1Ykz1g-iSAY9wmaoIah2OOttWbYwuVZNQmxATCmQYhvcGaRQ_I9rlrsi95A~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/h28ePeiLVsE9tACke1jocQ~~/AARclBA~/VaXYxj_PAYlUtNmOvZofyjFbQJmFkwUq44_bqb1Yf60_MVqiUIcEXGLjhxwmTezh2GhkOjdybK0n8IUNQDmwqs0padTI-U___pumiMSpI7VLqIb211Osm0aydxfUgx2nG2BOdVGEJ7MsilMMUXtpFk3NP-E1Tjrt_ToZjljOwG-RYRG9LOFr5TmMCGAyhr60h_qk0aMjBxDOvQNp0QC6N3J6sOemWtI1u6Yf2qioFErQItMkkXxzDRG07icc5Ayua1B2ebFFaEvMOQ1SKQafLHjDa7N1Ykz1g-iSAY9wmaoIah2OOttWbYwuVZNQmxATCmQYhvcGaRQ_I9rlrsi95A~~)**

body:
The death toll from the July 4 flash floods in Kerr County, Texas, has risen to 27, including 14 children, with 27 girls from Camp Mystic still unaccounted for, officials confirmed Saturday. [Photos from the camp are available here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGupCAQRb8Gd3QQEHTBYjbu3mxnaWqkUDoIBsrX038_sX_hbSqV3OTk3vPna_mCmGLefsOBjkJZMr5aQiKsC-E_aCscJ9a2leTX6wwxQ4JFCjlwYbkwi4eY3ovuvAuIElWHrrdDbycjzdTtrtdDL_5akGMQevQw6SAUCD_2PWBQqovupgkrTC-EluPDGjV4LUZlRqMGNTEt0Ecq9fEsMdOOIb3LN9bHWo4uuZ3obEz9YnJmcs7vszS6IybnG8zkLOx97u9q_N7H5EyvwrdYU-MVMyJvBzwb1QQcsudPyBH5fmXiQPzjga97jY0iZH4r4aFc2XOP4Jmcu-r8-YopxWYs02I7IKZPP_qR1G8n_wcAAP__LnGKdw).

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUb2OnjAQfBrTgYwNNhQuIp3oLm1Ka7EX8Mk_yDYfubePiL4mddrdmdH8_PrUn-C8i_tPCKjqlnTEu3isFbOu-BuKgXBiLnvy1lzn5iJ40IyysaWypUJbcP5bD41VGyJD3qDq5djLWTAxN4eSs6TjbMCi3HoYDAcjp3Hm8yYnufa8cepRo5KKntKBTZ0UfLQDnbiYBB_5TAaK1tWUu6_kYj1w89_phbkzKTReHbWehfAfhC2ELfd9d194u3K8kjPYpbwTttgUoSJhC5wngidsWT2W0rqSAX17YG6PdOU2IlrCl6sGXdKVDRL-AbYQJp5TQOuuQPjH2wBhouAeMFZtkn2w97oWNoLtpzflaQ_cHv_5NVnZ83beuyIkGegewPm_aep_TfBS7E8AAAD__3mTnCc) | |
# Sunday, July 6, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1785, the United States Congress officially [adopted the dollar](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1yqzAUQOHVQAcj9E-h4jXu_NqUjIyuQJkrxEg3Jt59xtlCqtN9xfm4L3efMB3bf5_BUSzLAVdDIIK6EHz7tvp8Qm1bwbB-nTEdHv3CGVcDMwPTS_AJX4vsg4sAHEQPbjJqMrPmeu53x-dJWyGiipOSAJLZh1klsxCNAjvJPrm3xgzTE2OS29FooYJkVmirhRJzJxmERKWOnyUdtEPEV3lCHdeSe3Q70dk68a_jt47frusaffC55UT7WOrW8dsDyzu0w-Axp22n1xAKoq99deG8EmJq2nSSbdkn_HXpTzOejv8EAAD__7sgcqo) as the nation's currency, establishing a decimal-based system that was groundbreaking for its time and set a global precedent. The [U.S. takes on Mexico tonight ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFywyAURE-DOjRfIEAuKNKoc9qUmm_4kskg0AhkxbfP2DlC-p3dfe_rOl0xxJCWT1zJ1jlPic4SqVbap0o_WByuG-1lydG7Y5tDwoiTAKE4GA568hjic-obb2ciQbIh2xnVmYsW-tLc7ey96qAfbv5GvkPZg1O6u4HRKEF3qgn21QYGdAfQi6E1WirfwyD1oKWSF9YD-VDz3n7nkOqd5vjMD9pbl9cm2nutW2Hyg4mRifE8z_YoJTv3F2BiLDXvgQoT42uIiREME-NR1lS5D7RkHo-EfDmw0ooROfoHJkeFu5wcOpz5i567Y-Nv_ma3fjtDjKFow3pYVgzx_ab-S-HDit8AAAD__9EihYA)as we report below in one of soccer’s fiercest rivalries—are you watching? Hit reply and let us know if you’re tuning in or if you’re one of the many Americans still soccer-skeptical. As our team spends the holiday with their families, today’s edition is abbreviated. We’ll be back to the full lineup on Monday. We're sponsored today by [Jewish Voice](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUb2OnjAQfBrTgYwNNhQuIp3oLm1Ka7EX8Mk_yDYfubePiL4mddrdmdH8_PrUn-C8i_tPCKjqlnTEu3isFbOu-BuKgXBiLnvy1lzn5iJ40IyysaWypUJbcP5bD41VGyJD3qDq5djLWTAxN4eSs6TjbMCi3HoYDAcjp3Hm8yYnufa8cepRo5KKntKBTZ0UfLQDnbiYBB_5TAaK1tWUu6_kYj1w89_phbkzKTReHbWehfAfhC2ELfd9d194u3K8kjPYpbwTttgUoSJhC5wngidsWT2W0rqSAX17YG6PdOU2IlrCl6sGXdKVDRL-AbYQJp5TQOuuQPjH2wBhouAeMFZtkn2w97oWNoLtpzflaQ_cHv_5NVnZ83beuyIkGegewPm_aep_TfBS7E8AAAD__3mTnCc), the non-profit helping provide emergency aid to the Jewish people in war-torn Israel.
|

## Texas Flooding Toll Hits 42; 27 Campers Missing
The death toll from the July 4 flash floods in Kerr County, Texas, has risen to 43, including 15 children, with 27 girls from Camp Mystic still unaccounted for, officials said Saturday evening. [Photos from the camp are available here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGupCAQRb8Gd3QQEHTBYjbu3mxnaWqkUDoIBsrX038_sX_hbSqV3OTk3vPna_mCmGLefsOBjkJZMr5aQiKsC-E_aCscJ9a2leTX6wwxQ4JFCjlwYbkwi4eY3ovuvAuIElWHrrdDbycjzdTtrtdDL_5akGMQevQw6SAUCD_2PWBQqovupgkrTC-EluPDGjV4LUZlRqMGNTEt0Ecq9fEsMdOOIb3LN9bHWo4uuZ3obEz9YnJmcs7vszS6IybnG8zkLOx97u9q_N7H5EyvwrdYU-MVMyJvBzwb1QQcsudPyBH5fmXiQPzjga97jY0iZH4r4aFc2XOP4Jmcu-r8-YopxWYs02I7IKZPP_qR1G8n_wcAAP__LnGKdw). [The Guadalupe River surged 26 feet in under 45 minutes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_uozAQhJ8GOiL_XaBwcU26XHslMvYa9rRghJ3k8vYn8gq_cjTSaL7vz2N6eGLal99-Q1dTnnZ8F8Za8Zwq_vMl-O3AsyyZY3geiXbPflJC2U70nYApeuLPZNroEqJC3aKTvZX9CArGdnUJIswW-jTPXnuvBpQy6OiDAjnHEVpy15roBUghjBpuPWgbjRg0DKCtHhsjMFLN5-1vpr2umPiTX3jeQt5admutR2n0r0bdG3X3xwVwVVc4KwXGRt2_KF3inGPpNiqF9qVbibkL-bnX89NZYUyQMM52HJWc1WwSWK8sDEFbE0R7uni8iZkK9I0Ry-aJvxfqj7y9nPofAAD__1WTgCQ), overwhelming the historic Christian camp and sweeping away cabins and campers. Rescue crews have saved more than 850 people using helicopters, boats, and drones, but the search continues as rain persists across the Hill Country. Among the deceased is Camp Mystic director Dick Eastland. Despite early warnings from the National Weather Service and AccuWeather, local [officials said they were caught off guard](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu3CAQhp_G7lixmIu3oEjj7qRNaU1gbJMzCxbMHmffPiLKG6QZ_dI3-uby42P9gEQp79_hiZ63sma8GiEz1pXxN7QAzxNr2wvF8Dq3lIFgVVIZIZ2Qdo2Q6L3qMfoNUeE0or87c3cPq-xjPPxPLZ3V86zNA8LdzsbEgNYFZSROYMKYfLdJJ-1dSq3mm7OTiVrOk53tZKbHoCXGxKXefpWU-cCN3uUL6y2U50j-YD7bMH0b1DKo5bquWwQiaP2Q3jKopcfOEPjAOqilTxzUIl0vPUEIr39YNMwsLqg55b0JOBCiKJv4xFpFKK_Mb7FRKTHlXfABLD4TEUYBLAihsVBdO1YfzysRpWbdoOX-hER_V-b_-vOXV38CAAD___cxkS4) by the storm's intensity. Governor Greg Abbott has declared a disaster across 21 counties, mobilizing state and federal resources for ongoing rescue and recovery efforts.
## Trump Tariff Push Begins With Letters
President Trump says the [U.S. has begun sending letters to foreign governments](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OnDAYxJ_GdEbGBgOFi40ilGbTRFGUCnnxZ9aJ_yD7Yzne_sTdI1w10oxmNPr9uc937byL608dQKFNc4SjeECEPCO86bLosEEua_Jm2TfrovZ65ox3lPWUydlo58-5rYyyABxEBarpu6YfJZdj9VRMD2BbDaaTpuPGytGaYWzYYB6cW_GonLrWWM9kw1jLh7qXojMtG4QcpOjESFoGxmHK9b_kIj7B-jO9INdLCpVXT8StEHEjfCJ8Oo6jDiVeGeETRLoXwqeQIpyX6vwf8HIw72GjRZ-F7oViogV1RlogGhdXmnakqLOzln7CuDo609ut-fHXhd9ETGlxhojv3y54cJRfkLcqK7MdzntXZE9atgbt_MdN_BLbl-LvAQAA__9dSo84) detailing steep new tariffs, ranging from 10% to as high as 70%. Around 10 letters will go out each day, with more to follow, as Trump pushes for reciprocal tariffs to pressure trade partners into reaching new deals by a July 9 deadline. The new rates are scheduled to take effect August 1 unless agreements are reached. The administration hasn't named which nations are targeted, but Trump said this approach would streamline enforcement and boost demand for U.S.-made goods. The announcement [pushed global markets lower](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbHO1DAQhJ_G6fbk2IlzV6Q4hCKan4YCumgvXt8ZnNiyN7_J26MAb_CXuzMaab75_ja_oQ9-e37FlUZ2cd6olkDMlGem31gWXBPl8ozBLntyfsOAs5KqBzmANLNFH465a-zoiBTphsZ26NvhZpS5Na_RGdtb_bDOtkv7QNMug7t1yrSKpL0-VOPHM00O0rRSdup6GYzubSev2lyN7vVNdJKs55gvP6Pf-EUuHPGd8mWJaxPGF3MqQt-FmoSaaq2XtWynJtREG-xFqGmNGx1CTRwTFI7Lr_P5DPGB4f8NDkMAzvuaoOBRYIcCHKHQZoExe-fgH5YCLnuLB1TPL8jIVGBPp3eQQk2Y4X5vv_zY6yr0FBdvhf786SRMtXyjnJo82lR9CL6YQXTyuaIPf7vwhwZ4H9WfAAAA__8FIZxH)--Germany's DAX fell 0.6%, France's CAC 40 dropped 0.7%, and South Korea's KOSPI tumbled 2%.
## US, Mexico Set for Gold Cup Showdown
[Diego Luna has emerged as the breakout star](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupCAYhZ8GOwzzI6AFxTZ2s-2WhoFfZYNCAMfx7W-cV7jdSU5ycr7v33N6Gh_8vvw1G-o6x2nHswSsFfNU8WOKNVvCXJYYnD3S7HcTzAQMBGWKMjk548M1dY3TMyIgb1A_lHioQYIcmlXPvRtcrziTDBwfFHLsGAopOH-9sOeN1_caU0w-GOugb5XkwnWs57KXXPCBdAydrzG3_6Pf64pzuOIbc2vj1gS91poK4X8IjATG8zxbLGm_SwJjidZivkON-SIwTgRG7wiMnZBCShgIjEfZ9kqdxyXScOyG3rDUHomumCPFj_UVHU3BXHTDj7eRfj00Wbt0-hB8kYp0bNmMD99X9Vcq3xp-AgAA__8DsocH) of the U.S. men's national team, scoring twice in the semifinal win over Guatemala to send the Americans to the Gold Cup final. clean_body: The death toll from the July 4 flash floods in Kerr County, Texas, has risen to 27, including 14 children, with 27 girls from Camp Mystic still unaccounted for, officials confirmed Saturday. . | | | | | | Sunday, July 6, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1785, the United States Congress officially as the nation's currency, establishing a decimal-based system that was groundbreaking for its time and set a global precedent. The we report below in one of soccer’s fiercest rivalries—are you watching? Hit reply and let us know if you’re tuning in or if you’re one of the many Americans still soccer-skeptical. As our team spends the holiday with their families, today’s edition is abbreviated. We’ll be back to the full lineup on Monday. We're sponsored today by , the non-profit helping provide emergency aid to the Jewish people in war-torn Israel. | Texas Flooding Toll Hits 42; 27 Campers Missing The death toll from the July 4 flash floods in Kerr County, Texas, has risen to 43, including 15 children, with 27 girls from Camp Mystic still unaccounted for, officials said Saturday evening. . , overwhelming the historic Christian camp and sweeping away cabins and campers. Rescue crews have saved more than 850 people using helicopters, boats, and drones, but the search continues as rain persists across the Hill Country. Among the deceased is Camp Mystic director Dick Eastland. Despite early warnings from the National Weather Service and AccuWeather, local by the storm's intensity. Governor Greg Abbott has declared a disaster across 21 counties, mobilizing state and federal resources for ongoing rescue and recovery efforts. Trump Tariff Push Begins With Letters President Trump says the detailing steep new tariffs, ranging from 10% to as high as 70%. Around 10 letters will go out each day, with more to follow, as Trump pushes for reciprocal tariffs to pressure trade partners into reaching new deals by a July 9 deadline. The new rates are scheduled to take effect August 1 unless agreements are reached. The administration hasn't named which nations are targeted, but Trump said this approach would streamline enforcement and boost demand for U.S.-made goods. The announcement DAX fell 0.6%, France's CAC 40 dropped 0.7%, and South Korea's KOSPI tumbled 2%. US, Mexico Set for Gold Cup Showdown of the U.S. men's national team, scoring twice in the semifinal win over Guatemala to send the Americans to the Gold Cup final. The 21-year-old midfielder now leads a young U.S. squad into a high-stakes showdown against Mexico today at NRG Stadium in Houston. and is expected to draw a heavily pro-Mexico crowd. With key players fatigued and Luna in top form, the U.S. hopes to pull off an upset in the high-stakes final. on FOX (English) or Univision and TUDN (Spanish). Streaming options include FOXSports.com, the FOX Sports app, and ViX. | | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21607/6374453/960e87d88b836f2d1dfe2a1ae1efa786be99fed6/ace87470c83fe8cf7e7a361de22505224a9c1df9). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21607/6374453/960e87d88b836f2d1dfe2a1ae1efa786be99fed6/ace87470c83fe8cf7e7a361de22505224a9c1df9).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21607/6374453/960e87d88b836f2d1dfe2a1ae1efa786be99fed6/ace87470c83fe8cf7e7a361de22505224a9c1df9)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Dave McCormick
subject: A reminder of the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Here's why

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~)

Friend,

This weekend, millions of Americans are gathering to celebrate our independence, not just with fireworks and flags, **but with gratitude for the freedoms we hold dear.**

As someone who's worn the uniform, led troops in combat, and dedicated my life to public service, this time of year means a lot to me. **It 's a reminder of the promise of America and of our responsibility to protect it.**

**[Will you support my fight to protect the promise of America by chipping in a donation today?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~) **Anything you can give makes an important difference.
[CHIP IN](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~)
---

The promise America has to offer shaped my life.

I'm a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, a graduate of West Point, and a former Army officer who served in the 82nd Airborne Division. I've led soldiers overseas, led businesses here at home, and now, I'm honored to serve in the United States Senate.

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~)

What guided me through it all were the same values that built this country: courage, service, faith, and a deep love for the freedoms we celebrate this weekend.

Those values are under attack by the career politicians in Washington. But I didn't run for Senate to play it safe. I ran to be part of a new generation of leaders who are ready to shake up the status quo, stand up for working families, and make government work for the people again.

Everywhere I go in Pennsylvania, I meet people who still believe in this country. People who work hard, give back, and want a better future for their kids. They're why I ran. They're why I serve.

And if you believe in the promise of America, [I'd be honored to have your support.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~)
[CHIP IN $25](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~)

[CHIP IN $100](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~)
---
[CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~)
---

The fight for our country's future isn't easy, but it's worth it.

Thanks for believing in what America can still be.

Sincerely,
Senator Dave McCormick
[CHIP IN](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Vt5RzMuU43LHzZQUnM9xeA~~/AARclBA~/zImtvMAaqQWNa7MRDEx0Md-6uomo3XNFbZA-LR71H7SDAbjYR9_o9NQgruawvjD29WPBFxDkrkbNtdnJqB7JVEdy0yE2FRUU10W4BuT8f9pkdxfRXMmS9TNqmcNJB2ED1WZhP6BU50OaKb6BUvtWXSIWRn0A2yyoB_eUI1OF_gEybEHfLXSHTxwh9VILwdheAvxO1ytzkNtzcdn4UdDiPKV9DJjPvftf4HU_QGeGEV7P1ohqFUxv1rYMZBpyLZuJ1tj21x6noFZOME5SRogxxJRj2IxX9mHlkcy5XJscTXxPRCfVm0f6HT9JdWtMQGspOc8MuONWlTgMPTWx3pR4Wg~~)

* * *

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UbYx__giw7CIR6RjUAc3EQ~~/AARclBA~/giGd-M52OheEMJ9uRWYTJPH9yiFX37pwtHr2ohK7jp9xH950_UbQ_52V64vL6eIYsBT_WGZfzIW9qwXENQSKsw_Fcotl67FAP9Nv4zRMiKcVbvWlWw9RH1iPbZCD9XjDfXWy5qQ1dySOnsjeJkEQKPUVen8O27SHb7vBj3lCU-xEjUAfUtbL4lmkc9xt8qaIpDMh5lL4LPmmomVUEXIkdZ4_XT_DM8NRD9z3QOjTFRHBV_v2fIuNvikxx_JyWutzIYPW_JHiFIFlpcRaCQTsjqamjyuaQCFFMGjMcko1FTUQTzp-HLId_O90LpK2JTpTX7hBmC2zFqJP1_bBAEJO2g~~)
_ _
I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, **and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.**

I've seen firsthand what great leadership looks like. I've seen that even on our worst days, you have to put the needs of others first.

That's why I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day.

Whether it's securing the border, reducing crime in our cities, ending the fentanyl epidemic, or bringing down the cost of living-**I 'm committed to delivering concrete solutions to the biggest issues we face.**

But in order to get the job done, it's going to take all hands on deck. I need every freedom-loving American to help me shake up Washington. I promise I won't let you down.

_Senator Dave McCormick_

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Flood Rescue Ongoing, a Historic Recruit, and Millions of Flies
body:
Rescuers are still searching central Texas for [27 girls missing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GOwwgylBQbGM3225pUB5KFsHwmHHm7zfOL2x58pJ37z0_9-luQwxp_bY7mPryeUpwYoRaoUw-5uwK4PKAnNYc0mq3gDWXSTDRU6YoGyZnQ3xPsnFmZk7zBgxXPVdaD0o2m4FF9H2v2HzrtNbCCr4opUDKbp49MN8Ecz1jig2cM855qzkbnALeMyXhJjsiGbhQc2nrBhVeFn185yeUdsl7E81W64Gk-yJiJGI8z7P1-XWtuO5EjA8kYjxsgVSROsADiq0Q3xQBfkNaqU14QkG6B8SLF7sfF1tfodBPIv2oaIpxxxliDDgoItm62xA_Ler_3D2N-AsAAP__fiyGiw) from Camp Mystic after flash flooding tore through Kerr County on July 4, killing at least 32 people—18 adults and 14 children. Three young campers have been confirmed dead, and families are gathering at reunification centers in Ingram and Kerrville for news of their loved ones.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGngS0WB2MIA8OVrmiXtIpaqdksbI5tVGIiIHHy9lX6Ct1_3zf8vw79wYUY1vnNndHU-5T6FbcSsVbM_RRT8hnLeMW0zimss1tCqSn3nPFux9SOyd67EB-9oN4MzGugaEB1oLSWStDF8G5Q0-QAJzcw7UbcK8-EbPUoUOoWaDDPM6aYBGAA0Ghg0iuEjimBe9ESwdCHmnJTF6x4d2WKj3TD3IzpTKNZar0U0v4j3BJut21rtjx-h3WI8SkIt_wF9gBHLgm3B3G0rx-nJ25tuQ5A2v-fJ_tOs_GXLcQYilREsPnswu-e1r91uRn-EwAA__-yKXRn) | |
# Sunday, July 6, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1923, the [Dr Pepper Company](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFyrSAUgOHVYKdzQIRrQfEau_valA7KUZkghwFyve4-k2whG_j_me_jOT-tDz7u_-2Jpr43miNeJWCtmOctELmMZf1Cijv5uNvDl0p5FiCGFnQLanbWh3uWjTMLuJE3aLgeuB5HpWVzGOWUHMfh0XM3WPVAtUC_KmEXwbUD2BpvfmKgQXEOnPNu5KCcRj6AlviQPZOAzlfKXT2w4tuWLdz0wtytdDbBHLWmwvp_TExMTNd1dbUclmLwETvKOxPTYaNbiD6ZmDDW7LEwMbncJkwJc7vSmWy8m2xcunwIvijNJOyn9eF3Uv9G8zLiOwAA__87B3kN) was incorporated in Dallas. The popular soda was first made in 1885 by Waco pharmacist Charles Alderton. [Rescue efforts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS3CAMQL8Gd-xIMga7cJGG7tKm9ICRvcyx5gbI-vbvM-vkD1JKmnmj9359LB8upnjsP92D5_a95eXgsyZujcuypZxD4br-5nzsOR67u8faclkIaJBgJOgluJhei-rC7CFM2PGMZkAzTdqo7j73AcKIE3hUoB1gz-iIpoE2tWnUvovzGwYGNCIg4m1C0MEwDmAUj6oXCjjElsut3bnxt6tbeuUnl9uaH12a7619VdH_EGQF2fM8b5981OF9FWRdaXFNLMi-xQTZlFeXBNmLJMh-cinPmBLLS1dee-m8z639G_4mkI9Yazx2QZZMLyfegtdulNArLdU4kvTrYORoAnkTVmMG7Mocvs6YUqzaCAX7w8V0vd3-L_Zzpj8BAAD__wAXkX4) continue after July 4 floods at Camp Mystic have left at least 32 dead and dozens still missing. Read the full story in today’s _Roundup._ Today’s edition of _The Texas Flyover_ is a bit shorter than usual as our team takes time off to observe the Fourth of July holiday weekend with loved ones. We will return with a full edition on Monday. Today, we're sponsored by [Nu-Knee](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGngS0WB2MIA8OVrmiXtIpaqdksbI5tVGIiIHHy9lX6Ct1_3zf8vw79wYUY1vnNndHU-5T6FbcSsVbM_RRT8hnLeMW0zimss1tCqSn3nPFux9SOyd67EB-9oN4MzGugaEB1oLSWStDF8G5Q0-QAJzcw7UbcK8-EbPUoUOoWaDDPM6aYBGAA0Ghg0iuEjimBe9ESwdCHmnJTF6x4d2WKj3TD3IzpTKNZar0U0v4j3BJut21rtjx-h3WI8SkIt_wF9gBHLgm3B3G0rx-nJ25tuQ5A2v-fJ_tOs_GXLcQYilREsPnswu-e1r91uRn-EwAA__-yKXRn), a knee brace that can help you get back to being active.

## Camp Mystic Flood Rescue Ongoing
Rescuers are still searching central Texas for [27 girls missing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GOwwgylBQbGM3225pUB5KFsHwmHHm7zfOL2x58pJ37z0_9-luQwxp_bY7mPryeUpwYoRaoUw-5uwK4PKAnNYc0mq3gDWXSTDRU6YoGyZnQ3xPsnFmZk7zBgxXPVdaD0o2m4FF9H2v2HzrtNbCCr4opUDKbp49MN8Ecz1jig2cM855qzkbnALeMyXhJjsiGbhQc2nrBhVeFn185yeUdsl7E81W64Gk-yJiJGI8z7P1-XWtuO5EjA8kYjxsgVSROsADiq0Q3xQBfkNaqU14QkG6B8SLF7sfF1tfodBPIv2oaIpxxxliDDgoItm62xA_Ler_3D2N-AsAAP__fiyGiw) from Camp Mystic after flash flooding tore through Kerr County on July 4, killing at least 32 people—18 adults and 14 children. Three young campers have been confirmed dead, and families are gathering at reunification centers in Ingram and Kerrville for news of their loved ones. The Guadalupe River [surged more than 26 feet](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS3CAMQL8Gd-xIMga7cJGG7tKm9ICRvcyx5gbI-vbvM-vkD1JKmnmj9359LB8upnjsP92D5_a95eXgsyZujcuypZxD4br-5nzsOR67u8faclkIaJBgJOgluJhei-rC7CFM2PGMZkAzTdqo7j73AcKIE3hUoB1gz-iIpoE2tWnUvovzGwYGNCIg4m1C0MEwDmAUj6oXCjjElsut3bnxt6tbeuUnl9uaH12a7619VdH_EGQF2fM8b5981OF9FWRdaXFNLMi-xQTZlFeXBNmLJMh-cinPmBLLS1dee-m8z639G_4mkI9Yazx2QZZMLyfegtdulNArLdU4kvTrYORoAnkTVmMG7Mocvs6YUqzaCAX7w8V0vd3-L_Zzpj8BAAD__wAXkX4) in under an hour, devastating the riverside town of Hunt and wiping out much of the camp. As of Friday night, at least 237 people had been rescued—167 by helicopter. More than 6.5 inches of rain fell in three hours, a rare, century-level storm that triggered flash flood emergencies across the Hill Country. To relieve pressure on the river system, floodgates at [two upstream dams](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-O4yAQh58Gd0Qz-A-moLjG3V57pTWBwUFLTARsvLmnPzm6N9hqik8afd_vz8f6QTHFfftNd7btO-R156Mmbo3LGlLOvnB1X5z3Lcd9o1usLZdVgRolaAnT6imm1zp03l7BG-zYoh5RGzPpobtZZOh70gaucwhmDioo72fSyo_qCuy6aM9noGFCBES8GITJa8YR9MDz0IsB2MeWy6XduPE31ZBe-cnl4vK9S_bW2qOK_pdQi1DLcRyXz-cXn1CohUqLLrFQy9kl1JKyo3ReV0jmB-9VvjM3alxlbVTcJ8sjlvZXerr_p3HfpOO9FUryrSDUoiYjWY_QG3QyjBrloJgkBU1y6tEjhDBfkbti_eOIKcU6aTHAdqeY3u7tZ4s_rfoXAAD__9CylTQ) were opened. Gov. Greg Abbott declared a disaster across 15 counties and deployed more than 1,000 state responders. _“We will stop at nothing to ensure...that everybody involved in this is going to be fully accounted for,"_ he said.
## Texas Tech Lands Historic $5M Recruit
Texas Tech football landed [a commitment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3ypCAUxE-DGVPAIGhAsInZbLqhhfBUtpBnwdv5uP2Wc4V_0klX_7qr_zzmh085le23P8DRe8W5wKtlIII6rxkxVmjhH2DZMJXN76kR1lkJ1XNhuTBz9Cl_Zt1Ft4g4yg6ctL2042is7nan_BB80HIxYYmgg1SDN7CYVXowVg1dchdMWGGkFFLK2yiFiRZkL6yGQd-ZFhATYb3RDgRv39b8wSfUW8Cjy24nOhu7_2JqYmoqnxMbXRZT00VmahL2Es3U1E6s1JiaVsjpzfEv8uxLbLznR8o5YeElZR7BZ-5Xgsq_hZwg7DzgcSQ6oBBTU1ddPF9XphnLtNgOn_J3Ef3sx6dT_wMAAP__MTGHcA) from 2026 five-star offensive tackle Felix Ojo on Friday, securing him with a fully guaranteed, three-year, $5.1 million revenue-sharing deal—one of the largest in college football history. Ojo, a 6-foot-7 standout from Texas, chose the Red Raiders over offers from Florida, Michigan, Ohio State, and Texas. His commitment marks Texas Tech’s highest-rated recruit since ESPN began [tracking rankings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL8Gd1iAMZiCIinoXtqUFjYXm-jad2XIevfvo32_kHqkmTnn99f8FQuWc_sVD_DtlWk-4a4IrcE1ZyRKF9T1L9C5UTm3uJfa6JqVUCMXlgszp1jwPesu-UUkJzvw0o7SOmes7nafhbFaRyVy1qtzE0yLXuzkonODTavoiv-UCSuMlEJK2TspTLIgR2E1THpgWkAqja6-7dDgFWvGNz3h6lc6OvR7a4_Khh9MBabCfd891Mf5CZkKKyHCBjwTtSUiMhU-AG-mwsxUKImpoEdj3DA4pkIuT-C1xYtT4xmwvDj9Ib7ScZRW-fc6b7DuHOOZKh8Ppn7yBBG7y6fHXRBLNZZpsR2x4PfD9n9en179CwAA__8tfIw6) in 2006. Ojo, ranked No. 7 nationally by 247Sports and No. 20 in the ESPN 300, highlights the new era of direct athlete compensation following a major [NCAA legal settlement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAUheHV4A4LCAa7oHgNXV47pXVjLjYjDBYQO9n9KLOFqY909On_us93CDGk9T_saNrL5znhVSO2hmX2MWdXsC5PzGnNIa2whdpymQUTA2WaMjU7CPE9y86ZB3MT79BwPXA9TUrLbjNc-3EE-QDulgcIPcGk5MAX7b1TfnRdMJ8zppninHHO-4kz5TTygWmJo7wRydCFlkvfNmz4gurjO59Y-iXvXTRba0clt39EWCLsdV091iN9RiLskmPEFWk9cmmVCPvhv4mwMxE2OCKsHKTSAxuIsN9PtyJdC6RWqQ8JIoXjKPmESLf8rEhPmhYAWrG1iDum1hXjjivEGKrSRLJ1hxB_Ye1vOU8jfgIAAP__kgmK5Q). With his commitment, Texas Tech's 2026 class now ranks 24th nationally. You can [see the full rankings here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVuiC8EQBoYu3tK1o4XNtY2KuRbc5uPtq_QVOv-kc6T_1228hZRTWT_Djp6fC40FHy0jM9ZxyUSxYpt_kMpKqaxhS42pjgpUfwJ7AjPGkPJr1F30E0QnO_TS9tI6Z6zuNu9MnJcJexdUjL1T8npFXDRO2kFvUHfJv8fAgpESpJRnJ8FEi7IHq_GqL0IDxsRUz7wh4zO0Jb_ojvU8095lvzEfTVw-hBqEGpS27aDK7a1CDQ1Do_IGUOa0EPEUchZqmGk_qCVGxrDXUL5TWZtQQ1d9PB4p59SMFRrWPaT8d8X_C3T36jcAAP__Msd6sA).

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Camp Mystic Flood Rescue Ongoing Rescuers are still searching central Texas for from Camp Mystic after flash flooding tore through Kerr County on July 4, killing at least 32 people—18 adults and 14 children. Three young campers have been confirmed dead, and families are gathering at reunification centers in Ingram and Kerrville for news of their loved ones. The Guadalupe River in under an hour, devastating the riverside town of Hunt and wiping out much of the camp. As of Friday night, at least 237 people had been rescued—167 by helicopter. More than 6.5 inches of rain fell in three hours, a rare, century-level storm that triggered flash flood emergencies across the Hill Country. To relieve pressure on the river system, floodgates at were opened. Gov. Greg Abbott declared a disaster across 15 counties and deployed more than 1,000 state responders. “We will stop at nothing to ensure...that everybody involved in this is going to be fully accounted for," he said. Texas Tech Lands Historic $5M Recruit Texas Tech football landed from 2026 five-star offensive tackle Felix Ojo on Friday, securing him with a fully guaranteed, three-year, $5.1 million revenue-sharing deal—one of the largest in college football history. Ojo, a 6-foot-7 standout from Texas, chose the Red Raiders over offers from Florida, Michigan, Ohio State, and Texas. His commitment marks Texas Tech’s highest-rated recruit since ESPN began in 2006. Ojo, ranked No. 7 nationally by 247Sports and No. 20 in the ESPN 300, highlights the new era of direct athlete compensation following a major . With his commitment, Texas Tech's 2026 class now ranks 24th nationally. No one was hurt. () ➤ Corpus Christi: George Strait surprised fans by making an appearance at the Corpus Christi Country Club for a round of golf earlier this week.
