name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: The bill passed—what now?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
What’s next for our movement
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3753365/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

The disastrous budget reconciliation bill has passed in Congress. I’ve been thinking hard about how we got here—and where we go next.

Here’s what I know for sure:

**1️⃣ This bill is appalling.**

Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans have rammed through what may be the most destructive legislation in modern American history. With one stroke, they’re gutting the Inflation Reduction Act, pouring more pollution into our air and water, supercharging the climate crisis, and driving up costs for working families. And that’s on top of the many other cruel and inexcusable things this bill does.

2️⃣ **We will make the GOP and Big Oil answer for it.**

In this fight, you and millions of others stepped up. At least 7 million calls were made to Congress—helping to further massive public backlash. And we won’t let up. Every lawmaker who voted for this brutal bill will be held to account, now and at the ballot box.

3️⃣ **We still have powerful ways to protect our collective future.**

How? By unleashing bold state action. For decades, states have led the way—cutting pollution, slashing costs, and proving that climate action improves daily life.

If you’ve been in this movement long enough, you know: State climate leadership has never been a backup plan. It’s always been one of the strongest, fastest paths we have to transformational change.

Evergreen has deep relationships and proven wins in key states, where we’re building momentum in places with the most to gain from robust, community-focused climate action.

Evergreen has deep roots and real victories in the states where this matters most—and we’re accelerating the work right now. **Together with in-state partners, we’re fighting for:** |
---
| ✅ Cheap, reliable clean energy powering every home
✅ Safe public transit and electric vehicles that work for everyone
✅ Abundant, affordable housing that cuts bills and pollution |
---
| **But we can’t do it without you.** Your support is more important than ever as we continue to advocate for enduring policies that will win these state-level fights. Because there will be forces that will try to slow us down when we can’t afford to—[**and with your help, we won’t.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3753366/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[DONATE NOW TO POWER THIS FIGHT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3753367/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| **This is the truth, as simply as I can put it: We cannot stop fighting.**

My kids, and everyone on this planet, deserve the brightest future we can build. Evergreen will never stop fighting for bold, life-changing climate action.

Thanks for being in it with us. |
---
| Onward, |
---
| | |
---
### Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

Together with in-state partners, we’re fighting for: | | ✅ Cheap, reliable clean energy powering every home ✅ Safe public transit and electric vehicles that work for everyone ✅ Abundant, affordable housing that cuts bills and pollution | | But we can’t do it without you. Your support is more important than ever as we continue to advocate for enduring policies that will win these state-level fights. Because there will be forces that will try to slow us down when we can’t afford to— | | This is the truth, as simply as I can put it: We cannot stop fighting. My kids, and everyone on this planet, deserve the brightest future we can build. Evergreen will never stop fighting for bold, life-changing climate action. Thanks for being in it with us. | | Onward, | | | | Lena Moffitt Executive Director Evergreen Action | Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. name: The LaRouche Organization
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
Remembering the real USA

| | | [ ](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HM6Vx3bJFWn0kHCKwY0V20z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250706_newsletter&n=1)
---
## [Tune in for today's LaRouche Show, starting at 10 am (EDT)](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFnRQPzwD0GZeeIjvMD6AFxsgQ-nVM0IP7qBBNplYDqIP&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250706_newsletter&n=2)
---
---
Friend —
---
As the United States approaches its 250th year of existence, it is doing so amidst the greatest crisis of modern times. Will our nation still be around in another 250 years? The next hours and days are fraught with numerous potential triggers that could ignite civilization-ending war. What will we do to ensure the U.S. celebrates its 500th birthday? The post-World War II order is now in shambles due to years and decades of gross violations. Last month's illegal strikes on Iran by Israel and the U.S., and the ongoing genocide of the nation of Palestine, are only the two most recent examples. President Trump's promise of more strikes if Iran continues enriching uranium is a dead-end policy that will only lead to further war and destabilization, if not spark a global nuclear exchange. But despite the problems with the current system, simply tearing it down will never resolve the underlying issues that gave rise to today's crisis. Such a juvenile approach is akin to rearranging the deck chairs on the Titanic, and will only make the situation worse. In commemoration of Independence Day this weekend, reflect upon the words of one of the greatest minds in our nation's history, John Quincy Adams. [Adams told](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=sw6i6HyaDFw1zIdJ3A_pyA2iww75Sl6i4B3_TyB2XI90UxlvVvib7qQm656ltTI6VAWRM43eawMuikMuqeQhQdz6MBJyNofbzk6XWx6Y1pV4j--ppZCEMoIG-_97rLbUyraC4hvTJqHlDXRctWU37v19aNnX6wqKh_0R2GXTD5c&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250706_newsletter&n=3) the House of Representatives on July 4, 1821, that while the United States would offer its prayers and well-wishes to people around the world seeking their freedom, America “goes not abroad, in search of monsters to destroy”:
> She is the well-wisher to the freedom and independence of all. She is the champion and vindicator only of her own. She will commend the general cause by the countenance of her voice, and the benignant sympathy of her example. She well knows that by once enlisting under other banners than her own, were they even the banners of foreign independence, she would involve herself beyond the power of extrication, in all the wars of interest and intrigue, of individual avarice, envy, and ambition, which assume the colors and usurp the standard of freedom.
In this case, what would happen to the Republic?
> The fundamental maxims of her policy would insensibly change from liberty to force.... She might become the dictatress of the world. She would be no longer the ruler of her own spirit. [America’s] glory is not dominion, but liberty. Her march is the march of the mind.
Let us revive the true mission of the United States and cement this vision as part of a new global security and development architecture that takes the interests of every nation and people into account.
---
* * *
---

---

clean_body: Remembering the real USA | | | Friend — As the United States approaches its 250th year of existence, it is doing so amidst the greatest crisis of modern times. Will our nation still be around in another 250 years? The next hours and days are fraught with numerous potential triggers that could ignite civilization-ending war. What will we do to ensure the U.S. celebrates its 500th birthday? The post-World War II order is now in shambles due to years and decades of gross violations. Last month's illegal strikes on Iran by Israel and the U.S., and the ongoing genocide of the nation of Palestine, are only the two most recent examples. President Trump's promise of more strikes if Iran continues enriching uranium is a dead-end policy that will only lead to further war and destabilization, if not spark a global nuclear exchange. But despite the problems with the current system, simply tearing it down will never resolve the underlying issues that gave rise to today's crisis. Such a juvenile approach is akin to rearranging the deck chairs on the Titanic, and will only make the situation worse. In commemoration of Independence Day this weekend, reflect upon the words of one of the greatest minds in our nation's history, John Quincy Adams. the House of Representatives on July 4, 1821, that while the United States would offer its prayers and well-wishes to people around the world seeking their freedom, America “goes not abroad, in search of monsters to destroy”: She is the well-wisher to the freedom and independence of all. She is the champion and vindicator only of her own. She will commend the general cause by the countenance of her voice, and the benignant sympathy of her example. She well knows that by once enlisting under other banners than her own, were they even the banners of foreign independence, she would involve herself beyond the power of extrication, in all the wars of interest and intrigue, of individual avarice, envy, and ambition, which assume the colors and usurp the standard of freedom. In this case, what would happen to the Republic? The fundamental maxims of her policy would insensibly change from liberty to force.... She might become the dictatress of the world. She would be no longer the ruler of her own spirit. [America’s] glory is not dominion, but liberty. Her march is the march of the mind. Let us revive the true mission of the United States and cement this vision as part of a new global security and development architecture that takes the interests of every nation and people into account. Starting At 10am (EDT)! This Week's LaRouche Show: On July 3, 1982, Lyndon LaRouche delivered this keynote speech to a conference in New York City. LaRouche issued the call to rally all sovereign nation states around the historic mission of the United States to finally end the tyranny of oligarchy which has plagued mankind for millennia. Schiller Institute Conference July 12-13 Next weekend, July 12-13, the Schiller Institute will be holding another international conference as a follow-up to its recent Memorial Day conference in New Jersey. This one will be held in Berlin, Germany, and will be live-streamed for viewing around the world. A preliminary speakers' list has been released, giving a foretaste of the high-level discussion that will occur. Be sure to register and make plans to attend, either online or in person, if possible. | | New TLO Class Series A six-week class series will begin Sunday, July 20, and run through August 27. It will be hosted by The LaRouche Organization's Science Advisor, Jason Ross, with the theme of “Lyndon LaRouche's view of human creativity, from the standpoint of history's greatest scientific geniuses and their discoveries.” | In a time of growing tension and fraying nerves, where each successive provocation threatens to trigger a civilization-ending world war, staying a step ahead of the oligarchy’s war hawks is essential for survival. Watch this special discussion between Diane Sare and Helga Zepp-LaRouche. | | | Friday Symposium Watch this special July 4 Symposium, featuring The LaRouche Organization's history editor Christopher Sare. | Weekly Battle Report Happy Independence Day Week! The international LaRouche movement intervened this week going into July 4th with our mass-leaflet distribution of the leaflet. “Will There Be Thermonuclear Fireworks by the Fourth of July?” We have reports on the distribution of tens of thousands of this leaflet in recent days by organizers in Maryland, West Virginia, Massachusetts, Texas, and New York in the United States, and in Germany and France. As well as other reports and highlights. | | | Interview with Jacques Cheminade In case you missed it, we premiered an interview with Jacques Cheminade, President of Solidarité et Progrès during last Saturday's Manhattan Project show. The interview was conducted by Schiller Institute organizer Kynan Thistlethwaite live from Paris. The two discussed the current strategic situation, especially following the eruption in Southwest Asia over the recent weeks. | New TLO Pamphlet The LaRouche Organization has released a new pamphlet on the urgently needed economic program for the U.S. economy. The London and Wall Street-dominated transatlantic system is now in its final avalanche-like phase of collapse, and our political class seems to be worse than clueless about where to go from here. Lyndon LaRouche has uniquely provided the solution for this crisis, and this report must serve as a blueprint for any serious approach to rebuild the country. | Join the Discussion! name: Jim Jordan
subject: Our ACHILLES HEEL at the midterms?
body:
Don’t let our greatest advantage from 2024 become our greatest WEAKNESS in 2025.

Don’t let our greatest advantage from 2024 become our greatest WEAKNESS in 2025.
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aKXq/?__vbtrk=MzAwNjI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNjI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot,
---
We’re on the 1-yard line, and we’re either about to score big or fumble badly.
---
_The latest Rasmussen polling shows the Democrats’ lead in the midterms has been CUT DOWN to just**1 POINT** ... well within the **_margin_ _of_ _error_**._
---
But here’s the kicker – one of our greatest advantages in the 2024 election was our unparalleled voter data.
---
A fully verified file allowed us to not only see who the most high-propensity voters were, but also where Republicans could most _effectively_ spend our resources to WIN.
---
_However, as it stands this year, we’re still missing countless voter profiles, leaving key zip codes unrepresented._
---
**After all our hard work to send President Trump back to the White House and secure majorities in both chambers of Congress last November, I REFUSE to allow one of our biggest 2024 _advantages_ turn into our ACHILLES HEEL at the midterms! **
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
_That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats._
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aKXq/?__vbtrk=MzAwNjI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNjI4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

---

Thank you,

| Peter, we can’t stress enough how important the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency is to our election security. CISA helps state and local election officials deal with threats that they’d never be able to handle on their own, like hackers. **But now this key agency is being threatened by the Trump administration.** Even though CISA was created from a law that Trump HIMSELF signed in 2018, the GOP’s massive election misinformation campaign has put CISA in danger – especially since it called out MAGA lies that the 2020 election was “rigged”. **Peter, we need to show our “leaders” that CISA can’t be taken away without a fight. We need to defend this important agency so that our elections remain safe from foreign influence and cyberthreats.** [**If you agree, will you sign our petition to save CISA today? We need 150 people in 22122 to step up and show that people across America are committed to preserving the integrity and safety of our elections.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T800ba10b-7fc5-4e29-a2b4-a30bfeff8553/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Gender policies putting Trump's eyes on PA
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bf70988454&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[These are not serious people](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c3e690a9ef&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Zohran Mamdani is no more qualified to be Mayor of New York City than I am to run NASDAQ.

Yet, he won the Democratic nomination to run this fall to become the mayor of the largest city in our nation — a population larger than 40 states and a budget over $112 billion.

And no major Democrat is opposing him.

What has prepared him to manage a $112 billion dollar budget, 280,000 employees and the operations for a city of nearly nine million people, with nearly five million more working there each day?

He is 33 years old. He is currently a state legislator having served four years and five months. He chairs no committees.

Before taking office in January 2021, he was a hip-hop music producer and was a “housing counselor” for a nonprofit in Queens after graduating from college in 2014, with a degree in Africana Studies. Never managed any business or even a department.

Sadly, he’s the embodiment of 2025 Democrats. Loyalty to the progressive bible and commitment to the left’s causes is how they measure candidate quality.

**Why It Matters**. That he was taken seriously says a lot about today’s Democratic Party. That state and national figures endorsed him — and no one is opposing him — says even more about today’s Democratic Party. That he was able to win says a lot about the state of today’s Democratic primary electorate.

Experience? Solutions? Common sense? Ha!

Rhetoric is more important than experience. Devotion to the progressive bible of victimhood, genders, “justice,” climate crisis, the teachers union, challenging American greatness, and men in women’s sports is far more important than solutions to actual, kitchen-table problems.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9018f0adc7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Majority of Philly-area school districts are out of step with Title IX](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=058e77d452&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_ The Trump administration is waging war against states that refuse to comply with Title IX protections for girls and women. While the key issue is focused on boys competing in girls’ sports, other aspects include keeping boys out of girls’ bathrooms and locker rooms. Pennsylvania has not been targeted by the federal government — yet. However, it seems only a matter of time before it happens. Despite the federal orders and a subsequent[ Dear Colleague](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d0943c7a95&e=b7b3eddce2) letter warning states and school districts about potential consequences for violators, Pennsylvania is doubling down. The Pennsylvania Human Relations Commission (PHRC)[ continues](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=259c396da9&e=b7b3eddce2) to provide protections based on “gender identity” despite the federal law, court rulings, and Executive Orders. **Why It Matters.** The PHRC regulations are in direct conflict with federal law and are providing cover for some school districts in the Commonwealth. Many districts continue to allow students to use the bathroom that corresponds to their gender identity as opposed to their biology, citing the PHRC regulations. _Broad + Liberty****_ completed a review of policies for every school district in Bucks, Chester, Delaware, Montgomery, and Philadelphia counties. The analysis shows some districts have a specific policy for transgender students, often entitled, “Transgender and Gender Expansive Students.” Districts with this particular policy clearly articulate that students can use the bathroom that most closely aligns with their gender identity. This policy also requires school staff and administration to withhold information from parents. Over 40 percent of districts in the region have this type of policy**.** Thirteen of the 62 districts analyzed (21 percent) continue to recognize “gender identity” as a protection under their Title IX Nondiscrimination policy, despite the federal law saying otherwise. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb8a7a4ec5&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Manion + Grigalonis: SEPTA is not just a Philly issue — all of Pennsylvania has a stake in mass transit](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a47df0b098&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[David Sanko: Why public information must be free and accessible](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b6e05aaf03&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: It could have been worse](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=75fd095d41&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Richard Vaughn: A dream revived, a river revived](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=663e91a991&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What NYC Shake-Up Means for Pittsburgh Area Dems **
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c1827e1705&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Longtime political analyst Jon Delano joins us for a sharp and wide-ranging conversation on the future of Democratic politics in PA
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
The One, Big, Beautiful Bill is working its way through Congress as this newsletter goes to press. By the time you read this, it may have become law. But even if that bill is a feather in President Trump’s cap, it is also a reminder that Congress — and especially the budgeting process — is not working as intended. And it hasn’t worked for some time. [Yuval Levin wrote this week at _National Review_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1041ffbae4&e=b7b3eddce2) about how the relentlessly partisan polarization in Congress (and the nation) is driving bad outcomes from the legislative branch. Both parties, he writes, are “pushing against the logic of the Constitution” in passing narrow, party-line bills, “but this tends to leave them frustrated with the Constitution rather than open to the possibility that the Constitution is trying to teach them how to get out of the frustrating and thoroughly unproductive rut in which they’ve been stuck for a generation.”

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Guy Ciarrocchi Zohran Mamdani is no more qualified to be Mayor of New York City than I am to run NASDAQ. Yet, he won the Democratic nomination to run this fall to become the mayor of the largest city in our nation — a population larger than 40 states and a budget over $112 billion. And no major Democrat is opposing him. What has prepared him to manage a $112 billion dollar budget, 280,000 employees and the operations for a city of nearly nine million people, with nearly five million more working there each day? He is 33 years old. He is currently a state legislator having served four years and five months. He chairs no committees. Before taking office in January 2021, he was a hip-hop music producer and was a “housing counselor” for a nonprofit in Queens after graduating from college in 2014, with a degree in Africana Studies. Never managed any business or even a department. Sadly, he’s the embodiment of 2025 Democrats. Loyalty to the progressive bible and commitment to the left’s causes is how they measure candidate quality. Why It Matters. That he was taken seriously says a lot about today’s Democratic Party. That state and national figures endorsed him — and no one is opposing him — says even more about today’s Democratic Party. That he was able to win says a lot about the state of today’s Democratic primary electorate. Experience? Solutions? Common sense? Ha! Rhetoric is more important than experience. Devotion to the progressive bible of victimhood, genders, “justice,” climate crisis, the teachers union, challenging American greatness, and men in women’s sports is far more important than solutions to actual, kitchen-table problems. | | 2. By Beth Ann Rosica The Trump administration is waging war against states that refuse to comply with Title IX protections for girls and women. While the key issue is focused on boys competing in girls’ sports, other aspects include keeping boys out of girls’ bathrooms and locker rooms. Pennsylvania has not been targeted by the federal government — yet. However, it seems only a matter of time before it happens. Despite the federal orders and a subsequent letter warning states and school districts about potential consequences for violators, Pennsylvania is doubling down. The Pennsylvania Human Relations Commission (PHRC) to provide protections based on “gender identity” despite the federal law, court rulings, and Executive Orders. Why It Matters. The PHRC regulations are in direct conflict with federal law and are providing cover for some school districts in the Commonwealth. Many districts continue to allow students to use the bathroom that corresponds to their gender identity as opposed to their biology, citing the PHRC regulations. Broad + Liberty** completed a review of policies for every school district in Bucks, Chester, Delaware, Montgomery, and Philadelphia counties. The analysis shows some districts have a specific policy for transgender students, often entitled, “Transgender and Gender Expansive Students.” Districts with this particular policy clearly articulate that students can use the bathroom that most closely aligns with their gender identity. This policy also requires school staff and administration to withhold information from parents. Over 40 percent of districts in the region have this type of policy. Thirteen of the 62 districts analyzed (21 percent) continue to recognize “gender identity” as a protection under their Title IX Nondiscrimination policy, despite the federal law saying otherwise. | | 3\. In a powerful letter to President Trump, they called it “a betrayal to the more than 640,000 postal employees who work tirelessly every day to ensure mail is delivered to every corner of the country.”

The effort to privatize the USPS would **raise costs on everyday Americans, undermine mail-in voting, and weaken essential services for rural communities.**

The USPS is one of the most trusted public institutions in America — and privatization would put that trust, and our democracy, at risk.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My dad didn’t cry about victimhood
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I love this photo of my dad and me at my Harvard graduation.
He didn't just chase the American Dream - he passed it down. Hey, this is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'd like to share a personal story with you.
When I was in middle school, my father got laid off from his factory job at the General Electric plant in Evendale, Ohio. He was one of the hardest workers there, but like thousands of other good men and women, he was laid off without warning.
Most people would complain, whine, and stomp their feet, saying, "It's not fair!".
But not MY dad. He didn't cry about victimhood or racism.
Instead, he picked himself up, dusted himself off, got a new job, and enrolled in night school law classes for the next four years.
But because money was tight, he and my mother couldn't afford childcare. Every day after middle school, my dad would pick me up and we'd drive for 45 minutes to the University of Kentucky across the river.
I'd sit in the back of his law school classes every night.
Most kids my age would hate the idea of spending all day at school just to go to ANOTHER school at night. But not me.
I was FASCINATED, learning about the Constitution, the principles of law, and Supreme Court decisions.
So why do I even share this story with you in the first place?
Because that time in my life taught me a lesson I've never forgotten: Every hardship is an opportunity - if you're willing to work for it.
That mindset is the foundation of my campaign.
I don't believe in a culture of victimhood. I believe in the American Dream. I believe in merit over DEI. In hard work over handouts. In family, faith, and responsibility, not grievance and blame.
Right now, we have a real opportunity to reverse Radical Leftist policies. An opportunity to show how the nuclear family is the best form of governance. An opportunity to showcase how capitalism lifts people out of poverty. An opportunity to reinstate the American Dream.
And I know that you're one of the dedicated American Patriots who believe in that vision.
That's why I need you with me, Peter.
[If you can, please consider donating $10 to my campaign for governor today. I need all the help I can get to restore the American Dream for Ohioans and Americans alike.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=52bac640fe834903ab740bb76018c510&_e=NwEPuMAWRwPPut0UDM7Ivwbto2MNwOgT18xToORQIKzLzQyEZCn4AKtPoa59hpB6pnQFzl4wdciMq8jcwDmYqJSdEVC6Pjv87pJOt11SZcVtLUa_LNFyugu4I5dUJoFleXeGuWmLSDHMXVwUOQEEpoKH340PpGC8VphHarPF87QWbumRxtUgaDIRHjTvYfwMrmcSdqNMuaVWI2pojk1ZdmnDocLZEjNOjP08BzOTPbUqWPowrMazsV2zJlkvGXiSnNxWaAilMsylx776kaaCbp1VVVShKH301yANkjY9JNuJjeo7Ih9YBUMEUxlFEqnG0rYyrfTXVmfxnTLyzPi6RVRTob7f9rT054wJOMhorpbVM3DzljLu2HFItJQeV7ktvtOovjsjTgnH1-pxCx3NU7MqFp_HLEQ5wUaSJe5P9yFgqB-ufWS_Gtt88oWTCi6c4LtxIRywWqv0LfAYUyam9J21tTPbNQhEc2p75zVffiGsmEfRl04MibgWgEI_BYG68_zshLXSrTxYgzLLtCvhzTnHeuLR4dE6vjp6XROi5rGF5cDRqv28QMkXSnb33oR1x6adG36dakWImxyAOU1fLpCmDML3Of9oKIiqXvR1pb04-_Dh57fmCFiXJIxz4KYr0d4mKuUAoGtKCcDRDXm4slyW4QcBx_X0m3Pzm6_SRZ-gvpZZbH14v1PPbyt5IQat_ZWhVDIAykvnfV3v-8o2zSaY9RdffJF6DeTZ6f1RLbP4QHtPaHBAIUy6XF17Od1m_9RyIwSQrR2aM5HFvkgY7Q%3D%3D)
Don't let our nation turn into one full of victims. Help me turn it into one of victors, just like my dad.
Thanks for your support.
God Bless,**Vivek Ramaswamy

body:

🔦 **_Georgia:_ DLCC Announces new Spotlight candidate **
The DLCC is proud to stand with Spotlight Candidate Debra Shigley as she prepares for the Georgia Senate special election on August 26th. Shigley is a small business owner and a mother who is deeply embedded in her community. She has what it takes to stand against GOP extremism and fight for hardworking Georgians. [Read more about her here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pDSRZN6vSOQk-5GlHZI639dNNbZls4fdMt3WqyVZOo1UW7I5cIIG19kXk0TLIa0Lr3X1YVwc8lEsXvY9REwo6K7Ony9QqqxRXqWSzp2rSmW78aQW1gLyTbohimLvy1TmXA9o-ZBI-eWjtUyQq4bxYeD5xfSx5GanGf-_F7TK5REsx-F_8rTYQgH1T5qw4YLyh3WmELEdL5eUt73Cjerlq6GmkvaqT8pspiG9EKaVHLcy2CITLOYupwgPtFYn7cBkwC1gzo4XUx4Jus38pEvMM4LydB5NpKh04QNmchVIqgHE1y-tiAb5SvIleMAwQUYVDJAie7M5p9guK9_j4hvGgpcydZnahXB-NN3Ki4FadYzGDFGOQYDvxfjI7LtMziRI4xePSPfaSP3twdDF9evRE--QRq_MjN5Be74XdnhPh8FiFol-LvIqv25u1hFm3m4T8iDjtgBZytQpgwHYi7R7xsb4Kk9roVhvo-T00JLoVYGXtUnUwj7fUCTYwGZPN7LOKk3FgN5wIoo5BEBBCqoyAOx_0qgOACgMp_FTkVr4FXioC4kH3l4nBRQEz0rFmgAurelYFm9u0ppx9__M2l_odsY/4hy/uMLB2vvnR0-AZ62_wB4Tsg/h1/h001.nxlsDCWlTyumJm-xW7065uCns2tnije7ExsuZnDlM-M)
👀 **_Court Watch:_ SCOTUS allows red states to deny Medicaid patients access to Planned Parenthood **
Early this week, the Supreme Court ruled that states can deny Medicaid patients coverage for basic health services provided through Planned Parenthood. Republicans are hellbent on weaponizing anti-abortion extremism to deny low-income Americans choices around basic health care. [Read the DLCC’s statement here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pCW8oeK5_OAQhAF2w9ABD4vczq-evNXFpnIg7bn5sZSmvTXvg799ieLE81DpF-WpczibupfBo99GgbGzDLArqqmpxwaOltSwzy6ucL6OyC40gBJjrJIkAbkTjg16LxYC3anDRZt23MgeRlMvzSwB_rMU4tJuKLP2Ge3YJesqU7XQgg0wMLrt9jovvBSBlp3dPGJZjwgyTVmtOofgeUtqiXW6D4vJNQoF2KsStv9y8vVrSmAps-9ACNTm6pKZcOoQKRb_9xpo4O5HRHuVl-9Xpw0DAux0uvN9AVrJsx2YttUDdoNGXSkgTIsbCSFLhVNUJ5xBeQLdqlX7N6AaTyxdbPyF5qFJdQj3gKmQxgoncLHf2htqf0Dk7-qJq74vooqmhskaFLPw_AtXaYQcOm2X5rhuVmgjXVQ016JrqhcTykTWRrMruQXOMfaGNQwvyMjITqv1XBy5AzJcIa3V-yx6TmrNGrXppzJO2UafRtia_3YYKQ60C60xk2fYuTI5uHMikCgq2B8wG1XIz5SBvO6xPJuo3NF5o90iIaqtycbrp0DFYCatxFWwmE18pzOH99qDoLR4ma2_WI9whhoV8s-C_sMDwE-dVyHhDVcO6jNNrswG5Xhnf_K2RJrgyIAz48SFUEHn_oFs1bN-NUr00dyfTOLrK3JwxdB4A70MbkFJhuCCw/4hy/uMLB2vvnR0-AZ62_wB4Tsg/h2/h001.qVA7352MWchc381FWEVWKrXX6EFmpQIaZcs0WW5f9tg)
📖 **_Read:_ A Message to Democrats: Follow the State Leaders **
_Courier_ published an op-ed from DLCC President Heather Williams on how Democrats should be watching and learning from state legislative leaders who are winning and overperforming in elections. [Read the op-ed → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sQOyMl4UlXepRfF2TJOzqI9Q7YamkysP1-SqS08XmgtOaGPo84PeO926TTpg315ZjuXfjta4ascba-3kSsNTTczuOpVHJYZpVpFDAjfqIA9poNu4GFAldi8OlJhXI91MWVb-a91mA8-_V6U3tSYpxPGnl0lTWcwpv3rwlOEu6fA7THAAvBONQ_2dCjGkwhkVxZKkFYbI_sSH16kF38rtDLRiOTGX07xiYvhsULs0GPIJtI28eaeAnKGaeVAjF_p2J4EBsOiybfWdCyp-6LiQw95F044q1uh7z_HQcXirniuEZuN4EZQogEmj--bSg7c3-Ld5zSqTfC7Kx16QHhDRzEkCh9us7hhlA0OPvAGSylbGSJfdH2OTpTSDzmrZyoX68txOm5NdTs7_r-1i9tqU-JYmv9CLTAYxCB4oSphp4MHqpW2-pAe1PreUVpyLVwQ0yz6PHHKobQGHc5f9b7YPM13QYnzpgWPkah993JuVL7J1q0w9CL5cBQswtns-r0kEZIt6OYv8p7Ok7gDRP7M3EOl3rRWnW_DFcNXqLkLsnY0RT3NjsrxrxCb2sUs_INOZxJnN7wOn6Yzcwn2JLRc4RSExbPDUhfyJahclcecmqY5gTErPcwAafm-c93slX8OfAg/4hy/uMLB2vvnR0-AZ62_wB4Tsg/h3/h001.5aN5BafsrTOdg_sqPuJ_JWhWIerx0f7ym-1Jshitwrw)
🛡️** _You’re Invited:_ Down Ballot Defenders Summit **
Team DLCC is hosting our first-ever virtual Down Ballot Defenders Summit on July 9th. DLCC President Heather Williams and state legislators from around the country will be answering your questions and firing up supporters for the fight ahead. [**RSVP today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9u_GU3djC_YxH5oogoQ6ZbSl3vMLEmr-mlYZ8yiqR8zVMZXl7W2JhVmaKJu-Hy2Netmw4Tifd7A121LNRVMDiGlqbobT4qaCQ3WETpJ5XfoEDsZxx7jMZsDltbQnA7w-7QpTQJK67BZ7jjtRhI7KBBBCTxBMTzl-6WE_poezY5yp-TShuzT-Hd6peYbplOjybx-y7a7xpu5rg2OC9BoLVO57eIwrAcOS7wYd8NmBFEJ-_K5ZwMvgsSiucxLkWMVGrf5Zvxaq_ig8T_AHzLcvmz-J6lKLH8fymyzq9s0uH5bF6H-xBq9tQWTz6jk9qu7ET3V74QvjZ1sG1XfNhgxwwGsKcYUQ0v_EZ3BNIp_qkQjGwVRpgpPHRzKFpw4I65xWp8F0FHYMZGrijxJFexTT1gxfL59h436VsGwHGGZQZcMSZeiwnnRgZk8rYuAYnkbbns5_wPMgWTXcY1hFLLQgf2ja47AfM1XHgB1w_miAWB9SR5La9dXRqwiRb4vZcUx4A/4hy/uMLB2vvnR0-AZ62_wB4Tsg/h4/h001.tfOekV3Ub6qJ4CxI8EIPMHSqzGynPDkm_jIHFUJcQis)
🫏 **_Join our movement:_ Become an Official DLCC Member **
If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. [**Join our team today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDa7m90zNjTmBK_i5PQ3_eFOaBKjPUyGXVs45FOl0oSbQtFFtnkrON1T48Zj8GQZc1nTfNxAOwxEszniwEQYAOHiklFFBAlYh5ETxJKPytWArwgJrzbRxXWs5qKBsuUq4fWDj0lRt-ka48LVGNUZ8JGsuvlCHvAT40WnGxEAmhKnhhZ5jtlTdxfQEilJNdZ_6pKJ93WRskMUhzZOp5h1RS_mxZUPp5Sj6YSadZ8vixynT-WYEknZF5TQk4_ajgM_P3HMnuIbv_QW69EUAMa382q9L0DfPs_83DoBfAkS6rOa1Dhal0gLUOZBdGRMOdU2a_nByyvmTZUajlmV1H0QRqxscB3WE0jxDtm3jnygn2Z73wQxxgsQEVQb-oxJeMWxVJeQyCIVJluuoO66du6yTSrBBAkiCg4RVC7_jN5Se5m-j-VdTYmV4P6xUbpexcRkLdu7IPAeS0GfxEXmzUZ6wUfVGA_yOFANDzgKMhHrYGiVwfgVFv2OIYspujRpvj2gye0gE97SONcth-2iYSLqVyHw/4hy/uMLB2vvnR0-AZ62_wB4Tsg/h5/h001.nqfLm0UFqRjAzapct10dS0bPPLBAGGchPdM0KHD9OEg)
**🗳️ _Upcoming elections:_ Democrats work to build progressive power **
State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, July 6th, 2025. | | | | | | 🔦 Georgia: DLCC Announces new Spotlight candidate The DLCC is proud to stand with Spotlight Candidate Debra Shigley as she prepares for the Georgia Senate special election on August 26th. Shigley is a small business owner and a mother who is deeply embedded in her community. She has what it takes to stand against GOP extremism and fight for hardworking Georgians. 👀 Court Watch: SCOTUS allows red states to deny Medicaid patients access to Planned Parenthood Early this week, the Supreme Court ruled that states can deny Medicaid patients coverage for basic health services provided through Planned Parenthood. Republicans are hellbent on weaponizing anti-abortion extremism to deny low-income Americans choices around basic health care. 📖 Read: A Message to Democrats: Follow the State Leaders Courier published an op-ed from DLCC President Heather Williams on how Democrats should be watching and learning from state legislative leaders who are winning and overperforming in elections. 🛡️ You’re Invited: Down Ballot Defenders Summit Team DLCC is hosting our first-ever virtual Down Ballot Defenders Summit on July 9th. DLCC President Heather Williams and state legislators from around the country will be answering your questions and firing up supporters for the fight ahead. 🫏 Join our movement: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. | | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cc70d4c0d11c4ffd8da7bdc41fc2bccf&_e=LEa-03Qnf1Esm-krsJ-86FV8ijawevttzz0S6ma0SmGZUsjFFYxuZJ9Ih2pdvEGKXmCmPfGI83eeyYwoVfYYUA0dnjbs1o4_jlPBgNMpSa7MuujjzmMLkrr3JEyL7o-Gxi2Wr-LXMFdLIIVRF59D2J_mVMpOdX9Q32E1SFMI7OMpM0yGQAsuNJL0aPiscCqvfvwJ4anrH6swn7JxLLw8d6tgogBoewLMFPLgYM1Mp0wld1g0Uc3RCkaJRozmzSTBADwNMyWKVlYBt1sIvhVb1egIVlv9bQ6jaZTgBC-ebYLixzaSNbJOMeTOhSCH1W0uHCE4iTN7uMqoz7JroDhEJ-3wgXNd6P-xcf_-RBTcms8ud94px_Dk17B4Dxbv5l9dvlejNUFdI8c_9nD9y1gfTwtlxolnpRQsuJvQwribRWmewqS3mlZdB1TBcIZPkknTQoQ5MTEBGlOAAGPkwoUlG0ZteCaXCNvNGKaVxYaXnE4JwfGPFAcq2KmMfWJuEm5btCijQqmZCNdCq9yJ2_jT-WfAcY91Oht89U3CotjiKchWMFGQCTnKTBKAIZjThZdB74oQsGuQDbk5HmK3bsrPOyDKuQFmi0ooDKo0FPxS_AE%3D)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
**Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:**
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
**As a senior how do you feel about their findings?** _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. clean_body: Correcting the Narrative on Transgender Radicalism| | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?_Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

| | Patriot, I was on the ground in Los Angeles—glass shattering overhead, people struck by debris, American flags burning, and police under attack. I felt a sense of menace and lawlessness. I couldn’t contain my frustration. **You don’t see these scenes in other states.** This didn’t happen by accident, it was by design. This is the result of fifteen years of one-party Democratic rule, creating an upside-down morality where those who do the wrong thing are rewarded while people who do the right thing are punished. Governor Newsom, Mayor Bass, and the local officials in Los Angeles have failed us. They let rioters run rampant while law-abiding Californians suffer. But there is hope. Californians want violent criminals removed from their communities, and they don’t want a government that allows riots. If we are ever going to win back California, it’s now while this is fresh in everyone’s minds. I’m running for governor to restore law and order, back our police, and make California golden again. But I can’t do it alone. I’m all in. Are you? **Here is how _you_ can help right now:**

| Loving Virginia's 5th Congressional District and my Team!
FYI: Team McGuire is working diligently to resolve your issues related to the IRS, Social Security, VA, and other federal casework.
Team McGuire has returned
$2,604,425.44
back in to the pockets of constituents in VA-05. Not too shaby for the first 6 months!
We are working with President Trump, Speaker Johnson, and the rest of our Republican Conference to Make America Great Again For All Americans!
FYI: The House Armed Services Committee is working on the NDAA Markup. We hope to get a bill through our committee by the end of July.
The following is some of what I've been up to and what is on my mind:

| The Golden Age; the constant fear mongering from the left isn't working. Even Democrats have to admit it, President Trump and the Republican Party really are Making America Great Again!
After celebrating America's 249th birthday at the incredible Scottsville 4th of July Parade, Tracy and I headed to Washington, D.C. to finish the mission in a big way: witnessing President Donald J. Trump sign the One Big Beautiful Bill into law.
This Independence Day was a powerful celebration of patriotism and love for our country. The B-2 bomber flyover, accompanied by F-35 and F-22 fighters over the White House, was a striking display of American military strength, and a clear reminder of why peace through strength is essential to protecting the nation we hold dear. We were honored to stay and watch the fireworks from the White House alongside President Trump, First Lady Melania, and patriotic Americans from across the country. It was an unforgettable night. Tracy and I made the drive back to the district late Friday night, and I'm already looking forward to seeing many of you again soon. It remains the highest honor of my life to represent the incredible people of Virginia's 5th Congressional District.
---

| Medicaid Work Requirements Ok
---
| |
---
| During the Biden administration, there was a huge rise in child sex trafficking, with estimates suggesting as many as 500,000 children affected due to open borders, lax law enforcement, and more. Despite this alarming statistic, Democrats continue to focus on fearmongering over modest reforms proposed in the One Big Beautiful Bill, particularly changes to Medicaid.
Let's be clear: Republicans are not trying to "kick people off" anything. We are simply advocating for reasonable requirements, up to 20 hours a week of work, volunteerism, or education, for able-bodied adults without dependents to remain eligible for Medicaid and SNAP. This is far less demanding than the 30-hour work requirement signed into law under President Clinton.
Those who are able to work or study should contribute in some form. That's not cruelty; it's common sense. Moreover, taxpayer-funded benefits like Medicaid should never have been extended to illegal immigrants. That money should go to American citizens who play by the rules and need a helping hand, not to those who broke our laws to enter this country.
Democrats don't have a problem with lying. | Pam Bondi, "What You Voted For"
---
| |
---
| Huge win for our country! From the moment President Trump was re-elected, activist judges have worked overtime to block the will of the American people by stretching the limits of their judicial power. But that era is coming to a close.
In a landmark ruling, the Supreme Court struck down the widespread abuse of nationwide injunctions, an extraordinary rebuke to the practice of low-level judges issuing sweeping orders to halt presidential policies nationwide. This is a monumental win for the Constitution, the separation of powers, and the integrity of the presidency.
During President Trump's second term, 40 nationwide injunctions were filed against his executive actions, 35 of them originating from just five deep-blue jurisdictions: California, Maryland, Massachusetts, Washington, and the District of Columbia. These legal roadblocks were less about law and more about ideology, calculated efforts to stall an agenda that the American people decisively voted for.
Now, the Trump Administration can move forward decisively on critical policies to safeguard the nation, such as ending birthright citizenship, cutting funding to sanctuary cities, suspending refugee resettlement, freezing wasteful government spending, halting taxpayer-funded gender surgeries, and more.
The Supreme Court's common-sense decision was widely recognized as a pivotal moment: President Trump: "The Supreme Court has delivered a monumental victory for the Constitution, the separation of powers, and the RULE OF LAW in striking down the excessive use of nationwide injunctions ... A handful of radical left judges tried to override the will of the American people. That was a grave threat to democracy." Attorney General Pam Bondi: "Americans are finally getting what they voted for. No longer will rogue judges strike down President Trump's policies across the entire nation."

clean_body: | | | | God Bless America! | | | == | == | Update July 6, 2025 | Loving Virginia's 5th Congressional District and my Team! FYI: Team McGuire is working diligently to resolve your issues related to the IRS, Social Security, VA, and other federal casework. Team McGuire has returned $2,604,425.44 back in to the pockets of constituents in VA-05. Not too shaby for the first 6 months! We are working with President Trump, Speaker Johnson, and the rest of our Republican Conference to Make America Great Again For All Americans! FYI: The House Armed Services Committee is working on the NDAA Markup. We hope to get a bill through our committee by the end of July. The following is some of what I've been up to and what is on my mind: | Trump Signs Big Beautiful Bill | | | | | | | Peace Through Strength | | | | | | My wife Tracy and Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt | | | | | | | | | | | The Golden Age; the constant fear mongering from the left isn't working. Even Democrats have to admit it, President Trump and the Republican Party really are Making America Great Again! After celebrating America's 249th birthday at the incredible Scottsville 4th of July Parade, Tracy and I headed to Washington, D.C. to finish the mission in a big way: witnessing President Donald J. Trump sign the One Big Beautiful Bill into law. This Independence Day was a powerful celebration of patriotism and love for our country. The B-2 bomber flyover, accompanied by F-35 and F-22 fighters over the White House, was a striking display of American military strength, and a clear reminder of why peace through strength is essential to protecting the nation we hold dear. We were honored to stay and watch the fireworks from the White House alongside President Trump, First Lady Melania, and patriotic Americans from across the country. It was an unforgettable night. Tracy and I made the drive back to the district late Friday night, and I'm already looking forward to seeing many of you again soon. It remains the highest honor of my life to represent the incredible people of Virginia's 5th Congressional District. | Speaker Mike Johnson's Epic Floor Speech | | == | Watch Speaker Mike Johnson deliver what I believe is his best speech on this bill so far. == | One Big Beautiful Bill Debate | | == | Promises made, Promises kept, it was an honor to be part of debate on this historic moment for the American people, One Big Beautiful Bill! == | Team Winsome for Governor HQ | | | Welcome Home Seth | | == Thanks to everyone who helped us help the second young man from our district over a two week period, Seth get home from Israel during the ballistic missile attacks from Iran and thanks to the 249,564 voters who sent me to DC so my team and I can help others. Grateful for you all. God Bless America! == | The One Big Beautiful Bill Act | | | President Trump, and House and Senate Republicans Delivered for the American People. We proudly passed the One Big Beautiful Bill Act to: ✅ Prevent the largest tax increase in American history ✅ Lower costs for families and businesses ✅ Secure the Southern Border ✅ Unleash American energy dominance ✅ Strengthen Medicaid ✅ Invest in a stronger National Defense Republicans have the winning message and policies to lead our country toward a safer, stronger, and more prosperous future. | Appomattox Sheriff Visits White House | | | | | | | Our Appomattox County, Sheriff, Robby Richardson, and his wife Taylor joined Tracy and me at the White House for the annual congressional picnic. Thank you to all of our men and women in law-enforcement for all you do to keep us safe. God bless America! | Endorsement Alert, Tara Durant | | | My friend Tara Durant has my full endorsement for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. As a Navy SEAL and someone who has had the privilege of working alongside her in the General Assembly, I can personally vouch for Tara's toughness, integrity, and unwavering commitment to defending our nation's core principles. I'm asking conservatives across VA-07 to join us in this fight. Please visit TaraDurant.com to sign up to help her campaign, donate, and learn more her great candidacy. | Medicaid Work Requirements Ok | | | During the Biden administration, there was a huge rise in child sex trafficking, with estimates suggesting as many as 500,000 children affected due to open borders, lax law enforcement, and more. Despite this alarming statistic, Democrats continue to focus on fearmongering over modest reforms proposed in the One Big Beautiful Bill, particularly changes to Medicaid. Let's be clear: Republicans are not trying to "kick people off" anything. We are simply advocating for reasonable requirements, up to 20 hours a week of work, volunteerism, or education, for able-bodied adults without dependents to remain eligible for Medicaid and SNAP. This is far less demanding than the 30-hour work requirement signed into law under President Clinton. Those who are able to work or study should contribute in some form. That's not cruelty; it's common sense. Moreover, taxpayer-funded benefits like Medicaid should never have been extended to illegal immigrants. That money should go to American citizens who play by the rules and need a helping hand, not to those who broke our laws to enter this country. Democrats don't have a problem with lying. For the facts, click link to watch my friend explain the purpose of the Medicaid changes in the One Big Beautiful Bill. Currently Medicaid is insolvent because many people are gaming the system. "We cannot afford to help people keep ripping off American tax payers". == | Winsome Sears Signs Up In All VA-05 Counties | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks to many volunteers including several elected officials like ==, Senator Luther Cifers, Delegate Wendell Walker, Delegate Buddy Fowler, Delegate Tommy Wright, Delegate David Owens, Sheriff Darrell Hodges, CA Wendy Hannah, Supervisor Sue Dibble, several GOP Chairs, and others for helping us put Winsome Earle Sears for Governor signs in all 24 counties of Virginia's 5th Congressional District. | A Historic Message From POTUS | | Central Virginia Criminal Justice Academy Graduation | | | | | | Thank you to our men and women in law enforcement for keeping us safe! | AG Jason Miyares Event | | | Two outstanding former colleagues of mine from the Virginia House of Delegates, now AG ==, have proven themselves to be incredibly effective public leaders. I strongly encourage you to support both of these proven leaders for re-election this November! | | My friend, Delegate Scott Wyatt, is a proven leader and he is up for re-election this November. | | My friend, Delegate AC Cordoza, is a proven leader and he is also up for re-election this November. | | | Tracy and I had a fantastic time at an event with our friends == and Chris LaCivita. Jason is doing an outstanding job keeping Virginians safe, and his leadership as Attorney General has never been more important. Please join us in supporting his re-election, spread the word and help keep Jason Miyares working for Virginia! | A Bill Maher Message To "Woke" Kids | | | Is Bill Maher right or wrong about Sharia Law in this video? == | WLNI The Morningline Lynchburg | | | We spoke about the Israel/ Iran Conflict with Mari and Brian on The Morningline. Trump's bombing of Iran was so successful, all the fake news outlets had to come out and pretend fourteen 30,000 pound bunker busters bombs did no damage. == | Pam Bondi, "What You Voted For" | | | Huge win for our country! From the moment President Trump was re-elected, activist judges have worked overtime to block the will of the American people by stretching the limits of their judicial power. But that era is coming to a close. In a landmark ruling, the Supreme Court struck down the widespread abuse of nationwide injunctions, an extraordinary rebuke to the practice of low-level judges issuing sweeping orders to halt presidential policies nationwide. This is a monumental win for the Constitution, the separation of powers, and the integrity of the presidency. During President Trump's second term, 40 nationwide injunctions were filed against his executive actions, 35 of them originating from just five deep-blue jurisdictions: California, Maryland, Massachusetts, Washington, and the District of Columbia. These legal roadblocks were less about law and more about ideology, calculated efforts to stall an agenda that the American people decisively voted for. Now, the Trump Administration can move forward decisively on critical policies to safeguard the nation, such as ending birthright citizenship, cutting funding to sanctuary cities, suspending refugee resettlement, freezing wasteful government spending, halting taxpayer-funded gender surgeries, and more. The Supreme Court's common-sense decision was widely recognized as a pivotal moment: President Trump: "The Supreme Court has delivered a monumental victory for the Constitution, the separation of powers, and the RULE OF LAW in striking down the excessive use of nationwide injunctions ... A handful of radical left judges tried to override the will of the American people. That was a grave threat to democracy." Attorney General Pam Bondi: "Americans are finally getting what they voted for. No longer will rogue judges strike down President Trump's policies across the entire nation." == | | | Cumberland County, Virginia | | Had a great time meeting some truly wonderful folks in Cumberland County, Virginia. They were well-informed about the One Big Beautiful Bill and why it matters so much for our future. We can't afford to let a radical leftist like Abigail Spanberger take the governor's office. Please encourage your friends to vote Republican this November, especially == for governor! HUD is moving to VIRGINIA | | HUD is moving to VIRGINIA. This is a BIG win for Virginia and America thanks to President Donald J. Trump and == ==. | Winning For America! | | | Trump is Winning for all Americans! -Iran's Nukes Obliterated -Israel-Iran Ceasefire -NATO Agrees to 5% GDP Defense Spend -S&P & Nasdaq Hit Highs -Low Gas Prices -SCOTUS Ends Nationwide Injunctions -SCOTUS Lets Parents Opt Kids Out Of LGBTQ Books In Schools -Younger Voters Joining MAGA -President Trump Signed the One Big Beautiful Bill into law | Congratulations Stewart Whitson For Congress VA-11 | | Congratulations to fellow veteran Stewart Whitson on his well-earned victory in the VA-11 Republican primary. Stewart is an Army combat veteran, former FBI Special Agent, devoted husband, and proud father of five. His dedication to service, both in uniform and in his community, makes him the strong, principled leader we need in Congress. We are excited to support him on the road to victory this September 9. Learn more, volunteer, or donate at == Please spread the word and share with friends and family. | Recent Inters, Click Individual Images to Watch | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | == | Make America Safe Again | | Trump visited "Alligator Alcatraz" detention center. The security is amazing, natural and otherwise. Make America Safe Again! | | | | | | | A Pro Growth Bill | | | Nobody wants to talk about GROWTH, which will be the primary reason that the Big, Beautiful Bill will be one of the most successful pieces of legislation ever passed. THIS GROWTH has already begun at levels never seen before. Trillions of Dollars are now being invested into the USA, more than ever before. Likewise, hundreds of Billions of Dollars in Tariffs are filling up the coffers of Treasury. The Tariff money has already arrived and is setting new records! We are growing our way out of the Sleepy Joe Biden MESS that he and the Democrats left us, and it is happening much faster than anyone thought possible. Our Country will make a fortune this year, more than any of our competitors, but only if the Big, Beautiful Bill is PASSED! As they say, Trump's been right about everything, and this is the easiest of them all to predict. Republicans, don't let the Radical Left Democrats push you around. We've got all the cards, and we are going to use them. Last year America was a "DEAD" Nation, with no hope for the future, and now it's the "HOTTEST NATION IN THE WORLD!" MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | A victory for Women, Justice | | == | A victory for women, justice: == | Scottsville 4th Of July Parade | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Rep. Wesley Hunt Talks Jan 6 Hoax | | == | Democrats are still crying about January 6th four years later, but turn a blind eye to their own "Summer of Love" and the LA riots burning down cities in real time. I've fought in real wars. I know what an insurrection looks like. January 6th wasn't it. It's time Republicans stop being weak on this issue and call it what it is, and that's certainly NOT an insurrection. Here's the truth: the left has weaponized political violence for decades because they can't win at the ballot box. And now they're doing it again--right in front of our eyes. Full stop. -Rep Wesley Hunt == | Thank You, America First Endorsement Alert! | | | I am honored to be the first Republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election in 2026 and proud to continue standing with him in support of the America First Agenda. | John McGuire is the 1st Goochland, VA Congressman | Join Winsome Earle Sears July 12 | Thank you for your continued support. Together, we'll take our country back. We are praying for Texas and those impacted by the flooding. Take care, please tell a friend, and I look forward to seeing you around the district! == | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America First The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |

# [Demand Trump reverse his devastating and deadly cuts to the National Weather Service](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta89569d0-480b-46e0-bab8-7eeb5b6610b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taad79714-84b1-4023-b7e5-a8a1b889add3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | When Donald Trump and the DOGE team made massive and completely irrational cuts to the National Weather Service, experts across the political spectrum warned that this would devastate its ability to predict severe weather and warn of impending disasters. [And now we're seeing the results:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bcab77e-82c9-454e-9e9d-bb3091957434/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Officials in Texas are casting blame on the National Weather Service (NWS) for failing to forecast catastrophic flooding that has killed 24 people. NWS was among the government agencies targeted by the Trump administration in its effort to gut the federal bureaucracy, losing approximately 600 staffers. After the cuts, the agency—which was already understaffed—began to prepare to offer "degraded" forecasting services, facing "severe shortages" of meteorologists, according to an internal document obtained by The New York Times in April ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39b01a49-14ef-46a8-bdb7-7fd723f0a4e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))._ These cuts left our fellow Americans without warning or protection, and we've seen the deadly results. It's time to take action before the next disaster strikes. [**Add your name: Demand Trump reverse his devastating and deadly cuts to the National Weather Service**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad76687f-b7a4-4d94-af50-4699aa6132ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
These far-right A-holes are obsessed with making despicable attacks against Ilhan because they hate everything she represents.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1700%2E791427%2EG_pQEJ)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250706-1-180&t=2&akid=1700%2E791427%2EG_pQEJ)
**First:** Elon Musk tweeted to his 200 million followers on Twitter that Ilhan is a “major grifter” who “hates America”, putting a MAGA target on her back.
**Then:** Republican Rep. Brandon Gill sent around a petition to his supporters, asking them to sign on to deport Ilhan out of the country.
**Now:** This week, Republican Senator Tommy Tuberville sent an email asking people to help him “raise enough money to buy Ilhan Omar a one-way ticket from Minnesota to Somalia.”
Friend — These far-right A-holes are obsessed with making despicable attacks against Ilhan because they hate everything she represents.
They want a country with less diversity and literal walls to keep people out. Ilhan represents the American dream and the melting pot that makes America great.
They want to funnel more money and handouts to the mega-rich. Ilhan wants to lift up the working class and ensure everyone can prosper.
They want to push a far-right Christian Nationalist agenda on the American people. Ilhan fights for an open society where everyone is free to be themselves no matter their race, religion, age, sex, or sexual orientation.
This isn’t the first time Ilhan has been attacked like this and it certainly won’t be the last. We are asking for your help to counter this racist nonsense by making our campaign and our movement stronger than ever with a huge wave of donations today.
[**Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today to send a message that thousands of grassroots supporters have Ilhan’s back as she takes on the far-right. I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, [“Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,”](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c64d6a7319424dc0a31f2df3358715fa&_e=ZzpdmCeraCKjCmYtQUOYgVy4FxIRlwunqTfEOLryiAxgBc1n0-L0Ubrw8umnDuNIgm_IMqSlbdmSJrS0njFT97FXAt-3AcNh2NxUcOG4TTfN_gmfV1Bpr3a3DUeFv7fxqDl1wAFWiR0AQcyjR7aG_qm3VyIdnRfeGLCkhUYgF1nwx7AiQsl4n6qDotYZ-PoVlpevoUCC5B9jIlIvQorrwDjd3nz1YjeUTxg97ieyDkMnTtHojCWQ4D_6-5Bz5eWZJ7-U-TY7GDZYkrNFNlfwLoCsuBb75m2uzy2vRmKQETOCfZ2UBHPsIwtsm-Zetjg_--LwGGilR2bW8kcg39Oih7WR09q7amPILaFOOtEHvjQCIspwoPrKTPnJvY_wGXiustaDRp7WdSlbfPszT-hoEtTXsnvf8mwTJ3gMl3K7FMhZ84eE6gI7CAGpLwrCC10n4GfY8N21c0IHreR1FKBqSbKQh_T7gnUFYlc-jap9OriQ4I1bLqKsGmJ4V0kCZt8xgNKxTKRe6hRRPjYuXTU0F3IT64X56G-i0dTp_rDr55IRlg_s_yDlL_eJ7idmSAkKwthIHRnxUIbzaxRyR68HHAbvspRuuvjEY5AhMwrPD-lDTtVQToonagMFgUurJ3vuTHbmvzmNRpsx4XJB75yd_YEN_sqHn0C-xbIZ3YUTFxcXA_24GZhvhZNm23W_Y07CCK6h4XCAo1KcwnKTBFEDBe2qbOYCKRXKjMULAqZLissrBPIfby_r-FPVdwYzKnK1uypDl6D2E07U0MMbxeqWTkdRmP-AqkL1Y392U7Hs0Ik%3D) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

It’s a scary moment right now, Peter. We are watching in real time as Trump and MAGA Republicans’ authoritarian playbook unfolds step by step. It’s impossible to ignore. Silencing opposing voices. Crushing dissent. And it fits into the GOP’s long track record of artificially manipulating maps to make it seem like they have more support than they actually do — entrenching their unfair advantage into legislatures and Congress. Make no mistake: **This is an ongoing attempt to destroy our democracy.** We cannot sit by while Republicans work to consolidate power and build their artificial political advantage in state after state. There’s simply no choice but to fight back. **[So I am asking you to make a donation right now that will help make sure we can fight — and win — in critical redistricting battles in places like Ohio, Texas, and states nationwide. body:
Jen Psaki had me on her show to talk about the DOJ leader who asked me to drop the corruption charges against Eric Adams on Donald Trump’s behalf.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91231?refcode=em20250706-9088&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9088%2E614464%2EsK3pB8)
Peter, did you see my interview with Jen Psaki? ⬆️
Jen Psaki had me on her show to talk about Emil Bove, the DOJ leader who asked me to drop the corruption charges against Eric Adams on Donald Trump’s behalf.
Recently, Bove had to answer to the claims I made in my resignation letter from the DOJ in front of the U.S. Senate.
And I have no doubt that he was sweating bullets. Because I know the truth: the Trump administration asked me to ignore the law — and I said no.
Any denial of that claim is a lie.
I’m running for Congress because Democrats are in desperate need of leaders who will stand up to Donald Trump, not bend the knee like my MAGA opponent has done time after time.
I’ve stood up to Trump before, and I’d do it a thousand times more.
**[If you’re with me, please split $10 between Heartland Patriots and my campaign today. We’ve set some ambitious fundraising goals to start this campaign on the right foot, and I need your help to stay on track.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91231?refcode=em20250706-9088&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9088%2E614464%2EsK3pB8)**

clean_body: Jen Psaki had me on her show to talk about the DOJ leader who asked me to drop the corruption charges against Eric Adams on Donald Trump’s behalf. Peter, did you see my interview with Jen Psaki? ⬆️ Jen Psaki had me on her show to talk about Emil Bove, the DOJ leader who asked me to drop the corruption charges against Eric Adams on Donald Trump’s behalf. Recently, Bove had to answer to the claims I made in my resignation letter from the DOJ in front of the U.S. Senate. And I have no doubt that he was sweating bullets. Because I know the truth: the Trump administration asked me to ignore the law — and I said no. Any denial of that claim is a lie. I’m running for Congress because Democrats are in desperate need of leaders who will stand up to Donald Trump, not bend the knee like my MAGA opponent has done time after time. I’ve stood up to Trump before, and I’d do it a thousand times more. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you. Ryan Crosswell | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.
