Peter, I have to be 100% honest with you.

**The summer months have been incredibly difficult for fundraising.** Many grassroots donors like you spend more time with family, and unplug from reading emails like these — and I don’t blame you.

But while candidates who call on donors for their campaign cash have no trouble sustaining fundraising through this time, **candidates who don’t do “call time” – _like me_ – have a tougher time.**

I won’t compromise the integrity of our campaign by becoming beholden to mega-donors, _but we have to work _twice as hard_ to keep up right now._

[That’s why I need you, Peter. We can’t stay competitive in our fight for everything from affordable housing to Social Security (and more!) without the help of grassroots supporters like you. Can I count on your donation today to get us back on track and help protect my seat, flip the House, and defeat MAGA extremism? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110983657/555840742/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTA1NzVhZC03NTVhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CdLBPqxsfVJQzU50Q-arioXcqm1RZxNPwGh0NaoXyxI=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110983665/555840790/-721819307?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250706_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTA1NzVhZC03NTVhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CdLBPqxsfVJQzU50Q-arioXcqm1RZxNPwGh0NaoXyxI=)**

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

First Lady Melania Trump **[visited Children's National Hospital in Washington, D.C.](https://substack.com/redirect/896cbcfc-4df8-4d8c-b26b-a436344935aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Thursday as part of her "Be Best" initiative, joining young patients battling cancer, kidney, and heart conditions for patriotic arts and crafts activities ahead of Independence Day.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e109c1ed-beb9-4bb6-95b0-2a8dd68b07ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e109c1ed-beb9-4bb6-95b0-2a8dd68b07ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump distributed gifts to the children** including teddy bears, puzzles, books, and "Be Best" temporary tattoos, with staff noting how the kids "lit up" when discussing their favorite sports and music with the first lady.
* **The visit included unveiling a new "Eternal Flame" hybrid tea rose** sourced from the White House gardens in the Bunny Mellon Healing Garden, where children placed rocks, pinwheels, and American flags among the plants with Trump's help.
* **Trump made personal visits to individual patients** , including meeting a three-month-old baby who has undergone five surgeries since birth along with his military family, and visiting a recently admitted teenage boy and his family in the heart and kidney unit.

# Texas flood death toll increases, 3 killed campers identified
At least **[43 people died and 27 young girls remained missing](https://substack.com/redirect/f4e2ea80-e45b-4c57-8749-fbe4e05fadbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Saturday after devastating floods swept through a Texas summer camp, with the Guadalupe River rising nearly 30 feet in 45 minutes and destroying Camp Mystic where 750 attendees were staying.
* **The Guadalupe River rose nearly 30 feet in just 45 minutes** on Friday morning due to heavy rains, with younger campers housed along the riverbanks being hit first while those on higher ground were evacuated by helicopter as the camp was "completely destroyed."
* **Massive rescue operations are underway** with over 1,300 state responders, 800+ vehicles, National Guard deployment, and Coast Guard assistance that has saved or helped save 223 lives, while more than 850 people have been evacuated including 167 by helicopter.
* **Federal and state emergency declarations have been issued** for 15 counties, with President Trump and Vice President Vance expressing condolences, while families desperately wait at reunification centers and authorities pledge to search until every missing person is found.

* * *
**Together With Strand**

# Elon Musk launches new "America Party" to oppose Trump
Elon Musk announced Saturday he's **[launching a new "America Party"](https://substack.com/redirect/7f223728-a68b-4b86-a8dd-bfd0cfde8caf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after conducting an online poll where 65.4% of his 1.2 million voting followers supported creating an alternative to the current two-party system, citing concerns about government waste and deficit spending.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7f223728-a68b-4b86-a8dd-bfd0cfde8caf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The announcement escalates Musk's ongoing feud with President Trump** , stemming from Musk's opposition to the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act" which he called a "pork-filled" and "disgusting abomination" that could add $3.9 trillion to the deficit over the next decade.
* **Musk's political shift marks a dramatic reversal** from his previous support, having spent hundreds of millions helping Trump get re-elected and leading the administration's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) cost-cutting initiative before turning against Trump's legislative agenda.
* **The conflict has potential political ramifications** , with Trump threatening to cut billions in federal subsidies to Musk's companies and Republicans worried that the Musk-Trump feud could damage their chances of maintaining their congressional majority in the 2026 midterm elections.

* * *
# Officer shot in neck outside Texas ICE facility, suspects in custody: report
A Texas police officer **[was shot in the neck](https://substack.com/redirect/c25f07c6-80e7-4e38-8559-fc9c002f00d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Thursday night during what authorities described as a coordinated attack outside the Prairieland ICE Detention Facility in Alvarado, with the officer being airlifted to a hospital, treated, and later released.
* **Multiple armed suspects allegedly orchestrated an ambush** , with more than a dozen masked individuals in black reportedly vandalizing vehicles and surveillance equipment, then launching fireworks to draw law enforcement into a trap before opening fire.
* **Eight suspects were arrested after attempting to flee** , with some reportedly wearing body armor, while law enforcement from Alvarado Police Department and Johnson County Sheriff's Office responded to apprehend the attackers whose motive remains under investigation.
* **The Department of Justice is closely monitoring the incident** along with similar attacks in Portland, Oregon, with Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche stating the department has "zero tolerance for assaults on federal officers or property" and will pursue full prosecution.

Watch what happens when Melania walks in the room... | | | Jul 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | First Lady Melania Trump on Thursday as part of her "Be Best" initiative, joining young patients battling cancer, kidney, and heart conditions for patriotic arts and crafts activities ahead of Independence Day. Trump distributed gifts to the children including teddy bears, puzzles, books, and "Be Best" temporary tattoos, with staff noting how the kids "lit up" when discussing their favorite sports and music with the first lady. The visit included unveiling a new "Eternal Flame" hybrid tea rose sourced from the White House gardens in the Bunny Mellon Healing Garden, where children placed rocks, pinwheels, and American flags among the plants with Trump's help. Trump made personal visits to individual patients , including meeting a three-month-old baby who has undergone five surgeries since birth along with his military family, and visiting a recently admitted teenage boy and his family in the heart and kidney unit. | | POLL Is Melania the best First Lady of the 21st century? | ? ? ? Texas flood death toll increases, 3 killed campers identified At least Saturday after devastating floods swept through a Texas summer camp, with the Guadalupe River rising nearly 30 feet in 45 minutes and destroying Camp Mystic where 750 attendees were staying. The Guadalupe River rose nearly 30 feet in just 45 minutes on Friday morning due to heavy rains, with younger campers housed along the riverbanks being hit first while those on higher ground were evacuated by helicopter as the camp was "completely destroyed." Massive rescue operations are underway with over 1,300 state responders, 800+ vehicles, National Guard deployment, and Coast Guard assistance that has saved or helped save 223 lives, while more than 850 people have been evacuated including 167 by helicopter. Federal and state emergency declarations have been issued for 15 counties, with President Trump and Vice President Vance expressing condolences, while families desperately wait at reunification centers and authorities pledge to search until every missing person is found. By pressing this knee pressure point for exactly 10 seconds... You can dramatically improve bowel movement... So you can go instantly, no matter how constipated you are! But only a few people know where this tricky pressure point is exactly located... to see where this pressure point is and how easy it is to get rid of digestive problems! | | ---|---|--- Elon Musk launches new "America Party" to oppose Trump Elon Musk announced Saturday he's after conducting an online poll where 65.4% of his 1.2 million voting followers supported creating an alternative to the current two-party system, citing concerns about government waste and deficit spending. | | ---|---|--- The announcement escalates Musk's ongoing feud with President Trump , stemming from Musk's opposition to the "One Big Beautiful Bill Act" which he called a "pork-filled" and "disgusting abomination" that could add $3.9 trillion to the deficit over the next decade. Musk's political shift marks a dramatic reversal from his previous support, having spent hundreds of millions helping Trump get re-elected and leading the administration's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) cost-cutting initiative before turning against Trump's legislative agenda. The conflict has potential political ramifications , with Trump threatening to cut billions in federal subsidies to Musk's companies and Republicans worried that the Musk-Trump feud could damage their chances of maintaining their congressional majority in the 2026 midterm elections. Officer shot in neck outside Texas ICE facility, suspects in custody: report A Texas police officer Thursday night during what authorities described as a coordinated attack outside the Prairieland ICE Detention Facility in Alvarado, with the officer being airlifted to a hospital, treated, and later released. Multiple armed suspects allegedly orchestrated an ambush , with more than a dozen masked individuals in black reportedly vandalizing vehicles and surveillance equipment, then launching fireworks to draw law enforcement into a trap before opening fire. Eight suspects were arrested after attempting to flee , with some reportedly wearing body armor, while law enforcement from Alvarado Police Department and Johnson County Sheriff's Office responded to apprehend the attackers whose motive remains under investigation. The Department of Justice is closely monitoring the incident along with similar attacks in Portland, Oregon, with Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche stating the department has "zero tolerance for assaults on federal officers or property" and will pursue full prosecution. | | POLL Did you have a good 4th of July? | ? ? ? ? | |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d87a489cc323446cad900c17e9c86508&_e=HvONskvsU5UnLTrpPfHt-c93SM8YOChZ5m-7JOSgEVgE108Vi0UTtdT_GJArD3Aw-VsIClH94YYHS21DmTiNMsc0R2AZSSTrrp7JqyZGDhBjiw4BzyXUHbM-TfxQCJPgXKqbM620LNTlnQdoOW5ehqgnFRVGJx8ddCqZrU7YjlPdiKIqJdXZJHB0BXQ86fUN-XffQ8jBzz2a5gM3FPUUGB0n02-lKG3Cl0FWuWNIPKRlOw6WtcvIIJAyV0jWgCA_7qwVDfx5V1qmDq44YeUGAR4RTeiLO6-LCZEs1iuf_o4yzpeJd4jQEUFXwWqEPEIVm-_neqk5DMFYUvN4uFuiSXcjQO6WayeSV7oOumYup4R3aD9qOA5m2_GV8l9oyQz7ug0_Cnnjw6EsoZInxZpIGd1tmxI7RHF6oVY7FtzJT-DpT0kDxZShzdwO4s5BB7b6LVL5PWxGQFITINcFKGrLop5sZlh6xrZnSA_DLVWEt7zXLZNYwfEdnjouOWaJNYDsK9J3xcNfXwEJ6oxwQjQCWpeI9Q7PXSQtHtg_Uqmifz2uZMBZ0HAgX9SJD-8rvYu2EJkiRvpdmdsnl6haf89jKG5hC-eHcszHDKZ1G-V2Rn5TaRsfW1_blU7FXCYMiGpCh5sizz2JNsZBx8KMi47AngtUMUS4SOlsBplF3tjl6Z-6rZwO_AF9vWWnhmcxmy7b-inTrV-QSFxZLWxxLKfmnQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d87a489cc323446cad900c17e9c86508&_e=HvONskvsU5UnLTrpPfHt-c93SM8YOChZ5m-7JOSgEVgE108Vi0UTtdT_GJArD3Aw-VsIClH94YYHS21DmTiNMsc0R2AZSSTrrp7JqyZGDhBjiw4BzyXUHbM-TfxQCJPgXKqbM620LNTlnQdoOW5ehqgnFRVGJx8ddCqZrU7YjlPdiKIqJdXZJHB0BXQ86fUN-XffQ8jBzz2a5gM3FPUUGB0n02-lKG3Cl0FWuWNIPKRlOw6WtcvIIJAyV0jWgCA_4atlfvs8pVD35J3bKkjLtgGsXtg6Kcrr2rXlLSRckXBG27UpCZjp0vJHJpse2B6wmjkGEYXO0gGuhc8H0Xc0Hh02BbpIm56T3BHDJalF2y001VGX4XlkxqvEXuit1Gs4DTgf4UENvvo5rsC2xWx6i2lIqlEnTUisayEEP5_y07-E36OiVi7tuhgFwzwlE7HjT7VLPzkOxmgjvMpUdjHI_KR16Z-1F80WkjNKjR4qE9GiLvu45I6xrEolZoM8KhYvJxlhGWHKAkuwdsiZWRGfd46f2EQBgmY7LGz3LVKKwEO3eHAK794H6edCFGMpdmkWkRUebJdyFM07_nF4E-OY7hdsA3QuQi-6bDFxS1y43yW-4USDlxP_S1mkOTtkA6oLEbi9qdAgyrQtZUF-aElYokeaHA6LC2Jy30XMMI7mNqqo3N5KSpQY9z7jUIsL3eLvT5TqmVzNklhvuB_kF2KyPw%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: JanePAC Newsletter
subject: Your July edition of the JanePAC Monthly is here 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
What happened last month? A lot.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110985155/555845050/1328794144?refcode=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZDY0N2UyLTc5NWEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=awCxeKxNUCgQqd9z1HcWNFXsQkZnf7UKjxvdpmDOmLc=&emci=79e33008-7457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
You're reading the July edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_** — and we’re bringing you a new round of major updates you don't want to miss! From Jane taking on Amazon's dangerous labor practices to a huge JanePAC victory in Virginia, last month delivered some serious wins for our movement. We also have some critical updates on Trump's latest attacks on weather forecasting (right as we enter hurricane season), along with some encouraging news about our public lands. Let's dive into everything that went down. 👇
* * *
**📰 JANE IN THE NEWS** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110985156/555845051/-341723466?refcode=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZDY0N2UyLTc5NWEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=awCxeKxNUCgQqd9z1HcWNFXsQkZnf7UKjxvdpmDOmLc=&emci=79e33008-7457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105) Jane Fonda joined _Rosario Dawson, Cynthia Nixon, Sally Field, Lily Tomlin, Chelsea Handler,_ and _Pamela Adlon_ in calling out Amazon for its dangerous treatment of pregnant workers in warehouses across the country. In a letter sent to Amazon's leadership, the actors demanded answers after pregnant workers reported being denied basic accommodations, leading to severe health complications and even miscarriages. **This is exactly the kind of corporate accountability we need more of. When companies put profits over people's health and safety, we have to call them out.** | [**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110985157/555845052/-341723466?refcode=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZDY0N2UyLTc5NWEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=awCxeKxNUCgQqd9z1HcWNFXsQkZnf7UKjxvdpmDOmLc=&emci=79e33008-7457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**🏆 CELEBRATING A MAJOR JANEPAC VICTORY**
In a MASSIVE Democratic primary upset that sent shockwaves through Virginia politics, our endorsed candidate for Attorney General, Jay Jones, defeated a Dominion Energy-backed opponent who accepted an astounding **$800,000** from the state’s largest corporate polluter.
This is a big win for the climate movement — and a clear sign that voters are done letting Big Oil call the shots.
Now, Jay faces his biggest test yet: taking on Republican incumbent Jason Miyares in November's general election. We're ready to support him every step of the way.
* * *
**✊ HOW WE'RE FIGHTING BACK**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110985158/555845053/1486788435?refcode=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZDY0N2UyLTc5NWEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=awCxeKxNUCgQqd9z1HcWNFXsQkZnf7UKjxvdpmDOmLc=&emci=79e33008-7457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
**Republican Senator Mike Lee's proposal to auction off 1.225 million acres of our public lands just got crushed — and it happened because people like you refused to stay silent.** Calls poured in from hikers, conservationists, and everyday people like you who want to protect our planet. Letters flooded Senate offices. The pressure became impossible to ignore.
Lee had no choice but to withdraw his proposal after facing a wall of opposition from his own party. When we unite, even the most powerful politicians have to back down. This is people power in action.
[**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110985159/555845054/1486788435?refcode=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZDY0N2UyLTc5NWEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=awCxeKxNUCgQqd9z1HcWNFXsQkZnf7UKjxvdpmDOmLc=&emci=79e33008-7457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**🌡️ HEAT INDEX TRACKER**
The National Weather Service is warning of dangerous heat conditions across the country. Alaska — _Alaska!_ — just issued its first-ever heat advisory as temperatures soar to unprecedented levels.
As we wrap up the July 4th weekend, please prioritize staying cool and hydrated. Check on elderly neighbors, keep pets indoors during peak heat hours, and never leave anyone in a parked car.
You can monitor the heat index in your area using this **[NYT Heat Index Tracker](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110985160/555845055/-1445986228?refcode=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZDY0N2UyLTc5NWEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=awCxeKxNUCgQqd9z1HcWNFXsQkZnf7UKjxvdpmDOmLc=&emci=79e33008-7457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** to stay informed about conditions where you live.
[**CHECK THE HEAT INDEX IN YOUR AREA**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110985161/555845056/-1445986228?refcode=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkZDY0N2UyLTc5NWEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=awCxeKxNUCgQqd9z1HcWNFXsQkZnf7UKjxvdpmDOmLc=&emci=79e33008-7457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdd647e2-795a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**⚠️ NOAA IS UNDER ATTACK**
Donald Trump is putting every American at risk by dismantling a critical weather forecasting system we rely on during hurricane season.
The Defense Meteorological Satellite Program (DMSP) has supplied essential atmospheric data since the 1960s — data that NOAA uses to feed forecast models. When you see where a hurricane might land, that prediction depends in part on DMSP information. **NOAA will lose access to this vital data stream by July 31, as the United States enters peak hurricane season.**
Trump has already fired hundreds of NOAA employees this year, and according to a recently released budget document, he wants to eliminate ALL NOAA funding, which would close major federally funded meteorological, oceanographic, and climate labs in America — and eliminate hundreds more scientific positions.
**[This couldn’t be more dangerous. clean_body: What happened last month? A lot. | You're reading the July edition of The JanePAC Monthly — and we’re bringing you a new round of major updates you don't want to miss! From Jane taking on Amazon's dangerous labor practices to a huge JanePAC victory in Virginia, last month delivered some serious wins for our movement. We also have some critical updates on Trump's latest attacks on weather forecasting (right as we enter hurricane season), along with some encouraging news about our public lands. Let's dive into everything that went down. 👇 📰 JANE IN THE NEWS Jane Fonda joined Rosario Dawson, Cynthia Nixon, Sally Field, Lily Tomlin, Chelsea Handler, and Pamela Adlon in calling out Amazon for its dangerous treatment of pregnant workers in warehouses across the country. In a letter sent to Amazon's leadership, the actors demanded answers after pregnant workers reported being denied basic accommodations, leading to severe health complications and even miscarriages. This is exactly the kind of corporate accountability we need more of. When companies put profits over people's health and safety, we have to call them out. | 🏆 CELEBRATING A MAJOR JANEPAC VICTORY In a MASSIVE Democratic primary upset that sent shockwaves through Virginia politics, our endorsed candidate for Attorney General, Jay Jones, defeated a Dominion Energy-backed opponent who accepted an astounding $800,000 from the state’s largest corporate polluter. This is a big win for the climate movement — and a clear sign that voters are done letting Big Oil call the shots. Now, Jay faces his biggest test yet: taking on Republican incumbent Jason Miyares in November's general election. We're ready to support him every step of the way. ✊ HOW WE'RE FIGHTING BACK Republican Senator Mike Lee's proposal to auction off 1.225 million acres of our public lands just got crushed — and it happened because people like you refused to stay silent. Calls poured in from hikers, conservationists, and everyday people like you who want to protect our planet. Letters flooded Senate offices. The pressure became impossible to ignore. Lee had no choice but to withdraw his proposal after facing a wall of opposition from his own party. When we unite, even the most powerful politicians have to back down. This is people power in action. 🌡️ HEAT INDEX TRACKER The National Weather Service is warning of dangerous heat conditions across the country. Alaska — Alaska! — just issued its first-ever heat advisory as temperatures soar to unprecedented levels. As we wrap up the July 4th weekend, please prioritize staying cool and hydrated. Check on elderly neighbors, keep pets indoors during peak heat hours, and never leave anyone in a parked car. You can monitor the heat index in your area using this to stay informed about conditions where you live. ⚠️ NOAA IS UNDER ATTACK Donald Trump is putting every American at risk by dismantling a critical weather forecasting system we rely on during hurricane season. The Defense Meteorological Satellite Program (DMSP) has supplied essential atmospheric data since the 1960s — data that NOAA uses to feed forecast models. When you see where a hurricane might land, that prediction depends in part on DMSP information. NOAA will lose access to this vital data stream by July 31, as the United States enters peak hurricane season. Trump has already fired hundreds of NOAA employees this year, and according to a recently released budget document, he wants to eliminate ALL NOAA funding, which would close major federally funded meteorological, oceanographic, and climate labs in America — and eliminate hundreds more scientific positions. That's it for this edition of The JanePAC Monthly. Thank you for being part of this movement. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we're just getting started. – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: Help us stop billionaires from buying our elections
body:
---
Derek, We’re about to ask you to **[donate directly to the DNC today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250706_3867_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3867_22930333_oaaEck&akid=3867%2E22930333%2EoaaEck)** If you give us a moment of your time, we’ll explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: The Trump administration is currently trying to overturn decades of precedent and rewrite longstanding campaign finance laws for their own benefit, just as their grassroots support is drying up across the country. Their actions forced us, along with the DSCC and the DCCC, to take action in response to the Trump administration’s stunning refusal to defend federal law. We filed a motion asking the Supreme Court to allow us to defend the federal election law, which sets limits on coordinated party expenditures against the Republican Party’s challenge. That motion has now been granted. **To put it simply, Trump and his allies are blatantly attempting to let billionaires buy our elections. And we’re going to fight back with every tool at our disposal.** **[But we’ll be honest: Court battles like these are costly, and we rely on supporters like you to help make them possible. If work like this is worth a few dollars to you, we hope you’ll consider making a $3 contribution now to help fund it.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250706_3867_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3867_22930333_oaaEck&akid=3867%2E22930333%2EoaaEck)**

We filed a motion asking the Supreme Court to allow us to defend the federal election law, which sets limits on coordinated party expenditures against the Republican Party’s challenge. That motion has now been granted. To put it simply, Trump and his allies are blatantly attempting to let billionaires buy our elections. And we’re going to fight back with every tool at our disposal. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Free and fair elections are at stake, but Democrats will never stop fighting to defend our democracy. We hope you’ll join us. Thank you, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: A nation of morons
body:
Watching American celebrate July 4 felt grotesque given the right wing revolution dragging America back to the darkest parts of its past

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..V_KU17x942tIliprSmLyLR6sDjnBRbmVddiyvCUyZ3M?) for more

---
# [A nation of morons](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=167629734&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjI5NzM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE4MTU1OTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDQwNzU5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XQBF2AHDostsPSz18GiRyxRd-wjXfGd2zG6FRyKfAF8)
### Watching American celebrate July 4 felt grotesque given the right wing revolution dragging America back to the darkest parts of its past
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Jul 6| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=167629734&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjI5NzM0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTgxNTU5MCwiZXhwIjoxNzU0NDA3NTkwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Q4ALQKopNdNq9buvFwSBVNZCsmElLt31KfqBM9AgSoI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=167629734&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjI5NzM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE4MTU1OTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDQwNzU5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XQBF2AHDostsPSz18GiRyxRd-wjXfGd2zG6FRyKfAF8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=167629734&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjI5NzM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE4MTU1OTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDQwNzU5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XQBF2AHDostsPSz18GiRyxRd-wjXfGd2zG6FRyKfAF8)
---

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/a-nation-of-morons?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The disturbing [hypocrisy](https://substack.com/redirect/06eb7271-a5a3-4ae6-b43b-115d292f4230?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of July 4 celebrations have [prompted](https://substack.com/redirect/b93624b2-ccea-4e6e-ad14-1847ad563b0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) me to write on any number of previous years--stretching back [over a decade](https://substack.com/redirect/a9f2ef17-0065-413b-9ca6-530cda6581b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--about the obliviousness of Americans to the seemingly invisible [rise of fascism](https://substack.com/redirect/96471c91-c225-4b94-9b6b-633f267a0047?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in their midst.
The pervasive ignorance that grips this country, however, seems impenetrable.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/486d2d60-7254-4e78-a7b4-db4481854782?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rather than whip myself into a frenzy this year, I took advantage of a day off work to meditate, play some music, workout, and prioritize my health. It was a fun day.
Waking up from a rare nap to the sound of "bombs bursting in air" (for the crass entertainment of sheeple seemingly unacquainted with [LED art](https://substack.com/redirect/646b520e-4b1b-46a7-b178-48ed3063b72d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) felt like a fitting metaphor for this historical moment.
Today's article will dive into a recent decision by the Supreme Court and explain the depths of its depravity. The president deserves all the opprobrium that his mendacity invites. But there is a profound danger in mistaking his trees for the more enduring post-constitutional forest.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this free post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=167629734&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjI5NzM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE4MTU1OTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDQwNzU5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XQBF2AHDostsPSz18GiRyxRd-wjXfGd2zG6FRyKfAF8)
### **Yet another travesty at the Supreme Court**
Last week, the Supreme Court handed down a pivotal decision with grave consequences for the lives of millions of people, as well as the constitutional balance among powers theoretically separated across various (e.g., legislative, judicial, and executive) branches. If there is any justice in this world, _[Trump v. Casa](https://substack.com/redirect/25f7b722-5df0-4619-9107-806b040ac44a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ will live in infamy.
I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/0f20143b-116e-4e0e-87bc-e74fcfeb58df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a few weeks ago, reflecting on a different set of the Court's decisions, that:
> The executive wields the power of the sword, and Congress the power of the purse. The courts have only the power of the pen, which relies in turn on respect from the other branches.
Last week's decision entailed the bizarre spectacle of the judiciary turning on itself, limiting its own power and giving the executive branch greater sway--at a particularly dangerous time in our nation's history.
Most [news coverage](https://substack.com/redirect/e9647192-a3a2-4829-a98e-c4c16b39a18f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the decision understandably focused on its subject matter: the [constitutional promise of birthright citizenship](https://substack.com/redirect/8baa2d76-7427-4b2c-ae71-828d1909c013?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) embedded in the 14th Amendment ratified after the Union victory in the Civil War.
The Court essentially re-litigated the central legal outcome of the War, but you might not have heard it described that way since the particular decision it overturned was [an 1898 case](https://substack.com/redirect/05dd0e75-c731-41e9-95cb-3c1bfc3f101a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) granting citizenship to Wong Kim Ark, who was born to Chinese non-citizen immigrant parents living in San Francisco.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts, sign up for a free subscription! To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qAqpYcS6mHJ_P6jd2-1JdTP6FaUjXIGVlsxTXpujanE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167629734)
In any case, the decision left the underlying result of Trump's challenge to birthright citizenship unclear for the moment while the case returns to lower courts. But it went even further than throwing the result of the Civil War into the proverbial air, by also flipping a key constitutional principle on its head and calling into question the success of the War for Independence.
### **The judiciary v. itself**
The constitutional design and separation of powers rely on the branches of government defending their own interests vis-a-vis the others. When the branches give away their powers, however, they essentially play into the fears of our founders, who [anticipated hyper-partisanship](https://substack.com/redirect/7a424aac-8c07-4aa9-8b59-e994395237bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the tendency of the executive branch to [aggress](https://substack.com/redirect/52d0b927-578b-49ac-bb65-f058f3461915?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the spheres of the other branches, and the corresponding need for [judicial independence and supremacy](https://substack.com/redirect/799d05c3-0254-4979-b6f0-e7a94035a255?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Despite their racism and misogyny, the founders were talented architects of a constitutional system that, two-and-a-half centuries later, is being dismantled and contorted by the people charged with protecting it.
Congressional abdication of the legislative function, and routine institutional deference to the executive branch, have grown routine, though no less offensive. It was the underlying reason animating [my campaigns for Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/ead32075-5156-4d05-bd33-6c2646e3318c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the course of six years against a senior (and [corrupt](https://substack.com/redirect/ec1513eb-763e-4284-bd80-d9b120b2be18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) dynastic congressional leader.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=167629734&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjI5NzM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE4MTU1OTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDQwNzU5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XQBF2AHDostsPSz18GiRyxRd-wjXfGd2zG6FRyKfAF8)
The spectacle of the Supreme Court hamstringing its own branch of government is grotesque, only all the more so given the [institutional contortions](https://substack.com/redirect/d713bf48-6740-491a-ab80-0983aa0bf157?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) necessary to contrive today's majority. It not only abandons the oath of office in practice, but has actively weaponized itself against the constitutional design the Justices been charged by 400 million people with upholding.
There's a particular irony in the Court's latest decision limiting federal courts, apparent in the sharp contrast with [its ruling last year](https://substack.com/redirect/61e0ce67-14fa-4260-a995-64210f6b0ca3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that empowered judges to overrule executive agencies by overturning the _Chevron_ doctrine. Could it be so simple that the Court empowers the executive branch under Republican presidents while restraining it under Democrats? The shoe of politicized "justice" certainly seems to fit, damning the judicial exercise as [a naked demonstration of power inconsistent](https://substack.com/redirect/0b3ea78a-75d1-41e4-9028-1f2f2c48e1bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with the Constitution.
For better or worse, the right wing revolution underway in Washington extends far beyond the White House, and ultimately, includes the Supreme Court charged with defending the Constitution from the political branches that were co-opted long ago.
Words frankly fail to convey the depth of my disdain for whatever passes for law or governance in this country. It pains me to witness so many seemingly smart people so ignorantly invite their own subjugation.
However you may have celebrated July 4, please abandon any pretense that our nation's founding values enjoy any respect today. As the United States [declares war on the world--and itself](https://substack.com/redirect/33f3fcde-49a7-4f0a-bf54-79945fd07531?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--this would be a fine time to mourn, rather than celebrate.
_Paid subscribers can read some thoughts about Zohran Mamdani, the Democratic Socialist nominee of the Democratic Party to serve as the next Mayor of New York City, that I posted as a comment on another writer 's Substack column. I plan to write more in the coming weeks about Mamdani and the growing backlash to his inspiring primary victory over a powerful corporate establishment..._

It was a fun day. Waking up from a rare nap to the sound of "bombs bursting in air" (for the crass entertainment of sheeple seemingly unacquainted with ) felt like a fitting metaphor for this historical moment. Today's article will dive into a recent decision by the Supreme Court and explain the depths of its depravity. The president deserves all the opprobrium that his mendacity invites. But there is a profound danger in mistaking his trees for the more enduring post-constitutional forest. Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this free post. Yet another travesty at the Supreme Court Last week, the Supreme Court handed down a pivotal decision with grave consequences for the lives of millions of people, as well as the constitutional balance among powers theoretically separated across various (e.g., legislative, judicial, and executive) branches. If there is any justice in this world, will live in infamy. I a few weeks ago, reflecting on a different set of the Court's decisions, that: The executive wields the power of the sword, and Congress the power of the purse. The courts have only the power of the pen, which relies in turn on respect from the other branches. Last week's decision entailed the bizarre spectacle of the judiciary turning on itself, limiting its own power and giving the executive branch greater sway--at a particularly dangerous time in our nation's history. Most of the decision understandably focused on its subject matter: the embedded in the 14th Amendment ratified after the Union victory in the Civil War. The Court essentially re-litigated the central legal outcome of the War, but you might not have heard it described that way since the particular decision it overturned was granting citizenship to Wong Kim Ark, who was born to Chinese non-citizen immigrant parents living in San Francisco. Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts, sign up for a free subscription! To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber. In any case, the decision left the underlying result of Trump's challenge to birthright citizenship unclear for the moment while the case returns to lower courts. But it went even further than throwing the result of the Civil War into the proverbial air, by also flipping a key constitutional principle on its head and calling into question the success of the War for Independence. The judiciary v. itself The constitutional design and separation of powers rely on the branches of government defending their own interests vis-a-vis the others. When the branches give away their powers, however, they essentially play into the fears of our founders, who , the tendency of the executive branch to on the spheres of the other branches, and the corresponding need for . Despite their racism and misogyny, the founders were talented architects of a constitutional system that, two-and-a-half centuries later, is being dismantled and contorted by the people charged with protecting it. Congressional abdication of the legislative function, and routine institutional deference to the executive branch, have grown routine, though no less offensive. It was the underlying reason animating over the course of six years against a senior (and ) dynastic congressional leader. The spectacle of the Supreme Court hamstringing its own branch of government is grotesque, only all the more so given the necessary to contrive today's majority. It not only abandons the oath of office in practice, but has actively weaponized itself against the constitutional design the Justices been charged by 400 million people with upholding. There's a particular irony in the Court's latest decision limiting federal courts, apparent in the sharp contrast with that empowered judges to overrule executive agencies by overturning the Chevron doctrine. Could it be so simple that the Court empowers the executive branch under Republican presidents while restraining it under Democrats? The shoe of politicized "justice" certainly seems to fit, damning the judicial exercise as with the Constitution. For better or worse, the right wing revolution underway in Washington extends far beyond the White House, and ultimately, includes the Supreme Court charged with defending the Constitution from the political branches that were co-opted long ago. Words frankly fail to convey the depth of my disdain for whatever passes for law or governance in this country. It pains me to witness so many seemingly smart people so ignorantly invite their own subjugation. However you may have celebrated July 4, please abandon any pretense that our nation's founding values enjoy any respect today. As the United States would be a fine time to mourn, rather than celebrate. Paid subscribers can read some thoughts about Zohran Mamdani, the Democratic Socialist nominee of the Democratic Party to serve as the next Mayor of New York City, that I posted as a comment on another writer 's Substack column. I plan to write more in the coming weeks about Mamdani and the growing backlash to his inspiring primary victory over a powerful corporate establishment... Continue reading this post for free in the Substack app | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Shahid Buttar South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150 ? ?

clean_body: Stand with New Dems like Derek Tran and Greg Landsman >> | = From grocery bills to prescription drugs, everyday costs are rising under the Trump administration — and families are feeling the pressure. That’s why Derek Tran and Greg Landsman have co-founded the Lowering Costs Caucus to bring real solutions to the table and make life more affordable for all Americans. = | = New Dems don’t play games – we deliver and fight to ease the burden on families, lower costs, and restore faith in government that works for the people. But to keep making progress, we need to grow our movement. Convicted criminal and conman Donald Trump has plunged the U.S. into a questionable “war” with Iran, but definitions seem to shift with his ever-changing narrative. Our so-called “stable genius” launched attacks on Iranian nuclear facilities without congressional approval, flouting the Constitution and all notions of decency. In a shocking display of recklessness, Trump claims he “gave permission” for Iran to retaliate by bombing our airbase in Qatar, endangering American lives. He then boasts of negotiating a ceasefire that quickly collapses, punctuated by an F-bomb in a fit of frustration. To top off this chaotic spectacle, he shares a parody sing-along of a Beach Boys song on his social media, advocating for turning Iran “into a parking lot.” **This belligerent ignorance makes Trump a global laughingstock, yet he holds the nuclear codes that could ignite World War III. How many more warning signs do we need?** [**We aren’t sitting around waiting to find out! clean_body: | | | Trump jokes about bombing Iran. He has the nuclear codes. Convicted criminal and conman Donald Trump has plunged the U.S. into a questionable “war” with Iran, but definitions seem to shift with his ever-changing narrative. Our so-called “stable genius” launched attacks on Iranian nuclear facilities without congressional approval, flouting the Constitution and all notions of decency. In a shocking display of recklessness, Trump claims he “gave permission” for Iran to retaliate by bombing our airbase in Qatar, endangering American lives. He then boasts of negotiating a ceasefire that quickly collapses, punctuated by an F-bomb in a fit of frustration. To top off this chaotic spectacle, he shares a parody sing-along of a Beach Boys song on his social media, advocating for turning Iran “into a parking lot.” This belligerent ignorance makes Trump a global laughingstock, yet he holds the nuclear codes that could ignite World War III. How many more warning signs do we need? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: This is the fight of our time:
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250706-1415-foote&t=1001&akid=1415%2E342411%2EBVftMo ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

FIRST: Trump showed us exactly who he was from day one, and governed with
authoritarian intent. He targeted immigrants, emboldened extremists,
abused his power, and was impeached twice.

THEN: The people spoke, and he lost the 2020 election. But instead of
accepting defeat, Trump tried to overturn the election results, incited a
violent insurrection on January 6th, and faced multiple indictments.
Still, he refused to take responsibility.

NOW: Trump is back — more extreme, and more determined than ever to hold
onto power. From enacting mass deportations, attempting to ignore federal
courts, and signing illegal executive orders, Trump has caused chaos.

Right now, he has the full force of the MAGA machine behind him, enabling
his every move. This is the fight of our time.

The Squad Victory Fund was built to defend democracy and elect bold,
progressive champions who won’t back down from authoritarianism — not in
Congress and not at the ballot box.

But this isn’t a fight we can win alone. This work takes an immense amount
of resources, and it’s crucial we build the momentum needed to protect our
democracy. That’s why we’re asking:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250706-movement.23TOxw&refcode=em20250706-1415&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1415%2E342411%2EBVftMo ]Will you pitch in $3 — or whatever you can afford —
today to help us defeat Trump’s dangerous agenda? We cannot sit idly by
while Trump and his administration tear down the progress we have made.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250706-movement.23TOxw&refcode=em20250706-1415&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1415%2E342411%2EBVftMo ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1415%2E342411%2EBVftMo

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Jason C. Johnson
subject: Deputy charged with first-degree murder after being cleared
body:
| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot , That’s me, my three kids, and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches, in the picture I’ve sent you.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e61b041917954ca782aee8eefb9c99b3&_e=uZ9G5QWFIT-2RDeBLuVSWY8DYRW8rEm9ebNGfaDAf0WqTH03Ht8brPQZdevKB2k1N70qIxp__2-LdLFiOIT0ES6X7pKyHQbNv_yl207k8hxg9r-9C12v_vNoltvrC5nT2WN4pwfaJZPbJPsgnRYkKdJBctDsISsVRv5Eq6cE8U7_8vParDV13kPnxssV0Dk_yA9OZn3d4gU5Q7f17Y3PwKmweY4M_ae6-jNRJ3JSwAc7r-0fxEDRWFgrjLhWsGI-b7j0pKkFU3eWZK0bjuoCsUqbsnhROXGgvZ7jKAThcpU7D9OrxWszutXzTz0hLpM6YnJH7op-PAWY_gDtEfrlMh6gNY1fkwyCPAnIGF7Ojb8RIUOFilzN_pu4TWMK1ttc-IwvRdDQd0KwMN9LWJUWtGQ-lzDIMKA-59SfY1Tmvkp2kLKI-gt8QzKXAUjlzYqlpyR4CqNzkcfSxAl4UWeghbpC3ONRqca__uA9CN_2IXKuRJpxWAH9saKcfhn-i6ncG--EAqeRg8JvuuEfX_0X6IQxbcHo3snmMTbWw9YAG7NDWSy-yZPF87BXbNn3BsvT5WrsQKdCZxT89sBYm70K1dr1tuB5FpMX5IwFcFU5Fy6n3LEd3Pq_zunaW4DrWvuy_xq2qg1pmSAmDLorBwkZaFUJxZh72UrzBU6EpBW3szfp2309O3qFK20-Qtz7i_1-)
---
This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because a police-hating, Soros-funded prosecutor... ...is trying to rip my husband away from our family and lock him up for life for doing his job. **[And he might succeed if no one can help us.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e61b041917954ca782aee8eefb9c99b3&_e=uZ9G5QWFIT-2RDeBLuVSWY8DYRW8rEm9ebNGfaDAf0WqTH03Ht8brPQZdevKB2k1N70qIxp__2-LdLFiOIT0ES6X7pKyHQbNv_yl207k8hxg9r-9C12v_vNoltvrC5nT2WN4pwfaJZPbJPsgnRYkKdJBctDsISsVRv5Eq6cE8U7_8vParDV13kPnxssV0Dk_yA9OZn3d4gU5Q7f17Y3PwKmweY4M_ae6-jNRJ3JSwAe18zQ0rEowH9i_8Uko5bLc2MusftKkM1MmgmP42nmAKCvJRxUO25nQmUAcA3b7gZQFcoWxGa1DQtWCrIkWQqBGJ5dOxI7Q3TNQUSB0TzO60_vFohpzCE_ShIc8VnnXMoQAN145cRHiCbjOLtwpWY5gH19RUh_QTicpKfsvmptqbHV-fAC72oJOCW48pwhofpO2dyI558Qp0MRdgrHmhGYr8x5VA804Y0CSReDQp7Vfj7VBmYZ7dsh9Xat3ZvuIpaxmB3tkRb66-RNuVCEU5vuBDdmu9Lh26NThWXJOZuUGxtY9XZIdPG4aHMZNobRbYB-y1qEJIxJxWo0hUTNrff3Y8VmaWPaFEDuw6ov3ObE-IVHcr3_rphUFtX4oK_SKY1GCgrYGSZqAQ1m9E_Ltz8g_1oEUqFbcQSD60GVCp3Z1OYQJ3HfTxGFHKMUTvqZG-3OvmzUt4ldkA4nfqJFaJbd1)** I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were “mostly peaceful.” It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down the interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn’t restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same “beanbag guns” that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before things got any worse. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. But what Chance didn’t know is that one of the beanbags he fired wound up hurting a rioter’s hand. And nearly **TWO YEARS** after my husband helped save our city from being burned to the ground... ...the county prosecutor decided to charge my husband with “aggravated assault by a public servant” – a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, I went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don’t care if my husband is innocent. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year-old police veteran. My husband was a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He’s served on mission trips – planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars could be his “reward.” Even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God’s grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us – the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (**LELDF**). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policeman’s best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they’ve agreed to help Chance. My friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: **[Will you help Chance, too?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e61b041917954ca782aee8eefb9c99b3&_e=uZ9G5QWFIT-2RDeBLuVSWY8DYRW8rEm9ebNGfaDAf0WqTH03Ht8brPQZdevKB2k1N70qIxp__2-LdLFiOIT0ES6X7pKyHQbNv_yl207k8hxg9r-9C12v_vNoltvrC5nT2WN4pwfaJZPbJPsgnRYkKdJBctDsISsVRv5Eq6cE8U7_8vParDV13kPnxssV0Dk_yA9OZn3d4gU5Q7f17Y3PwKmweY4M_ae6-jNRJ3JSwAdLPVNqGBE26o8o1i1h2QYrCVjSikNW-hZNQI9YbEVZBEZ2e-mWDqWJC24Gv6Bmp7jQ7BXkEDqaLgqiXPnCY9usEM9-f9TMBgMC_ds9juR-KvAArM9z0WaxwSCIoZZelN5wP-36i31aj2Evll-iugnyNMmMZBonSNXMEN-WKGjcFnw00F_DqeD5yeWyfzfho1-dQeRKhHOwQcETbDGJnZ_GrfDmkxUKAcnfUhQTol5NhItXpoCc3e0tCHNumTXQhrv3Z8k6xzwn_69pyxZB6p_DLKjd-KNUvVDHNwOObYrxis7kN1G7aUpYdNL65K6QevT3_Pi7avzCcO0lC9Fv4vf1wqUzQttaSnrSeWP1jfY5xwsg8RJ40QvIqfZCed34Q1eqYLhfGAQFpDyrfaBXiSkcLOg4-nor14wdeoty6wo63dhuZSgTX90eImDVZdxd0GsoOu7uyrOzlbHQ8gUnfb0p)** Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. **[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution – be it $35, $100, $500, or even $1,000 – is tax-deductible.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e61b041917954ca782aee8eefb9c99b3&_e=uZ9G5QWFIT-2RDeBLuVSWY8DYRW8rEm9ebNGfaDAf0WqTH03Ht8brPQZdevKB2k1N70qIxp__2-LdLFiOIT0ES6X7pKyHQbNv_yl207k8hxg9r-9C12v_vNoltvrC5nT2WN4pwfaJZPbJPsgnRYkKdJBctDsISsVRv5Eq6cE8U7_8vParDV13kPnxssV0Dk_yA9OZn3d4gU5Q7f17Y3PwKmweY4M_ae6-jNRJ3JSwAcRzIA_-KHjxf8qV4EooZHKD9pmtxXRqO2SxBZcx-PqdiUI0yNMMH3dQOZhVY8mTn3YEUCyBL877oQVCHJbWxf18YvdYkKgNPOTy86EXvjfvocn5NScfR3YAiSLjoJx5EDTSN21jzpHKoe-WZ7tIF09aa3PX9j-klKO5PX8-SensARdDRrMJaDVFAD1Ye6XZDQ5bKt2ICrTbYOfqpQ5WERAKIUEQ8qYDCR8yMw4onTrFeZBvyd16nTlB4G_hKdob78tvL9GRJYHcVCXDevtGGmtxlY6mTjXCofpxM3-KETCTO8LbLm48k7cCr0HIjs2SA4EYd1ycS1_AZxQ8mGa7tkaHBjHxitUUkom4bg_AVE-Qes8MjszIK2iKMBEd6AAOqXSAJTnQloEAafladIH9o5MlWLYiV_HMivD1QKdKPn5cAEtX5NdXZOaP2v5RvR2kDcrTESB2T3RP7AjeUb89270)** But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance’s trial starts in December. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he’ll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won’t be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won’t be able to walk our daughter down the aisle on her wedding day... I can’t bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. [**So please, my friend, rush back your gift in the next 24 hours if possible.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e61b041917954ca782aee8eefb9c99b3&_e=uZ9G5QWFIT-2RDeBLuVSWY8DYRW8rEm9ebNGfaDAf0WqTH03Ht8brPQZdevKB2k1N70qIxp__2-LdLFiOIT0ES6X7pKyHQbNv_yl207k8hxg9r-9C12v_vNoltvrC5nT2WN4pwfaJZPbJPsgnRYkKdJBctDsISsVRv5Eq6cE8U7_8vParDV13kPnxssV0Dk_yA9OZn3d4gU5Q7f17Y3PwKmweY4M_ae6-jNRJ3JSwAdvzDwDBU1EZuGPs5st5lSmrVxD2t3PCKLO5l_aXZKuNhmNmivO0P0c8xcUQ8dEj_JWlCUsZeSr6n-zQwCtF6hebaJbwTVjG4xH0UE7zE1pioeG-zowaUmz04yHZZ4IQbre8MdoseO9qWqN_sw6N6wtJA_oRfc2Ul1krrtTCoWJjTe9lZzyB0IOF0jije4I_Q--xYBExQCfsI2XFyTOHMg3WlyxPB3uYBVs1qUfry-dZugVamrhgiL8qx_WYu6q6QmUtShviUf4DCsuqNb4K25-eS_PZRo2XkKSWWQuSswbTd9MAiBFMv8nj1GvFU9y4Rulh-tFM-9Nx1DnPEwVMrsZnn89XRbB7KHQcIpeDUqQBurP9gnk6EbUTioVuv3zAy7xvjj0-Wnv7DA8KMUCh3RkgSw8TVfE9RTpSrSvZC27YIt8HcawAvDV_Z-kTTiLLlidSqwi8qYO78a5I06wlRAs) With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, [**your gift of $35**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e61b041917954ca782aee8eefb9c99b3&_e=uZ9G5QWFIT-2RDeBLuVSWY8DYRW8rEm9ebNGfaDAf0WqTH03Ht8brPQZdevKB2k1N70qIxp__2-LdLFiOIT0ES6X7pKyHQbNv_yl207k8hxg9r-9C12v_vNoltvrC5nT2WN4pwfaJZPbJPsgnRYkKdJBctDsISsVRv5Eq6cE8U7_8vParDV13kPnxssV0Dk_yA9OZn3d4gU5Q7f17Y3PwKmweY4M_ae6-jNRJ3JSwActoHsb2ZmwBfQgXRo8WrcmulQG0T98jCpH-dwJhdMTA0SLd59S_DD-Vf2gIjuo7EyuTf0yErIW6WB2XS-vU9GNTlNhZVrxi7P6XkiuNARUnvaF27CRT8U-3lRR-U0TqCdas87e13qJnUK-v5y-BDmmRv7_EeUJIz9njezg_CiEuEVC4jXxJyiBsC3qwDnMB3_qmpHuGgcUVPwoBxrsPwHBqKjqN7nWVPHlzNBybmmyNq4B6UYFzfTSiLvTKRKixIWVcZk_VeDMbTuM3yiebGrXtbcyZDXj8rGpaREkXTv0txnljuleTOguoke-MP_W1MO-1-aIY5fsPrGyi0TSQ2a6mmKuVhgaSH5_60zMu_Iv0r3R4-SFL2WG2aX8jL05OQx8OM0dExF9t_DHHgj4ga9_HAFSO49JoRIKUaMjvgRzFLxKxMOUiYter3xu2VIjjRJYk7A5VfCERLrLfSvoqJ7p) – or any amount – could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his “reward.” And to make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros-back prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance’s trial begins. Chance and I have three children – and one more on the way. Please don’t let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e61b041917954ca782aee8eefb9c99b3&_e=uZ9G5QWFIT-2RDeBLuVSWY8DYRW8rEm9ebNGfaDAf0WqTH03Ht8brPQZdevKB2k1N70qIxp__2-LdLFiOIT0ES6X7pKyHQbNv_yl207k8hxg9r-9C12v_vNoltvrC5nT2WN4pwfaJZPbJPsgnRYkKdJBctDsISsVRv5Eq6cE8U7_8vParDV13kPnxssV0Dk_yA9OZn3d4gU5Q7f17Y3PwKmweY4M_ae6-jNRJ3JSwAe2T8EVKTf_E2yKa8pJFMcS-hUEfCNmgAn_gfeX0U4hpFnS6n7WxzEWklAda-WfVVs8lJYm73snpXNodf9YTTJTCgqWIQA87XOGU4S2FVu7iFeQkHBmTq3hx9nQN6g94J8h2qzcRdy1XOpy3prXIJdBk6664fNmZ2Uh4pjTCAUdKZiL8_Vju3WEYdK83NhmrzypwRQjCY9hXwaZiVG5G4QyjpWZRPCdkRX0DRNZ1BkUulncVIO2VEi6EVO8lUmrl4GfjPxDm-7b36Dry_wf7eqvvZF_PC1YHi4X1UcrZ7eaOh0vlaJ5WGMO5Cm0oD4IkBC4VEvBHe6UetD_-EBjWazKxHVmfLPoR9h4Y2derVCD_rpxZZyO7z8ljVK8eJbVeNTa9fGLvmMjYxGFu265RtZrVSRnvwD9LrV5GDEnpmMEtY0Gpgu9SEmcpUTAvYoj06PWzTd_i77Dcqg4Hw5JCVgV)**_

clean_body: | | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job. | | Dear Patriot , That’s me, my three kids, and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches, in the picture I’ve sent you. - This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because a police-hating, Soros-funded prosecutor... ...is trying to rip my husband away from our family and lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were “mostly peaceful.” It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down the interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn’t restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same “beanbag guns” that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before things got any worse. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. But what Chance didn’t know is that one of the beanbags he fired wound up hurting a rioter’s hand. And nearly TWO YEARS after my husband helped save our city from being burned to the ground... ...the county prosecutor decided to charge my husband with “aggravated assault by a public servant” – a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, I went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don’t care if my husband is innocent. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year-old police veteran. My husband was a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He’s served on mission trips – planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars could be his “reward.” Even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God’s grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us – the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policeman’s best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they’ve agreed to help Chance. My friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance’s trial starts in December. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he’ll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won’t be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won’t be able to walk our daughter down the aisle on her wedding day... I can’t bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, – or any amount – could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his “reward.” And to make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros-back prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance’s trial begins. Chance and I have three children – and one more on the way. Please don’t let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

Fellow Conservative,

**I survived four IED explosions during my service in Iraq. I was a target for our enemies there and in Afghanistan.**

Tough fights don’t scare me and my service isn’t done. I’m running for the U.S. Senate at a critical moment in our nation’s history.

President Trump has taken bold action to protect American lives, secure our borders, and put our country first. Jon Ossoff hasn’t been with him any step of the way.

_Ossoff stood by while Biden opened our borders and was nowhere to be found when it mattered most during Afghanistan’s collapse._ Since the election, all he’s done is vote against supporting Israel and protecting girls’ sports.

_And by the way, he’s also said he’d support impeaching President Trump._

**Jon Ossoff is a politician who only cares about optics and keeping the party bosses happy. We can, and we must, do better than that. And I can do better than him.**

[**If you agree, I hope you’ll help send a lawman and soldier to the Senate by pitching in whatever makes sense here.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=c4a92dc76c17498fbe91094dc267914d&_e=XofQM3MNhLjrnupOE4WoZInFDQCo-ptYBYbnhThKLSUt_93FnkngQ_-ldsuzjbQlKGd6hXeAkfv4h7rgtR2dTEyjAc2VfDnmXuZS-30cSDn02itAJkD9TvX9ExaNNK4iczmSnk_wLJZEnhUFdNghl17BnUUasLIymfck9mhisIk1kHiaC3385RTwn5IrKS6gNptJ5pYmefk9XbGDKWJe8IFHnpr88HRjLqxMD-aQkFs-K01tdBRBOHbIsaGelCst6JjtnU-h2Bw3lYSprW3l0d_4Ir6SPozRA_sQ_WDbCagCdd2mVb7rOnqhEDR-N2z4gBzHMrhnyvYVg7Isnpkxkf0YPz3CKK4YQzXaaIq639kc-vpGycf-XQxLT8vNt4hDbjrJYkqE_sj5ikJmR9JOh5K2s-oA-a0QNjAQUgiOflh778YKkn8YSWF5APKEXNJfbB6H4ooTDGZeJDgphjdK3PIIToZg0PWLEZGaXpJrMf55adgTAjvy6zQDZi-xnOe5HLMHQKJsfFs21tCK7ux-Loh5-5ywdDJmDUfEZUF7iITb9iduAwBZFCNrQmviXNgf5oV4UGpocJfMCp2GAMORWlxZgBakX4oiQkDoyXZXZlBrSUhJl-XNMQTAsA94AqHGj1U-KPgIlPNguf6wgUKeB29GRtqw9hozA-Vw2fatv_jfzybAOBn8RXvjpThUIXwt)

Flipping this Senate seat, defeating Jon Ossoff, and sending President Trump backup is going to make for the most difficult and expensive race in the country.

clean_body: I survived four IED explosions during my service in Iraq. I was a target for our enemies there and in Afghanistan. | Fellow Conservative, I survived four IED explosions during my service in Iraq. I was a target for our enemies there and in Afghanistan. Tough fights don’t scare me and my service isn’t done. I’m running for the U.S. Senate at a critical moment in our nation’s history. President Trump has taken bold action to protect American lives, secure our borders, and put our country first. Jon Ossoff hasn’t been with him any step of the way. Ossoff stood by while Biden opened our borders and was nowhere to be found when it mattered most during Afghanistan’s collapse. Since the election, all he’s done is vote against supporting Israel and protecting girls’ sports. And by the way, he’s also said he’d support impeaching President Trump. Jon Ossoff is a politician who only cares about optics and keeping the party bosses happy. We can, and we must, do better than that. And I can do better than him. Flipping this Senate seat, defeating Jon Ossoff, and sending President Trump backup is going to make for the most difficult and expensive race in the country. Ossoff will raise and spend whatever it takes. We don’t have to outraise him, but we must raise as much as we can as soon as we can to share my message. And unlike Ossoff, who has elite liberal donors, I depend on patriots like you to fuel the mission. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Dept. of Defense or any Service Branch._
