clean_body: Peter, here’s the deal: Radical Democrats, Hollywood elites, and liberal megadonors are pulling out all the stops to beat my friend. | - Peter, Without any doubt, South Carolina and our nation are better off because of the leadership of my friend Lindsey Graham in the United States Senate. From chairing the Senate Budget Committee to being a key ally of President Trump, Senator Graham knows how to get things done. His problem-solving skills, compassion, and signature sense of humor make him a standout leader who rises to every challenge. I've witnessed firsthand how effective Lindsey Graham is at advancing our conservative values and working for the people of South Carolina. Peter, that is why I'm proud to support Senator Graham's re-election, and I hope you will too. Here's the deal: Radical Democrats, Hollywood elites, and liberal megadonors are pulling out all the stops to beat Lindsey -- AGAIN. The Left's smear campaigns and misleading ads have already begun, targeting our values and South Carolina's voice in the Senate. Democrats are laser-focused on flipping Republican seats to seize control of the Senate, and they've set their sights on one man: our fellow South Carolinian, Lindsey Graham. We can't let them succeed. | I saw what happened to Lindsey in 2020 -- the Left is ready to do it again this time around. He already has one far-left liberal opponent who is on MSNBC pleading for liberal dollars... These out-of-state liberals will funnel millions of dollars into the Palmetto State in an attempt to buy this election, defeat Senator Graham, win a Democrat majority in the Senate. They want to halt the tremendous progress we've already made for the American people working with President Trump. Whether he's supporting President Trump's America First agenda, rebuilding our military, or confirming conservative judges to our courts, Senator Graham gets the job done -- and he needs our help to stay in the fight. I trust Lindsey and I can count on you, Peter! Thanks, Tim Scott United States Senator (R-SC) In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

| | Hey Reader, Most civilians don't know this - and I’m shocked the mass media hasn’t picked up on this yet. But a group of American engineers have created [**the first unbreakable tactical glasses**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21608/6374453/1e4f8c29bf69273112022e3428596f7c3618ab09/ec9eaef3ae6c65aa74e696c1237577b7fe6b6843) that meet MIL SPEC ballistics standards for combat use... It’s all thanks to a groundbreaking new methods of using proven technology to create extreme durability and protection in even combat conditions. Now available to civilians for the first time. **[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21608/6374453/fbfe9f0e3c9f41e0e95e6348a0dfb1bad6dd2624/ec9eaef3ae6c65aa74e696c1237577b7fe6b6843)[==> THESE are unbelievable](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21608/6374453/1e4f8c29bf69273112022e3428596f7c3618ab09/ec9eaef3ae6c65aa74e696c1237577b7fe6b6843)** **Thank You.** **P.S.** Right now, I'm throwing in 4 sets of lenses, a hard case, and FREE S&H!

Based on our internal electoral assessments, we couldn’t agree more. One of the races they spotlight is Rep. Adam Gray’s razor-thin win over Republican John Duarte — **by just 187 votes**. That’s in a district where Donald Trump won by 5 points — and it’s one of the TOP TEN closest races in the entire country. Another is Rep. Derek Tran’s win by only 653 votes. These are exactly the kinds of districts we must protect if we want to flip the House. # [How We Talk Might Decide If We Survive](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=167659773&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjU5NzczLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE4MjE5NzgsImV4cCI6MTc1NDQxMzk3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kCO0c7uL-a3DArb-qLnEdCXVe9Uz2i28AY3fCEpZfZI)
### Why rebuilding our ability to talk - with nuance, empathy, and courage - is the foundation for defending our freedom and our children's future.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Jul 6

| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/how-we-talk-might-decide-if-we-survive?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The machinery of fascism is consolidating. Faster than most of us ever imagined. Faster than we know how to respond.
It's a dizzying moment -- many of us feel paralyzed, disgusted, overwhelmed, or confused. And there's something even more dangerous than the takeover of our systems, and that's the takeover of our minds: our ability to _speak to each other,_ to _stay in conversation_ with one another.
Because here is the blunt truth: **if we cannot talk to each other, we cannot work together -- and if we cannot work together, we cannot survive what is coming.**
* * *
## **The Shared Threat**
Some folks want to believe this is still business as usual. It isn't.
We are seeing laws, narratives, and systems that target _some_ of us today, but will reach _all_ of us tomorrow. Today it might be migrants, tomorrow queer kids, the next day Muslims or Jews, or Black children, or a teacher who spoke out of turn. The net always widens. It always does.
We have seen this story before. _First they came for_ someone else, someone easier to scapegoat. And then they came for the rest of us. No one will be spared, especially not our children, if we fail to stand together now.
Yet instead of standing together, we are split open, fighting among ourselves. Our legitimate rage, our heartbreak, our fear -- all of it has been weaponized against us, so we are too divided to mount a defense.
And the hard truth is this: while we fight each other, the fascists build their fortress.
* * *
## **The Habit of Exclusion**
Part of why this happens is baked into our culture. From the prison industrial complex to the cliques in middle school, we have been trained -- for generations -- to throw each other away.
We are more practiced in discarding people than in repairing relationships. More practiced at locking others out than working to be well together, and to _be together well._
And just like the prison complex, there are people who profit from our habit of exclusion. Private interests, corporate interests, political power brokers -- they feed off the control they gain when we give up on each other's humanity.
If we treat our neighbors as disposable, if we treat our one-time allies as disposable, if we treat even the misguided or misled as permanently disposable, then we are building the fascists' empire for them. We are doing their work, free of charge.
* * *
## **The One Change We Must Make**
There is a line I love, often credited to Lao Tzu:
> _Focus your energy on the one change without which all other changes are as no change at all._
Here is the one change I believe is most urgent: if we can't talk to each other well enough to _work together,_ then nothing else -- no protest, no policy, no social media campaign, no donation, no art, no prayer -- will be enough.
Our best tools for resistance will break in our hands if we cannot wield them together.
If we can't talk, we can't _plan_.
If we can't talk, we can't _trust_.
If we can't talk, we can't _build_.
If we can't talk, we can't _survive_.
This is the mother of all changes. The beginning of every other possibility.
* * *
## **This Is Not Left vs. Right**
I want to be clear. This is not about "the left" versus "the right."
This is about _the people_ versus the takeover.
The _living_ versus the machinery of dehumanization and death.
Many people on the so-called right are appalled at what is happening right now. But their dominant narratives are so habitually counterposed to the dominant narratives on the left that they can barely find words to join together. And many people on the left are so angry, so deeply wounded by those who enabled this takeover -- sometimes unwittingly, sometimes through lies -- that they refuse to open a door, even for those trying to leave.
I understand that anger. It is valid. But if we stay frozen in that resentment, the fascists win.
We cannot afford to keep building the walls that separate us from our neighbors, while fascists build the walls that will imprison us all.
* * *
## **The Work Before Us**
So what do we do?
We _learn_ to talk again. We learn to stand our ground against cruelty, without mistaking every disagreement for an enemy. We practice the moral, social, even spiritual skills that can stitch a wounded people back together.
We learn nuance.
We learn empathy.
We learn to see each other as human again.
We learn to remember.
And we gather our courage to do it together.
Because if we cannot rebuild _us,_ then "we the people" is just a slogan on a piece of paper.
And if "we the people" is lost, then so is our freedom.
* * *
## **Where This Platform Goes From Here**
_It 's a Matter of Integrity_ will be a place to build these muscles.
I will help us talk about hard things.
I will help us practice moral clarity without cruelty.
I will help us welcome those who want to walk away from extremism, without compromising the safety of those already under attack.
We will remember what it means to stand together. We will remember what it means to _become_ "we the people."
* * *
## **Your Invitation**
If you care about dignity, about justice, about the future of our children, join me.
Subscribe.
Share.
Comment - _they 're open to everyone, now_.
Bring your whole self.
Because how we talk might just decide if we survive -- and how we live together might decide if we ever get free.
**Welcome to** _**It 's a Matter of Integrity.**_**Let 's begin.**

Why rebuilding our ability to talk - with nuance, empathy, and courage - is the foundation for defending our freedom and our children's future. | | | Jul 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | The machinery of fascism is consolidating. Faster than most of us ever imagined. Faster than we know how to respond. It's a dizzying moment -- many of us feel paralyzed, disgusted, overwhelmed, or confused. And there's something even more dangerous than the takeover of our systems, and that's the takeover of our minds: our ability to speak to each other, to stay in conversation with one another. Because here is the blunt truth: if we cannot talk to each other, we cannot work together -- and if we cannot work together, we cannot survive what is coming. The Shared Threat Some folks want to believe this is still business as usual. It isn't. We are seeing laws, narratives, and systems that target some of us today, but will reach all of us tomorrow. Today it might be migrants, tomorrow queer kids, the next day Muslims or Jews, or Black children, or a teacher who spoke out of turn. The net always widens. It always does. We have seen this story before. First they came for someone else, someone easier to scapegoat. And then they came for the rest of us. No one will be spared, especially not our children, if we fail to stand together now. Yet instead of standing together, we are split open, fighting among ourselves. Our legitimate rage, our heartbreak, our fear -- all of it has been weaponized against us, so we are too divided to mount a defense. And the hard truth is this: while we fight each other, the fascists build their fortress. The Habit of Exclusion Part of why this happens is baked into our culture. From the prison industrial complex to the cliques in middle school, we have been trained -- for generations -- to throw each other away. We are more practiced in discarding people than in repairing relationships. More practiced at locking others out than working to be well together, and to be together well. And just like the prison complex, there are people who profit from our habit of exclusion. Private interests, corporate interests, political power brokers -- they feed off the control they gain when we give up on each other's humanity. If we treat our neighbors as disposable, if we treat our one-time allies as disposable, if we treat even the misguided or misled as permanently disposable, then we are building the fascists' empire for them. We are doing their work, free of charge. The One Change We Must Make There is a line I love, often credited to Lao Tzu: Focus your energy on the one change without which all other changes are as no change at all. Here is the one change I believe is most urgent: if we can't talk to each other well enough to work together, then nothing else -- no protest, no policy, no social media campaign, no donation, no art, no prayer -- will be enough. Our best tools for resistance will break in our hands if we cannot wield them together. If we can't talk, we can't plan. If we can't talk, we can't trust. If we can't talk, we can't build. If we can't talk, we can't survive. This is the mother of all changes. The beginning of every other possibility. This Is Not Left vs. Right I want to be clear. This is not about "the left" versus "the right." This is about the people versus the takeover. The living versus the machinery of dehumanization and death. Many people on the so-called right are appalled at what is happening right now. But their dominant narratives are so habitually counterposed to the dominant narratives on the left that they can barely find words to join together. And many people on the left are so angry, so deeply wounded by those who enabled this takeover -- sometimes unwittingly, sometimes through lies -- that they refuse to open a door, even for those trying to leave. I understand that anger. It is valid. But if we stay frozen in that resentment, the fascists win. We cannot afford to keep building the walls that separate us from our neighbors, while fascists build the walls that will imprison us all. The Work Before Us So what do we do? We learn to talk again. We learn to stand our ground against cruelty, without mistaking every disagreement for an enemy. We practice the moral, social, even spiritual skills that can stitch a wounded people back together. We learn nuance. We learn empathy. We learn to see each other as human again. We learn to remember. And we gather our courage to do it together. Because if we cannot rebuild us, then "we the people" is just a slogan on a piece of paper. And if "we the people" is lost, then so is our freedom. Where This Platform Goes From Here It 's a Matter of Integrity will be a place to build these muscles. I will help us talk about hard things. I will help us practice moral clarity without cruelty. I will help us welcome those who want to walk away from extremism, without compromising the safety of those already under attack. We will remember what it means to stand together. We will remember what it means to become "we the people." Your Invitation If you care about dignity, about justice, about the future of our children, join me. Subscribe. Share. Comment - they 're open to everyone, now. Bring your whole self. Because how we talk might just decide if we survive -- and how we live together might decide if we ever get free. name: Senate Republicans
subject: What do you think about our current situation at the border?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Let us know by taking our Border Security Survey before it closes at MIDNIGHT tonight. | Fellow American,

President Trump's ‘Big, Beautiful Bill’ represents our strongest, most deliberate effort yet to protect American sovereignty and safety. This is what Senate Republicans are fighting for at the border:

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8fbb35b528764d34a37f84055ca27212&_e=36dPor3InuLguH3nAm4P5gp_FHrtFD0gUlz2ahT1AjSDpY1Y-VgIxZznoTPYa3ornanWr0dTCtt8y1YJUgg_jgbTCC-SPzx4jtoMF2OpnF2oxG1oQsExnqKVnZ1gQamsBr5qdKWAwVHKOupx8n5QXjuNzuixhNLJIkyiXmNTdJVCvRxJHhtIA7TLz6ztBYzAKuAIhM1fhA4z2byS5zK3Fz8dMRxb6XLjk8A3o8Eui5K1ZoSJQlEXPHWvNjfC_tvKOdZ0k41Dy7i3Ktgzn_jStbRgN5BLowBMsRlK-q_1YF6p_MMdLqr_N4KtS74O6GQnIbZ2-M0to59fy_L_u3l-LctXF5OSuuX6iIQPgS_ScbW3n1nCiPTY8fQpcONWGxr2_IE9L5a-p5kj-bVHA_bT6oA-OdqauEkTR-vORoGgC2VU2BkjoiwgC0qY6iuwLjSrauykmnnWv4AzQiaYye2CH9_eU57SI8hiN-9c_OzuQ9ZEKD0g4OsC2RpbEaUDKzdxO9d4gySV5TrmqkkNur_PbYhmF0YY9KpMsTV_ZZRpRc-L7dL_w5dTJURndPAaHqtnYADtIZmiHFqlekV6tMsFvhg_DlU2qmR4XrzPC0XSksDOtUcrZqW-wyOpbXNwkLZlK3wyw_iNdFssL3A9JtBcrb5E5XdpGwe8brNqgj8pHKBjjumHl20zBQXFVTEpBkm-lPfvemS6QqIHunIXELBjKXZb84HacesiEeRt8EZc93ua3G_fdAVXUl6xKNtuthJFbt3L0RnpuJRm28TlSELZDPefcbGq4KrkJPCucGU8iQewQ4f4oWLqQXg0TaHgHyFoz-VG2z258EwptJ9H8jcrnqdpCbnZesF7ciYXMNQheEeEvg73Wxbrk6mOfzIBu0xv)
Let's delve into this a little bit more...

This wide-reaching legislation-sponsored and championed by Senate Republicans-is crafted to:

**• Expand support and resources for U.S. Border Patrol agents** , giving them the tools and personnel they need at the front lines.

**• Deploy state -of-the-art surveillance and detection technologies** at key crossings and along our borders.

**• Streamline and improve the efficiency of humanitarian migrant processing** , ensuring fairness, speed, and security.

**• Strengthen intergovernmental coordination** , working hand-in-hand with local and federal law enforcement to enforce our laws.

Senate Republicans stand united in advancing this vital legislation—bold in vision and bipartisan in purpose. We’re asking you, as a dedicated American, to weigh in:

clean_body: Let us know by taking our Border Security Survey before it closes at MIDNIGHT tonight. | Fellow American, President Trump's ‘Big, Beautiful Bill’ represents our strongest, most deliberate effort yet to protect American sovereignty and safety. This is what Senate Republicans are fighting for at the border: Let's delve into this a little bit more... This wide-reaching legislation-sponsored and championed by Senate Republicans-is crafted to: • Expand support and resources for U.S. Border Patrol agents , giving them the tools and personnel they need at the front lines. • Deploy state -of-the-art surveillance and detection technologies at key crossings and along our borders. • Streamline and improve the efficiency of humanitarian migrant processing , ensuring fairness, speed, and security. • Strengthen intergovernmental coordination , working hand-in-hand with local and federal law enforcement to enforce our laws. Senate Republicans stand united in advancing this vital legislation—bold in vision and bipartisan in purpose. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Sign on to defend our public lands!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39864%2E3422442%2Ek4M5P0)
Dear Peter,
Last month, we flagged for you the harmful plan by some Republicans to sell off millions of acres of our public lands—including pristine areas near Yosemite and Lake Tahoe.
The good news is that we were able to stop this giveaway from passing the Senate. The bad news is that this wasn’t Republicans’ first attempt to sell off our public lands—and it likely won’t be the last.
We can’t let up the pressure. We need to make clear that public lands belong to all of us as Americans, and we won’t stand for any effort to line polluters’ pockets.
**[Will you sign our Hands Off Our Public Lands petition today?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em_ms_kp_20250706_1_ak?source=em20250706-39864&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=39864%2E3422442%2Ek4M5P0)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em_ms_kp_20250706_1_ak?source=em20250706-39864&akid=39864%2E3422442%2Ek4M5P0)
Thanks for your advocacy and activism,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250706-39864&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39864_3422442_k4M5P0&akid=39864%2E3422442%2Ek4M5P0)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39864&t=4&akid=39864%2E3422442%2Ek4M5P0)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39864)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39864&t=5&akid=39864%2E3422442%2Ek4M5P0)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Rep. LaMonica McIver
subject: I was only doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T569ec399-325b-48b5-9a31-668ac4fc0fd0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Last week, I left the courthouse where I pleaded not guilty to the Trump administration’s baseless criminal charges against me. They are continuing to try to intimidate me, exhaust me, drain my resources and stop me from doing the work I was elected to do. Well, they won’t. I will not fold. Let me be clear: under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my job and make sure that this administration wasn’t violating people’s rights. Then, this administration decided to come after me because I dared to stand against their cruel agenda. I will not bow down to the Trump administration, but I need your help. [Please split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action today to help me fight back against this baseless attack. We need another 4,219 donations before midnight to help amass the resources to win in court and send a message that Democrats won’t back down. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d7b3b27-21a0-4f3c-8d20-0190fb9f481c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Trump and his allies didn’t stop with me. You’ve seen it, Peter. This administration is attacking public servants nationwide for using their voices to speak out against this overreach. This is the authoritarian playbook and we must stand united against it. [Will you donate whatever you can now and take a stand for our democracy?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ed63472-da6c-442d-81fa-f62fed594b70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) What we do in this moment matters. We’re in this together, Rep. LaMonica McIver

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59f0ad18-e6e4-4b63-97de-f6dc04bd5cde/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: I took on Pete Hegseth and won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:

name: All On The Line
subject: This may have gotten lost in the news cycle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Make a donation to help build a democracy where every voice matters
|
---

**“For those people that want to protest, they’re going to be met with very big force... but you know, this is people that hate our country.” **— Donald Trump
Peter,
The right to protest is a fundamental freedom protected by the First Amendment. But according to the President of the United States, people who protest his agenda “hate our country,” and must be met with “very heavy force.”
**His comments are vile, Peter, but not surprising.**
This isn’t the first time Donald Trump has used authoritarian rhetoric to demonize protestors and threaten them with violence. And it certainly won’t be the last. In 2020, he was considering whether or not military officials should shoot protesters who took to the streets after a white police officer murdered George Floyd, a Black man.
Time and time again, Americans have taken to the streets out of love for our country to sound the alarm against anti-democracy legislation, call out and challenge gerrymandered maps, and speak up for fair representation. We engage in a deeply patriotic form of protest because we believe in a version of America where elections are free and fair — and where our democracy is truly representative.
It’s unfortunate, but we are not surprised that Trump has resorted to threatening protestors with violence. He knows that his agenda is extremely unpopular, and he’s willing to do and say anything to get his way. We must stay the course to hold Trump and other anti-democracy extremists to account and make sure they can’t silence the growing movement speaking out.
**All On The Line is mobilizing our supporters to fight for a democracy where every voice — and every vote — truly matters.[If you’re all in to make this a reality, make a donation to help power our critical work.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110993518/555873266/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_TrumpComments_email_20250706-AOTL-Tier1-TrumpComments_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250706-AOTL-Tier1-TrumpComments_&utm_campaign=TrumpComments&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkMDFhZjAzLTkzNWEtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Y-p5YNfy1nhhDILyS9AnvgZ2ecirksVtmzQHZERGlQo=)**

clean_body: Make a donation to help build a democracy where every voice matters | “For those people that want to protest, they’re going to be met with very big force... but you know, this is people that hate our country.” — Donald Trump Peter, The right to protest is a fundamental freedom protected by the First Amendment. But according to the President of the United States, people who protest his agenda “hate our country,” and must be met with “very heavy force.” His comments are vile, Peter, but not surprising. This isn’t the first time Donald Trump has used authoritarian rhetoric to demonize protestors and threaten them with violence. And it certainly won’t be the last. In 2020, he was considering whether or not military officials should shoot protesters who took to the streets after a white police officer murdered George Floyd, a Black man. Time and time again, Americans have taken to the streets out of love for our country to sound the alarm against anti-democracy legislation, call out and challenge gerrymandered maps, and speak up for fair representation. We engage in a deeply patriotic form of protest because we believe in a version of America where elections are free and fair — and where our democracy is truly representative. It’s unfortunate, but we are not surprised that Trump has resorted to threatening protestors with violence. He knows that his agenda is extremely unpopular, and he’s willing to do and say anything to get his way. We must stay the course to hold Trump and other anti-democracy extremists to account and make sure they can’t silence the growing movement speaking out. All On The Line is mobilizing our supporters to fight for a democracy where every voice — and every vote — truly matters.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The All On The Line Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. subject: There are winners and losers with Trump's disastrous bill:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110993767/555873836/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQ0MjQ3NC05MzVhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJAgJDhvqejjk4vSYQM2WUUwignadEaPm2npp8fxYQo=&emci=ae22ca3b-7d57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b4442474-935a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

The Republican Budget Bill was officially signed into law, despite every single Democrats’ plea for their Republican colleagues to do the right thing for once in their careers and vote no.

Kim stood against this bill from the beginning and here’s why:

**The winners of the “Big Ugly Bill?”**

✅ Wealthy billionaires
✅ Big corporations
✅ Special interests

**And the losers?**

❌ Healthcare workers
❌ Low-income families
❌ Rural hospitals
❌ Clean energy companies
❌ Everyday Americans

This bill is nothing more than a giveaway to the ultra-wealthy, at the direct expense of the people who keep our communities running.

It strips funding from critical healthcare services, threatens rural hospitals that families in our district rely on, guts incentives for clean energy investments, and it undermines the progress Democrats like Kim have fought for in Congress.

This bill won’t make America better, it won’t uplift everyone, it won’t build an economy that works for all of us; _**it’ll do the exact opposite.**_

That’s why Kim voted no—and why she’s counting on people like you to join her in their opposition of the Republican agenda. **Enough is enough.**

[**We reject this harmful bill, and we stand with leaders like Kim who are fighting for real progress. It strips funding from critical healthcare services, threatens rural hospitals that families in our district rely on, guts incentives for clean energy investments, and it undermines the progress Democrats like Kim have fought for in Congress. That’s why Kim voted no—and why she’s counting on people like you to join her in their opposition of the Republican agenda. Enough is enough. Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Places you’ll never see on a map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I bet this wasn’t on your radar when you woke up this morning | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2855153485e94f5e9bbfec1a0b5b2ada&_e=Uy75QXIlqX7f0Y01zMLMezzjHPikb7p_QecF8pnPn7hnWvdP9aXu6RuGbZ013GJ8sygG2z7APJcFTBVvjneeYvWjBZfmsaBWq1Oo16oW6TCKaAkWM-u4Z6iNPnFdMYiYj9yK-Ar0qGky6t8Evke-wdhbUFGoNC8Jr7aVRd0b68mFN5DLme_Y_PQJ4XtK7BseBlXZ1bOMICj8nLaFP-lY9bb6ElqRt4tQIyAxnBo6MYzDe8zAuNfXwdr1ScJ-dV6V14uXiUZZEMp2w5zdJwNPwaazqDV-QMPWD7hnxWQSntHYGWlSEDFdx544w3_v5JfKdB8JTtVvNUPFbXKF1le366F-U9ANZgBYS3HHe0hX1-jHIPFkeBowdUr8IY4FbUSDEJBYuPwBs035eWQD5Nb9nO0LJBKaMal6fGKC9PQPn5mArgOv_HbHS66uLD7HaQJoA8w13fwT7c1sbiwHUCCFE3V_5_cb1O7bgVNhb0hxfDh0Vgf0b93lZPGoc2x5p0hmHzqvO5NWka3p-9bowlDlpAPLOQBjvKMXmqPUOc0kaiRitCgeUFHo5H31p9dcWABAxlkBoRyKbkI3-pPh9C4melew3-r4fPkQSySYa52B2omlwDl8NSe5M3xPFmpAG_yAP6t-f_Ytfs_l8gaSvuSWCd1a-6Xwu63e7xxf_4xp0zMWovYiDhpucyGV7uY95Shcyxv0A5bFLGpNV5EhD2xNXl4j9ArVuJQXv12uLfj4RM2cgIeu1muimh5tGEXiea2HgSQorNmNBM-bP6ATq7d9Uczn0YtS6x92AP9rQs-zMvYLi5FXk_mi8EKC1AvFEuvz)

---
Peter,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to.

Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: _**Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss.**_ While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos.

Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away.

I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— _**just weeks after 9/11.**_

_**I didn’t wait. I went.**_

And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map.

I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter.

Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign.
_**

[**HELP ME PROTECT THE AMERICA WE LOVE
CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2855153485e94f5e9bbfec1a0b5b2ada&_e=Uy75QXIlqX7f0Y01zMLMezzjHPikb7p_QecF8pnPn7hnWvdP9aXu6RuGbZ013GJ8sygG2z7APJcFTBVvjneeYvWjBZfmsaBWq1Oo16oW6TCKaAkWM-u4Z6iNPnFdMYiYj9yK-Ar0qGky6t8Evke-wdhbUFGoNC8Jr7aVRd0b68mFN5DLme_Y_PQJ4XtK7BseBlXZ1bOMICj8nLaFP-lY9bb6ElqRt4tQIyAxnBo6MYzDe8zAuNfXwdr1ScJ-dV6V14uXiUZZEMp2w5zdJwNPwaazqDV-QMPWD7hnxWQSntHHkNcCfd1o5JX7F6sKNQQq1Q3YeBEGvIicK-y_d29qTc7gylueGPYMrm42-62H-itnm99lI7LQBOABhOgf4tyqjrflkRnFl46ScvIMQTzA1eIyIzEj4uC3G8Tiwqsx_pwiODWt31PE3uNjXvT5iE92C5ft11bDnPS9vDnqUuG_DBHcUlX3n3Eo7Tl2XyZiBCqUm67hyc1GDKdBmWszNMwlB4MqjNSoBuK9vTHtJ02yIJs0B0TcBcPhBMhzoxT9FT5aCzISOOBt3QzQ7X9Q4YPRuZbFlAZGVsH6KZOeXvvqbx1LiWk5NNYcnSKh20Epy4R42wtsS0WqTsCYlD8eAkKbCj5lf0TK2yvhiOBZsvisGFwFk8sBoo4BBjgFIgkI3OgBqMOTC9KWKutg2vl24mN7daZEyEgjCfNasKEha4ZpKgUAMQYTSgYilGZxVbDQu3Is37O-oauFoAtnP45W36DIdKgqc0M55D2urEDvRRmWPJedzaDSgRLOd0A2EeSEOj0_rTVwBfbnRV4Q7xvuRmeV)
**_ **_Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win._**
_
_ _[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2855153485e94f5e9bbfec1a0b5b2ada&_e=Uy75QXIlqX7f0Y01zMLMezzjHPikb7p_QecF8pnPn7hnWvdP9aXu6RuGbZ013GJ8w74MLM4eZSM3sr_ZXtFKza-N8l4kOgFqGZe7r4mCvbm2RKLGYYbaMDcU_1l1HLJRFyd9mIwu2XFUaRZOQCA6Jk31OLF6VKXUfHlrjViiWCaSMn18P1Nab22PZZTgj3T7I5UjcNMlmyli1VNq0nkdIilmWUko5KqPbkkB3C96EE8mBxL0cAvhgASQ6_6fLGMKuu1gr2qxeyyFTJcvgGx_5AIBrcjrXt1E-WkideyQ4tCgGw-LH80nJLE6ltMyYuo8zo1rtZJHKfwHweYaQCPj4HpausTwVbwCoW-cPaIgUHNfDdftTZpmR6lqwOhfKomP6oYitBwGlLHt27Lvwqz55foWmbp6sRO89Kq8e4mEOdhmUKJOIfKlbMFnuh9qdcIl0oAdRQzrA0Qb9cqJUCVPrh4u0IefbraamIQ0KJX4I5VCIpqWvDJT-QZFZcwPFb4Zfym3QC9adBmbwzgPgEq3DcncC6pcF21--WITHfiBI75cNtjVJSDf9vAj-XX1DgAofuPXt0L2Cd8yCURXA1y-y2qj9SIRWLFJKCwL2tCcsuDwgDNA13A6nVDOKljc8tuAbzWGSBxRe5NibHaLOgvqvIr-yc5LmHEYsGbkie0dPyZPjU5lHnrGspOqO52YKS8CjV0qkA3i2HBQ-5IDSoMFatLXZMKpi7Xx2-oxRyXVOILOjolPqOSq_b6PwWCByd9KPbYdnwoO4bFXAF3WhgK24ceimOplJ1O8Zk7r7iH9bQ8%3D)_

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. **But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for.**

And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for.

We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest.

**If you believe in what I’m fighting for,[even $5 goes a long way.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2855153485e94f5e9bbfec1a0b5b2ada&_e=Uy75QXIlqX7f0Y01zMLMezzjHPikb7p_QecF8pnPn7hnWvdP9aXu6RuGbZ013GJ8sygG2z7APJcFTBVvjneeYvWjBZfmsaBWq1Oo16oW6TCKaAkWM-u4Z6iNPnFdMYiYj9yK-Ar0qGky6t8Evke-wdhbUFGoNC8Jr7aVRd0b68mFN5DLme_Y_PQJ4XtK7BseBlXZ1bOMICj8nLaFP-lY9bb6ElqRt4tQIyAxnBo6MYzDe8zAuNfXwdr1ScJ-dV6V14uXiUZZEMp2w5zdJwNPwaazqDV-QMPWD7hnxWQSntEqzIzw-rMIhM_R0X5H0zTPtUkwFgWw5lA3lYU3sh5OD_DwS3LU5B4JQ3y5VZdBBSsFvnSwHEaVdDJnGPFtdVaAjnvxwmCCDsVImuNRjhNIgVGLIHr7oSrF1rCV9Z-6FDPYfNIw9YeQThRnm_qBrXCddiIoZhj-fgP2ce5HIPXBbXEdXhwURy1CYhy9-VdB6wGi14wJirC6nNQ8b4jkzWwgchGhpKX3uhCT2mxdNey_h-8mNl_fiUCsY-891V6y0-zQDJj1KU3pn2e4L5nHeDH-E2R-wI5XjLEN90rf5FnNC8NrF14PLRE4XnBU0nhghY2rgZnQ6M1EXSI6AqMCeedVHrSha7LkfTlRjJXPXblykfjiPkvQ-T_Ujra7-XnAIwOkY6wLEGUvoH7nFao7yD_ivnKcjXh1J48mLysN3_V74a2muOJlBSDlx1-Z_fvA7WqXj_EKQfFxc22hcC3LX2u_Z1PQHvqUz9qXN9xadoZ1aFz1n6EjVWziCt47vNqMIKHo1uKApY4Rxnxljdb_y2JR)**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now.

Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together.

clean_body: I bet this wasn’t on your radar when you woke up this morning | Peter, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to. Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss. While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos. Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— just weeks after 9/11. I didn’t wait. I went. And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map. I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter. Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign. Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for. We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest. If you believe in what I’m fighting for, If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now. Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together. You’ve done your part for this country. In liberty Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: This bill could save lives.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Add your name to support the HEAL Act and expand care for immigrant families.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250706-5217-footer&t=1&akid=5217%2E420207%2E4TlyeD)
Hi Peter,
Right now, millions of immigrants are being denied access to basic health care. That includes essential workers, DACA recipients, and lawful permanent residents who are locked out of programs like Medicaid and the Affordable Care Act.
**This is a cruel injustice. It puts lives at risk. And it is a policy failure that Congress must correct.**
That is why I just reintroduced the HEAL for Immigrant Families Act with Senator Cory Booker and Congresswoman Nanette Barragán. This bill would finally eliminate the arbitrary and discriminatory barriers that keep immigrant families from getting the care they need.
**Here’s what the HEAL Act would do:**
* End the five-year waiting period for Medicaid and CHIP
* Open access to ACA coverage and subsidies for immigrants
* Advance health equity and save lives

No one should be denied health care because of where they were born. But that is exactly what’s happening under our current laws.
**If you agree that health care is a human right for everyone, I am asking you to take action now. We need to show Congress there is strong grassroots support for the HEAL Act.**
[**Add your name to demand equal health care for immigrant families today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250706-healact?source=em20250706-5217&akid=5217%2E420207%2E4TlyeD)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250706-healact?source=em20250706-5217&akid=5217%2E420207%2E4TlyeD)**
This fight is personal to me. I came to this country alone at 16. I have spent my life organizing for immigrant justice and pushing for a health care system that puts people first. And I will never stop fighting for justice for _everyone_ in this country.
Together we can make sure no one is left behind.
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250706-5217-footer&t=2&refcode2=5217_420207_4TlyeD&akid=5217%2E420207%2E4TlyeD)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=5217%2E420207%2E4TlyeD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5217%2E420207%2E4TlyeD)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: David Hogg
subject: We proved them wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
They say we don’t vote. They say we don’t care.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250706-1&t=1&akid=2348%2E587540%2E2ipukL)
Peter,
**They love to count young people out.**
They say we don’t vote. They say we don’t care. That we’re too naive, too disorganized, too idealistic to win in politics.
But in New York City, young people proved the doubters wrong. **Again.**
Zohran Mamdani, a bold progressive candidate with the support of Leaders We Deserve, defeated the status quo and won the Democratic primary in the NYC Mayor’s race.
And he did it because young people SHOWED UP.
We knocked on doors. We posted TikToks. We handed out flyers in seven languages. WE built an intergenerational coalition of people who were sick of the failed political establishment and ready to go hard for a candidate they _finally_ felt excited about.
**And we won.**
**We proved that when you show up for young people, they show up for you.**
This kind of movement is exactly what we’re building together at Leaders We Deserve. But this work doesn’t happen by accident – it takes organizing. It takes trust. And yeah, it takes money.
Billionaires and special interests love to bankroll the status quo. Us? Not so much. We rely on people just like you to fuel this work. That’s why these emails are so important.
We know every person reading this can’t make a donation today. But if you _can_ show your support, there has never been a better time to back our powerful movement.
**[Peter, please rush in a $5 contribution right now to support our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250706_zohran?refcode=em20250706-2348&amount=5&refcode2=2348_587540_2ipukL&akid=2348%2E587540%2E2ipukL)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250706_zohran?amount=5&refcode=em20250706-2348&refcode2=2348_587540_2ipukL&akid=2348%2E587540%2E2ipukL)**
Young people are ready to run for office, win elections, _and_ make the change we all want to see. But they can’t do it alone. Thanks for stepping up for the next generation.
— David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250706-1&t=2&refcode2=2348_587540_2ipukL&akid=2348%2E587540%2E2ipukL)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2348%2E587540%2E2ipukL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2348%2E587540%2E2ipukL)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Stop McConnell's Hand-Picked Senate Puppets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES ACTION AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
---
A new voice is emerging in Kentucky politics, and the establishment is already mobilizing against him. **Nate Morris** , a successful entrepreneur and ninth-generation Kentuckian, has launched a grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate that's sending shockwaves through the state's political establishment. With Mitch McConnell's political machine already gearing up to crush any challenge to their hand-picked candidates, Morris is racing against time to build the conservative movement needed to break their stranglehold on Kentucky politics. _**From Bootstrap Success to Political Insurgent**_ Morris's story embodies the American Dream that career politicians only talk about. Raised by a single mother in a union household, with 19 family members working at the local auto plant, Morris understands working-class struggles firsthand. His grandfather, who led the local auto union, inspired him to never accept "no" for an answer. That determination paid off. With just a $10,000 line of credit, Morris founded Rubicon, building it into one of America's largest waste and recycling companies operating in 50 states and 20 countries. After 12 years as CEO, growing the company to nearly $700 million in annual revenue, he launched Morris Industries to tackle America's biggest challenges. **Now he's taking on his biggest challenge yet: the Washington establishment.** Unlike the typical McConnell-approved candidates who talk tough during campaigns then cave in Washington, Morris has laid out an uncompromising conservative agenda: ▶︎ **Immigration** : Complete opposition to amnesty, ending birthright citizenship, mass deportations, and a temporary immigration pause until illegal entries are addressed ▶︎ **Health Freedom** : Full support for Trump and RFK Jr.'s Make America Healthy Again initiative ▶︎ **Protecting Children** : Banning hormone treatments for minors and defunding schools pushing woke ideology ▶︎ **Second Amendment** : Repealing the Biden-McConnell gun control bill and stopping credit card companies from blocking gun purchases ▶︎ **Election Integrity** : Cutting federal funds to states refusing voter ID requirements ▶︎ **Economic Revival** : Backing Trump's working-class tax cuts and tariff policies to bring jobs home **Time is running out.** [**Please support Nate Morris for Senate today!**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ebf9ccfec94d4de3b071fde2f9584122&_e=7558QzxYeItWLL2CWtNSA5N0xq5b-tYv_C6KstfhLajOX3gXpSGwKS4ReOAVdRrF3fPkFQu_to_OsveI2TZiuZ62JrmONUhgUfNqrKlMlVjJrOsromCZUsAkExcvjlH1yBgbNKnZ2TVV135lcPfI_PhTTXd_Zddv1A-lOp90xPV1dwti4kepYyz0r9CA-OmvK94UELwtlYCbOTx7GnbF4QUqcFnYoiqwaVJVCAvg9wONg7wa33KZU3lT1RrVku4aviI3XfEMCjv53-LspS3PV7b5vU7fzer5uRR83lfeKaxa2dxQX_QPgxirZf7Zhhcy6kibEqMpK2jBaiB_2jznEsjME1w6ghv3VFCKlRYjr0Yli13uySlMsr48P1hg8lreQIkH2r0WX6QR5jrhQtEkbQ%3D%3D) McConnell's political network, flush with establishment money and deep-state backing, is already moving to ensure another RINO puppet wins this seat. They've seen what happens when outsiders like Morris gain momentum, and they're determined to stop him before his campaign can take root. Morris has been one of the few Kentucky Republicans brave enough to criticize McConnell by name, calling out his betrayals of President Trump and the America-First agenda. That courage has made him a target, but it's also exactly why conservatives must rally now. _**Why Your Support Matters**_ While Morris achieved business success, he knows this fight requires something money alone can't buy: a passionate grassroots movement. The establishment will outspend him with their billionaire donors and special interest money. But they can't match the power of committed conservatives joining together. Every day counts. While McConnell's machine organizes to protect their power, Morris needs patriots to step up immediately. Your support today – whether $5, $50, or $500 – sends a message that Kentucky conservatives are done with RINO representation. **This is about more than one Senate seat. It's about whether President Trump will have the allies he needs to implement his agenda, or whether McConnell's saboteurs will continue blocking America-First policies from within.** _**Take Action Today**_ The window to build a winning grassroots campaign is closing fast. The McConnell establishment is counting on conservatives to wait, to hesitate, to assume someone else will step up. Don't let them win by default. [**Rush your donation now**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ebf9ccfec94d4de3b071fde2f9584122&_e=7558QzxYeItWLL2CWtNSA5N0xq5b-tYv_C6KstfhLajOX3gXpSGwKS4ReOAVdRrF3fPkFQu_to_OsveI2TZiuZ62JrmONUhgUfNqrKlMlVgLfZmZpERVtUS85JjDM6vODcvn-n2ZQmYonwHvs1XwihqRqrx43kwihbB2JCxl1R9LOzThuiA35BJFYq1q3DeUl8jJWQZF8AHNCQAKTN7f0nZobjHlD6gepTLqHIYeVXFJBdIQUvL59jswm7Avm6Swigj8-H5feg7HZzBtfty_pUIPWBkpNOk53xrd4hiOHzST14VSeOtqQ-J89qqevnsHQ4XOFDFjqFtx00pDv9fSnJHeb8zQN63b2p1ro7nCQTpSChjDbbJMOp-UC0i0xNmJ0_nsK553Qh8-NVOpLp4SHw%3D%3D) to help Nate Morris defeat the RINO machine and ensure Kentucky sends a true conservative fighter to the Senate. Whether it's $5 or $500, every contribution fuels the grassroots army needed to overcome the establishment's millions. Kentucky deserves better than another McConnell puppet and America needs senators who will fight for Trump's agenda, not undermine it. The time to act is now – before the establishment's money drowns out the voice of real conservatives. [**Stand with Nate Morris today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ebf9ccfec94d4de3b071fde2f9584122&_e=7558QzxYeItWLL2CWtNSA5N0xq5b-tYv_C6KstfhLajOX3gXpSGwKS4ReOAVdRrF3fPkFQu_to_OsveI2TZiuZ62JrmONUhgUfNqrKlMlVj42CmvGNX8whgPACNmZMz0acmf6ofvjX6GG0t2lf1iV_mPzAi__-1W_rZvq01CMs7RExzY8zmLKQtWfaEWFkstiJCr4Ff5I9Y9jbw1aB4rQ1A0U28JaS5zcf_I066wBnubIdQ5DyEcNcsQOk3jek28uK90Ey8f8Dod5ThwW7VfTuyu1-GT-5RtdYA6aKJOnvww3aqDwY_au42Pt1o-D9s0SDL5yJTNP3kvLBKQRpsHiB9A3qiwiCyMqtp5ZeeQKQ-ZBvvtswYUA1ChvCMS_PucoQfh2vdmK8SZHRhVVtdCaw%3D%3D) Tomorrow may be too late.

clean_body: | | | A new voice is emerging in Kentucky politics, and the establishment is already mobilizing against him. Nate Morris , a successful entrepreneur and ninth-generation Kentuckian, has launched a grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate that's sending shockwaves through the state's political establishment. With Mitch McConnell's political machine already gearing up to crush any challenge to their hand-picked candidates, Morris is racing against time to build the conservative movement needed to break their stranglehold on Kentucky politics. From Bootstrap Success to Political Insurgent Morris's story embodies the American Dream that career politicians only talk about. Raised by a single mother in a union household, with 19 family members working at the local auto plant, Morris understands working-class struggles firsthand. His grandfather, who led the local auto union, inspired him to never accept "no" for an answer. That determination paid off. With just a $10,000 line of credit, Morris founded Rubicon, building it into one of America's largest waste and recycling companies operating in 50 states and 20 countries. After 12 years as CEO, growing the company to nearly $700 million in annual revenue, he launched Morris Industries to tackle America's biggest challenges. Now he's taking on his biggest challenge yet: the Washington establishment. Unlike the typical McConnell-approved candidates who talk tough during campaigns then cave in Washington, Morris has laid out an uncompromising conservative agenda: ▶︎ Immigration : Complete opposition to amnesty, ending birthright citizenship, mass deportations, and a temporary immigration pause until illegal entries are addressed ▶︎ Health Freedom : Full support for Trump and RFK Jr.'s Make America Healthy Again initiative ▶︎ Protecting Children : Banning hormone treatments for minors and defunding schools pushing woke ideology ▶︎ Second Amendment : Repealing the Biden-McConnell gun control bill and stopping credit card companies from blocking gun purchases ▶︎ Election Integrity : Cutting federal funds to states refusing voter ID requirements ▶︎ Economic Revival : Backing Trump's working-class tax cuts and tariff policies to bring jobs home Time is running out. McConnell's political network, flush with establishment money and deep-state backing, is already moving to ensure another RINO puppet wins this seat. They've seen what happens when outsiders like Morris gain momentum, and they're determined to stop him before his campaign can take root. Morris has been one of the few Kentucky Republicans brave enough to criticize McConnell by name, calling out his betrayals of President Trump and the America-First agenda. That courage has made him a target, but it's also exactly why conservatives must rally now. Why Your Support Matters While Morris achieved business success, he knows this fight requires something money alone can't buy: a passionate grassroots movement. The establishment will outspend him with their billionaire donors and special interest money. But they can't match the power of committed conservatives joining together. Every day counts. While McConnell's machine organizes to protect their power, Morris needs patriots to step up immediately. Your support today – whether $5, $50, or $500 – sends a message that Kentucky conservatives are done with RINO representation. This is about more than one Senate seat. It's about whether President Trump will have the allies he needs to implement his agenda, or whether McConnell's saboteurs will continue blocking America-First policies from within. Take Action Today The window to build a winning grassroots campaign is closing fast. The McConnell establishment is counting on conservatives to wait, to hesitate, to assume someone else will step up. Don't let them win by default. to help Nate Morris defeat the RINO machine and ensure Kentucky sends a true conservative fighter to the Senate. Whether it's $5 or $500, every contribution fuels the grassroots army needed to overcome the establishment's millions. Kentucky deserves better than another McConnell puppet and America needs senators who will fight for Trump's agenda, not undermine it. The time to act is now – before the establishment's money drowns out the voice of real conservatives. Tomorrow may be too late. | TAKE ACTION Support Nate Morris for U.S. Senate | | Text SENATE to (877) 838-9388 for exclusive updates and invitations. | Peter, I wanted to send a quick message to introduce myself.

My name is Ghazala Hashmi. I moved to the United States when I was four years old and settled in the Richmond area after marrying my husband, Azhar. For thirty years, I fought for the next generation as an educator and advocate. Then, in 2019, I took a leap of faith and flipped a pivotal seat in the Virginia Senate.

_Now, I'm honored to stand alongside Abigail Spanberger and Jay Jones as your Democratic nominee for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia._

I've always centered my campaigns around the needs of working Virginians, and this year is no different.

Our ticket is fighting for the parents working multiple jobs struggling to afford childcare; for the newlywed couples searching for an affordable first home; for the millions who are outraged by the chaos coming out of Washington and pleading for leaders who'll focus on creating a better future — not make their present circumstances even harder.

You have my word: _I will keep standing up to far-right extremists like Winsome Earle-Sears and my opponent, John Reid._

But this election will come down to which side is willing to put in the time, energy, and money to win. [_**That's why I hope you'll use this link today to split a contribution between Abigail and me.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110996240/555881765/-1236904685?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY4MzcwYzktOWI1YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=15HFnYTKEOI5Nt7bw1nvoUY2M2CWKg48y7ADSh4O7pY=)

Ghazala

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: A big announcement
body:
We’re celebrating America’s 250th

| | | | |
---
Friend, I’m excited to announce that in celebration of America’s 250th birthday, I’m giving away one of my favorite guns!
**The FN M249S PARA is one of the most iconic guns in American history, and now you have a chance to win mine!**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aL7M/?__vbtrk=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[ENTER NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aL7M/?__vbtrk=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
For two and a half centuries, we’ve fought off tyrants, defended our Constitution, and kept the flame of freedom burning bright. Now, it’s time to honor that legacy with a giveaway that screams AMERICAN PRIDE.
**The M249 SAW PARA is the perfect embodiment of American greatness... and it could be YOURS.** **_[Are you ready to claim it](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aL7M/?__vbtrk=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?**

I’m so excited to celebrate 250 years of Independence for our beloved country, and I would love for you to **_[celebrate with me by entering for your chance to win](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aL7M/?__vbtrk=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!**
_In Liberty,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aL7M/?__vbtrk=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aL7M/?__vbtrk=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNzE2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

When I moved to Charleston over 15 years ago, I actually thought of Lindsey as a statesman.
I didn’t agree with him on policy, but I thought he had some integrity.
Now? I can barely stomach watching him speak. He’s the embodiment of everything that’s wrong with the Republican Party – spineless, shameless, and completely out of touch.
He stands for nothing. _That’s the opposite of me._
I’m a pediatrician and a mom. I’m not a career politician. I’m running for Senate because I know exactly why I’m here: to fight for kids, healthcare, for our future.
I know tough fights and even if the path is hard, I believe Lindsey Graham has to be held accountable. He doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years.

Seriously — the same Donald Trump who escalated a conflict in the Middle East, sent troops into American cities to intimidate peaceful protesters, and has threatened to invade our allies.
Trump’s actions have created CHAOS at home and abroad and endangered our democracy. In other words: **Get real, Buddy.** 🙄

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: We’re under digital attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. The GOP knows CA-25 is instrumental to flipping the House — and this campaign has them worried. **So let’s give them something to worry about.**
If we don’t respond right now, they could define this race before we even get out of the gate. We need a powerful push from our grassroots team to cut through the noise and stop the NRCC’s disinformation campaign in its tracks.
[Will you step up today? The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

name: PA Dems
subject: SCOTUS can’t take away our power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110997043/555884343/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250706_FR_SCOTUSpp_0_3MO_padems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDYzY2E4My1hMjVhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wa63OL96PrAEyIDWgjapsyFSFs_VED1HLWQw3FsjMM8=) Peter —

Last month, the Supreme Court delivered a devastating blow to reproductive healthcare, ruling that states can now decide **_not_** to fund reproductive services through Medicaid.

That means clinics providing non-abortion medical services, like STD testing, cancer screenings, preventative care, breast exams, and access to contraception can be defunded.

**Make no mistake: this is about control over our bodies and our decisions._But we aren’t powerless either._**

To protect life-saving reproductive healthcare and testing for Pennsylvanians, we need to build a strong blue base and go on the offense. clean_body: | | = Peter — Last month, the Supreme Court delivered a devastating blow to reproductive healthcare, ruling that states can now decide not to fund reproductive services through Medicaid. That means clinics providing non-abortion medical services, like STD testing, cancer screenings, preventative care, breast exams, and access to contraception can be defunded. Make no mistake: this is about control over our bodies and our decisions.But we aren’t powerless either. To protect life-saving reproductive healthcare and testing for Pennsylvanians, we need to build a strong blue base and go on the offense. And that costs money. = | | = Pennsylvania doesn’t have to defund reproductive care if it doesn’t want to. We need to make it clear that defending our freedoms, our choices, and our decisions over our bodies is priority. We aren’t giving up. We know what we have to do to protect our families and communities: win races across Pennsylvania. We need your help to execute. PA’s judicial future is on the ballot this November with three Supreme Court retention elections. = | = It’s down to us to protect our own. PA Dems = | Follow us on , , and **! **I put a bullet through Osama bin Laden 's skull, Peter. **

It's Rob O'Neill. I'm a Navy SEAL. At my core, I am built to serve this country; I will do _**WHATEVER**_ it takes to make America safe and prosperous.

I hope you share that sentiment. And if you don't, then the rest of this message just isn't for you. Feel free to delete this email and move on with your life if you're not committed to American excellence.

**If you 're still reading, then I thank you for your commitment. And now, I'm counting on you to rise to the occasion, Peter. **

My Navy SEAL brother, Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden, needs your help. He served our nation for over 25 years in the Navy and fought extremists from the Taliban to Al-Qaeda. He's one of the most patriotic & hard-working men I know. Today, he's still serving our country by representing true American patriots like you & me in Congress.

It's Rob O'Neill. I'm a Navy SEAL. At my core, I am built to serve this country; I will do WHATEVER it takes to make America safe and prosperous. I hope you share that sentiment. And if you don't, then the rest of this message just isn't for you. Feel free to delete this email and move on with your life if you're not committed to American excellence. If you 're still reading, then I thank you for your commitment. And now, I'm counting on you to rise to the occasion, Peter. My Navy SEAL brother, Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden, needs your help. He served our nation for over 25 years in the Navy and fought extremists from the Taliban to Al-Qaeda. He's one of the most patriotic & hard-working men I know. Today, he's still serving our country by representing true American patriots like you & me in Congress. | | "SUPPORT NAVY SEAL DERRICK VAN ORDEN" | "Derrick Van Orden" The Left is doing everything in its power to undermine and neutralize Derrick. They've launched vicious attacks and smear campaigns. They're spending THOUSANDS trying to get rid of this Navy SEAL! Just like on the Teams, Derrick fights for everyday Americans. name: NO KINGS IN AMERICA! (via VPP)
subject: Elizabeth Warren’s urgent call to action >>

body:
This fight isn’t over!
| **FIRST:** Trump used his unchecked power to DECIMATE Medicaid, GUT Social Security offices, and END birthright citizenship. _Even the Supreme Court refused to stop him!_

**THEN:** Sen. Elizabeth Warren issued an URGENT call to action for Democrats: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250706_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=20511%2E878179%2EHGFS9B) **SO NOW,** we’re launching into action to reign in Trump’s authoritarian takeover before he can completely DESTROY our country!

**Do your part by 11:59pm:**

[**Should Congress pass the No Kings Act and stop Trump from becoming a dictator? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250706_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=20511%2E878179%2EHGFS9B) | [YES, TRUMP IS NOT ABOVE THE LAW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250706_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=20511%2E878179%2EHGFS9B)

subject: Retaliation is the MAGA Machine’s M.O.

body:
| The MAGA Machine doesn’t know how to govern — **they just know how to retaliate.** When Californians held demonstrations against Trump’s mass deportation operation last week, he spent hundreds of millions of dollars. Kristi Noem arrested Rep. LaMonica McIver and detained Sen. Alex Padilla because they dared speak out against her and the DHS. **In true authoritarian fashion, this administration continues to raise the stakes of speaking out against them. But I’ve been the target of their retribution before, and I’m not afraid to continue holding their feet to the fire to demand accountability now.** [**Friend, our path to taking down Trump goes _directly_ through the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees. And as one of the senior-most Democrats on both, I’m ready to go toe-to-toe with MAGA. If you’re ready to help us take down Trump once and for all, split a donation between me and Seth Moulton so we can be ready for any and all attacks they throw my way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110998236/555888107/265156787?refcode=250706_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg5NDkwYi1hYjVhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Do37AG235MldBWQENvm9YuQELAGgHPBBp-sJTqFLvY4=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110998237/555888108/-288956247?refcode=250706_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mjg5NDkwYi1hYjVhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Do37AG235MldBWQENvm9YuQELAGgHPBBp-sJTqFLvY4=) I’ve been kicked off the House Intelligence Committee for my investigations into Trump’s role in instigating January 6. **I’ve been placed on FBI Director Kash Patel’s “hit list” for my work holding corrupt Republicans accountable. body:

We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. name: Research Survey (Voter Action Project)
subject: Poll: Term limits for the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project
BCJ: Why Term Limits for Supreme Court Justices Make Sense [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/BrennanCenter_SCOTUS_TermLimits.png]
Judicial historians and other nonpartisan justice activists are restarting their campaigns for term limits on Supreme Court justices. They argue that lifetime appointments are misplaced in the common era and that a rotation of federal justices off the Supreme Court and back to the Court of Appeals would bring a larger sense of fairness to the proceedings in front of our highest court.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Supreme Court justices be term-limited?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=ujGhCLR3vjGGyAwgQbNJI15YdbNdxZZyxBjXN5mipr8AhoRxZ31Qhm+6t9GR43jSE26L+jAI8SGoOTWir8JkM2Po3WUb8KX8U90+YHuaf+o=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=ujGhCLR3vjGGyAwgQbNJI15YdbNdxZZyxBjXN5mipr8AhoRxZ31Qhm+6t9GR43jSE26L+jAI8SGoOTWir8JkM2Po3WUb8KX8U90+YHuaf+o=]

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I want to show you a few photos from our recent day in Taos:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I spent the day in Taos meeting with voters and visiting local businesses.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)
In a moment, I’m about to ask if you can **[make your first $5 donation to fund some exciting upcoming stops for our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250706_1_trail?amount=5&refcode=em20250706-3001&refcode2=3001_400544_YUhEhs&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)**
First, I wanted to give you a quick recap of a recent day I spent meeting voters in Taos.
After starting the day with tribal leaders and young people of Taos Pueblo, we stopped at Mante's Chow Cart. Their red chile, beans, and a taco gave me the energy I needed before a long day meeting with voters and visiting local businesses.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250706_1_trail?amount=5&refcode=em20250706-3001&refcode2=3001_400544_YUhEhs&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)
_No stop in Taos is complete without a visit to Mante’s Chow Cart._
Next, we popped into a few local businesses, like Re-Threads Consignment and World Cup Coffee. As a former small-business owner myself, it was energizing to see all these businesses bustling with customers out enjoying the sunny day.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250706_1_trail?amount=5&refcode=em20250706-3001&refcode2=3001_400544_YUhEhs&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)
_I ended up leaving the thrift store with a dress, sweater, and summer jacket._
At the coffee shop, we met a local artist who suggested we head over to the Taos Artist Collective. During our visit, I was excited to meet an artist I’ve been a fan of for years, and also discover new artists and their beautiful artwork. Being there, it was easy to see why New Mexico’s creative and entrepreneurial spirit holds up our local economies.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250706_1_trail?amount=5&refcode=em20250706-3001&refcode2=3001_400544_YUhEhs&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)
_I loved our stop at the Taos Artist Collective._
My trip was complete after a wonderful visit with the Taos Valley Acequia Association. I’m so grateful to them for the work they do to protect our water and preserve our New Mexico traditions. Meeting people who are so passionate about their culture and community inspires me to keep fighting for ways to improve the lives of Taoseños and New Mexicans across our beautiful state.
**[It’s so important for my team and me to be able to continue spending days out on the campaign trail and hearing directly from working New Mexicans. Will you donate $5 to our campaign right now so we can keep planning more campaign stops across our state?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250706_1_trail?amount=5&refcode=em20250706-3001&refcode2=3001_400544_YUhEhs&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250706_1_trail?amount=5&refcode=em20250706-3001&refcode2=3001_400544_YUhEhs&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)**
Thanks for being a part of this campaign team. Talk soon,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250706-1&t=2&refcode2=3001_400544_YUhEhs&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3001%2E400544%2EYUhEhs)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
