name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Do you feel free?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITZXy7I5bK89N02f9yh_2KLC8Q7S7lm0--eCH-AQ20JTi2q8Q8QDNMpiOKs7Ir7dVixp2TSvnswmc9IzW9Wjg_GIHidKhZ6ORYGSvNvi_qECm2QD0mtXtGZgeFylLOe_oEXCk9WBf6WdgJaUHOxhbML8HK8VJIi-GndsgQlxbTw1x6VG03Xq2M0NtwnLvX1Lac/4hy/FUqY40icSoiNFdURBXYm0A/h0/h001.UnBnOp80Y44dpySGiHFuo2Y9QphY8ZqZ8jsGH02DMEE)
---
Peter,

This weekend, we barbecued. We waved flags. We watched fireworks light the sky and talked about liberty.

But I kept thinking about that old George Orwell quote:

_" A hungry man is not a free man."

_**So I want to ask: do you feel free right now?

**Because millions of Americans are working longer hours for less pay. Rents are up. Groceries are more expensive than ever. Our neighbors are being abducted by masked men claiming to be federal agents who refuse to show ID - let alone a warrant.

And all we hear from certain Democratic leaders is that we just need to stand back and wait for the MAGA agenda to collapse on its own.

But it hasn't. It keeps winning. Because silence is not a strategy. It is surrender.

**That is exactly what we saw with Trump 's budget.

**If Marie Gluesenkamp Perez was really concerned with this budget she could have worked Democratic leadership to organize against it.

They could have held town halls, rallied swing districts, and truly warned the public about what was coming.

But they did not.

Instead, Marie was voting with MAGA: proudly being the SOLE Democrat to approve the Defense budget and the INSANE new Homeland Security budget out of committee. Marie voted for the Laken Riley Act and supported pro-ICE resolutions. Then she jetted off to headline WelcomeFest, the donor retreat funded by some of the same billionaires behind this cruel budget.

You cannot call yourself pro-worker and side with extremists slashing protections for the working poor.

You cannot claim to serve our community when you're funding and praising Trump's ICE Gestapo tearing families apart.

You cannot claim to back unions while speaking at events funded by the people trying to destroy them.

You cannot write op-eds to Speaker Mike Johnson promising to "throw him a bone" while he pushes through the biggest tax giveaway to the ultra wealthy in a generation.

**Unlike Marie, I am not here to cosplay as blue-collar while cashing hedge fund checks.

**I am a dad from a working-class district. I'm a stay at home parent and know what it means to stretch a paycheck, to juggle child care, to worry about whether a medical bill could wreck everything.

That is the life I've lived. And that is the fight I have stepped up to lead.

Because freedom is not just about what you are allowed to say. It is about whether you can afford a life worth living.

[**If that is the kind of freedom you believe in, chip in now and help us build a campaign that fights for it --every day, for everyone, no exceptions.

**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUALMt5jlLjPA60jqxErN_PJA8Uy2ET6NDk_zhccaYYKUiHmNg0YwhMoGGgYI3oQjcMt48Q3eTKrHb-QfMsCT7OPiISErlHwn8OAR84WF5xd4mJJyI8_BzjrpjmK3sqZddmDA8uq-mc8lo5NFvBdjG0p7kY-fJPcO1934XKXEnJ9bGAyWJ9i8eb5o7arX09HhTcHMxa6avyHnqz-rxuKigulcgp6c_ue-iHIzz8JjiPI1zGzqKHVUREVWobgh1JJrCWMmG7mv_hlnvPXHv4b-1pX/4hy/FUqY40icSoiNFdURBXYm0A/h1/h001.xkMHvTQeBHqd1GfHFo54-Aj9Nx3weansSliBDN6PTGQ)Let's Heal Washington!

Brent
---

clean_body: | | Peter, This weekend, we barbecued. We waved flags. We watched fireworks light the sky and talked about liberty. But I kept thinking about that old George Orwell quote: " A hungry man is not a free man." So I want to ask: do you feel free right now? Because millions of Americans are working longer hours for less pay. Rents are up. Groceries are more expensive than ever. Our neighbors are being abducted by masked men claiming to be federal agents who refuse to show ID - let alone a warrant. And all we hear from certain Democratic leaders is that we just need to stand back and wait for the MAGA agenda to collapse on its own. But it hasn't. It keeps winning. Because silence is not a strategy. It is surrender. That is exactly what we saw with Trump 's budget. If Marie Gluesenkamp Perez was really concerned with this budget she could have worked Democratic leadership to organize against it. They could have held town halls, rallied swing districts, and truly warned the public about what was coming. But they did not. Instead, Marie was voting with MAGA: proudly being the SOLE Democrat to approve the Defense budget and the INSANE new Homeland Security budget out of committee. Marie voted for the Laken Riley Act and supported pro-ICE resolutions. Then she jetted off to headline WelcomeFest, the donor retreat funded by some of the same billionaires behind this cruel budget. You cannot call yourself pro-worker and side with extremists slashing protections for the working poor. You cannot claim to serve our community when you're funding and praising Trump's ICE Gestapo tearing families apart. You cannot claim to back unions while speaking at events funded by the people trying to destroy them. You cannot write op-eds to Speaker Mike Johnson promising to "throw him a bone" while he pushes through the biggest tax giveaway to the ultra wealthy in a generation. Unlike Marie, I am not here to cosplay as blue-collar while cashing hedge fund checks. I am a dad from a working-class district. I'm a stay at home parent and know what it means to stretch a paycheck, to juggle child care, to worry about whether a medical bill could wreck everything. That is the life I've lived. And that is the fight I have stepped up to lead. Because freedom is not just about what you are allowed to say. It is about whether you can afford a life worth living. Heal Washington! Brent | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . subject: quick update for you

body:
Sorry to email you over the long weekend, but I wanted to bring you up to speed with our race for OR-05.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110998694/555889783/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2IxZGE4MWQtYWU1YS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SCh5crXxLKHf9fOufoJKXqljRQ1434fWiaffD5EPYg0=) Hey — it’s Belle, Janelle’s finance director! Sorry to email you over the long weekend, but I wanted to bring you up to speed with our race for OR-05. As we get closer and closer to 2026, it’s my job to make sure our campaign is on track to protect this swing seat and keep Janelle fighting in Congress for a lower cost of living, affordable healthcare, and a better future for all Americans. Last year, Janelle was one of only six Democrats to flip a Republican-held seat, and she won by just a few thousands votes. Now, Janelle’s one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country, and Republicans are already attacking her — so we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for even a second. **[That’s why I’m asking for your help: Will you donate now to ensure Janelle has the resources to defend OR-05? # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd432215-1a26-4653-9fb0-2cb9c13d5a01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Anonymous Female Athlete**
In a landmark move, the Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights has **[sided with female athletes at the University of Pennsylvania](https://substack.com/redirect/b4066fb9-5d4d-464f-9fb7-0a6a4e311eea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who were forced to compete against Lia Thomas, a transgender swimmer born a biological male. For women across the country--athletes and non-athletes alike, this is not just a victory, but a reminder that Title IX still matters.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HL0P0L8jor5HLXAyMmTijCLFLTFa6iHWdu86EEbW_KQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167381204)
Title IX, enacted in 1972, was a revolutionary federal law that banned sex-based discrimination in education, including athletics. For the first time, women were guaranteed equal access to scholarships, teams, and resources, providing not just fairness, but a chance at equal opportunity. There was no greater testament to this than its impact on female sports.
> _By the time compliance with Title IX became mandatory in 1978, the law had already made an impact on sports. In a cover story that June,[ TIME reported](https://substack.com/redirect/a2d53756-1b20-48cb-9ed1-0c9c1166de99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that six times as many high school girls were participating in competitive high school sports than in 1970. ([History.com](https://substack.com/redirect/2f53b649-5484-421d-b98e-53a5a0b13781?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))_
In our generation, it is easy to lose sight that not so long ago, women's sports were certifiably nonexistent. Many of us grew up being chauffeured from field to court, participating in rec leagues, high school sports teams, and clubs. Oftentimes, the mothers who drove us did not have those same opportunities.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**Together With Strand**
# Trouble going to the bathroom?
# [Massage This Pressure Point In Your Knees!](https://substack.com/redirect/078625b0-00ca-4be4-b3f3-80385157e47e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This bowel relief massage trick was kept locked and sealed...
But the TRUTH is finally out!
By pressing this knee pressure point for exactly 10 seconds...
You can dramatically improve bowel movement...
So you can go instantly, no matter how constipated you are!
But only a few people know where this tricky pressure point is exactly located...
**[Watch this video](https://substack.com/redirect/078625b0-00ca-4be4-b3f3-80385157e47e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to see where this pressure point is and how easy it is to get rid of digestive problems!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/078625b0-00ca-4be4-b3f3-80385157e47e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
**(Piece continued)**
In fact, as recently as the 1970s, women were _literally_ barred from running marathons. Officials claimed our bodies couldn't handle the distance. In 1967, Kathrine Switzer had to run the Boston Marathon under a disguised name, and was physically assaulted by a race official trying to drag her off the course.
**["He had shamed me so much in front of the whole world,"](https://substack.com/redirect/f1144203-cb30-4290-9cdb-41c0f4295cf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Switzer said, referring to the official who tried to physically pull her out of the race.
Sound familiar?
According to three UPenn female swimmers filing a lawsuit against UPenn, they were allegedly told by the administration that if they spoke out with concerns about the fairness of competing against a biological male, **[they would, more or less, be ruined.](https://substack.com/redirect/9732a394-744c-4a7b-815d-2d997f88d7fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HL0P0L8jor5HLXAyMmTijCLFLTFa6iHWdu86EEbW_KQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167381204)
We have seen young women lose out on titles, scholarships, and podium spots because they were forced to compete against biological males who identify as female. The science is not controversial: biological men, even after hormone therapy, retain physical advantages in strength, lung capacity, and muscle mass. In competitive sports, where fractions of a second matter, that difference makes all the difference.
For a long time, women speaking up have been ignored or vilified, just like when they fought for _space_ on the court, field, running route, classroom, and voting booth.
But thanks to the perseverance of current female sports advocates, the federal government has finally acknowledged what many have been afraid to say out loud: when you allow biological men into women's sports, it is the women who pay the price; a fact the majority agrees with, **[according to an NBC poll.](https://substack.com/redirect/e2412904-8e7a-44a7-b351-30c12a19f329?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd432215-1a26-4653-9fb0-2cb9c13d5a01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In recent months, there has been a hopeful shift in the narrative about biological men in female sports spaces. **[Superbowl ads](https://substack.com/redirect/2eaf7e15-414f-43fa-924b-b6c611a744ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , a thriving and growing **[female sports media](https://substack.com/redirect/d3381ad6-1a7b-4c53-b052-7f4ba3d12b83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** division (majorly driven by WNBA star Caitlin Clark), and Tuesday's Title IX verdict, there seems to be an empowering movement happening for women and girls.
This is not about denying anyone's humanity or dignity. It's about boundaries. We can--and must--respect everyone's identity without compromising fairness and safety for girls and women.
Title IX is one of the greatest civil rights achievements in modern American history. We owe it to the next generation of athletes to defend it. That means standing firm when it comes to preserving women's spaces - including sports.

This bowel relief massage trick was kept locked and sealed... But the TRUTH is finally out! By pressing this knee pressure point for exactly 10 seconds... You can dramatically improve bowel movement... So you can go instantly, no matter how constipated you are! But only a few people know where this tricky pressure point is exactly located... to see where this pressure point is and how easy it is to get rid of digestive problems! | | ---|---|--- (Piece continued) In fact, as recently as the 1970s, women were literally barred from running marathons. Officials claimed our bodies couldn't handle the distance. In 1967, Kathrine Switzer had to run the Boston Marathon under a disguised name, and was physically assaulted by a race official trying to drag her off the course. Switzer said, referring to the official who tried to physically pull her out of the race. Sound familiar? According to three UPenn female swimmers filing a lawsuit against UPenn, they were allegedly told by the administration that if they spoke out with concerns about the fairness of competing against a biological male, We have seen young women lose out on titles, scholarships, and podium spots because they were forced to compete against biological males who identify as female. The science is not controversial: biological men, even after hormone therapy, retain physical advantages in strength, lung capacity, and muscle mass. In competitive sports, where fractions of a second matter, that difference makes all the difference. For a long time, women speaking up have been ignored or vilified, just like when they fought for space on the court, field, running route, classroom, and voting booth. But thanks to the perseverance of current female sports advocates, the federal government has finally acknowledged what many have been afraid to say out loud: when you allow biological men into women's sports, it is the women who pay the price; a fact the majority agrees with, | | ---|---|--- In recent months, there has been a hopeful shift in the narrative about biological men in female sports spaces. , a thriving and growing division (majorly driven by WNBA star Caitlin Clark), and Tuesday's Title IX verdict, there seems to be an empowering movement happening for women and girls. This is not about denying anyone's humanity or dignity. It's about boundaries. We can--and must--respect everyone's identity without compromising fairness and safety for girls and women. Title IX is one of the greatest civil rights achievements in modern American history. We owe it to the next generation of athletes to defend it. That means standing firm when it comes to preserving women's spaces - including sports. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/4izjnaeoO_xdFkWvsv7G0aN1r08n0rf57-kNcUkq6wdvOZH125l8jY5h5s8hcPFkrrVxdYjYjyblgY2aZglvEC7Q-VRRUJlo628TxFhWhEUfzuxbDatJ57XVEpMj0g5BAavrTD1d1EVG_wHJ_8sb7AFqkQJpMqBRfhsZkp625fudHnlSKh22RYYAtVmrg5qEb8NN2pkr6SKf8KXB2eQfHSCODaP2cLpOiKBeJsxpZTIcdC3CYWaZUcRvIgsUTsVRh0M0U6BKfDudQNhEtfC4UPEQIO5NhncFO7DTlg_vkLaGfOgk02-1CQb8eu4llybcQkfedIeOn2HndKnaK5NFPYuogvXDAnDxVgSVBh6szOYVteCnbUrPWDUVbGzkaBvYrrPNpezR4c9X1ZTOyXrij_JfQfO99bNvV2elX-J7QMnsIxtp4bH3X6gCKzeRE1sjFBI8A7Q9rhmFcMzUqFQXOa1fw-MU5pw_fdOej1tRLRoES-xkzAO6xA3yTWoUzrOLcR85xneJQfHQMrBqboAbkjpWe9gNDs5s1fks06mryn8gmpK3A48ZZqUxOTHH0VsTdMqAC65kXd9SbKEcI3xF1H1YfHwqTZ065UwQVrTrMlJSH4J29OsC1PuKzDtlXLJPH_mjk1y5eQcI4nB9iAQgG4oolSnC2ouc30nuAE7VpXEByRdDeBpqH_e8rTCBnLicNpW8F7jnFWZYUKvh3JIWTYxsP2uS2TYqI43YdhnsXLe5oR7LPi-lsxxgknioAIrczCAMYCLZ5JHOHqh10ceUWlGIAynMVZ3LQdeIOlv3778lkqtIB8DgpW_XSDYpwtOamqgDUuMBVi-w0AhNnYGEPKuXBzIeXkKqNZycid7shA0vKeCoouw0s4ZXgqfwJ-1JmnpFE3vAskf0dtMpfQ/kzS_j-cxMs2894ET1-RsEkxrAcNZfesp/10) Friend, I didn’t get into this race because I was asked to by party leadership. I got in because I looked around, saw what was happening to our country. I saw the—let’s just call it what it is—weak response to Trump’s re-election campaign and his ruthless dismantling of our government and laws. And I knew I needed to step up. Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert are bringing nothing but chaos, extremism, and fear into communities that deserve real leadership. They’re working their asses off to throw thousands of folks in our district off Medicaid. And the truth is, the response from the top hasn’t been strong enough. Everywhere I travel, I ask the room: “Raise your hand if you think the Democratic leadership in DC is doing a good job standing up to Trump and his authoritarian agenda.” Guess how many hands go up? **Zero. Not one.** It’s the same in every corner of this district. I’ve seen your replies to our emails too — so many of you have told me you’ve stopped donating because you're frustrated. Because you want the party to be doing more. **I’m right there with you.** Too many are trying to play it safe while the far-right tears down institutions and attacks working families. That’s not good enough. Not when health care is on the line, democracy is under threat, and Trump is delivering on his promises of revenge and retribution. I’m a manufacturing engineer — not a party insider. I solve problems. I build things that work. And now, I’m building a campaign that’s about more than just flipping a seat — it’s about offering a new kind of leadership that fights like hell for the people who make this country work. I’m not in this race to cozy up to leadership. And I damn sure won’t be another rubber stamp for corporate-friendly policies. I’m in this race to build a coalition — of disaffected Democrats, independents, and even Republicans — to win this damn seat back. And to push the Democratic Party to become what it needs to be in this moment. Like I always say: **You don’t become the party of working people. You elect working people.** And that’s exactly what I intend to do. **[I’m asking you to chip in now to help us build this campaign from the ground up. If you believe we need stronger voices, bolder leadership, and real change — then I’m asking you to be part of this with clean_body: | | | Friend, I didn’t get into this race because I was asked to by party leadership. I got in because I looked around, saw what was happening to our country. I saw the—let’s just call it what it is—weak response to Trump’s re-election campaign and his ruthless dismantling of our government and laws. And I knew I needed to step up. Donald Trump and Lauren Boebert are bringing nothing but chaos, extremism, and fear into communities that deserve real leadership. They’re working their asses off to throw thousands of folks in our district off Medicaid. And the truth is, the response from the top hasn’t been strong enough. Everywhere I travel, I ask the room: “Raise your hand if you think the Democratic leadership in DC is doing a good job standing up to Trump and his authoritarian agenda.” Guess how many hands go up? Zero. Not one. It’s the same in every corner of this district. I’ve seen your replies to our emails too — so many of you have told me you’ve stopped donating because you're frustrated. Because you want the party to be doing more. I’m right there with you. Too many are trying to play it safe while the far-right tears down institutions and attacks working families. That’s not good enough. Not when health care is on the line, democracy is under threat, and Trump is delivering on his promises of revenge and retribution. I’m a manufacturing engineer — not a party insider. I solve problems. I build things that work. And now, I’m building a campaign that’s about more than just flipping a seat — it’s about offering a new kind of leadership that fights like hell for the people who make this country work. I’m not in this race to cozy up to leadership. And I damn sure won’t be another rubber stamp for corporate-friendly policies. I’m in this race to build a coalition — of disaffected Democrats, independents, and even Republicans — to win this damn seat back. And to push the Democratic Party to become what it needs to be in this moment. Like I always say: You don’t become the party of working people. You elect working people. And that’s exactly what I intend to do. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let’s get to work. In solidarity, John Padora Candidate for Congress, CO-04 John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205f09ldpvlwbx5wnqmp9ogo7hivqsq13yd8x5qzkhggf18gyw7omgiamk0nrmvd7zw3mzkm40rshm3wm53&__stmp=syzyea&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syzyea&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxokllo1byvrqu4raz13pylliuoe6rh2mmrqxtpyvm2sns3574py0k3wt81f09dutbkrlbnbiaxbomenuanko6md7v69ie3ywql3l62do5obo290ws99rxcarxen1qies3njo6c06txkxe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syzyea&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syzyea&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syzyea&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syzyea&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxokllo1byvrqu4raz13pylliuoe6rh2mmrqxtpyvm2sns3574py0k3wt81f09dutbkrlbnbiaxbomenuanko6md7v69ie3ywql3l62do5obo290ws99rxcarxen1qies3njo6c06txkxe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syzyea&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syzyea&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

_**Peter**_ , _**Grab your purse. Roll up your window. Lock the door.**_

That’s what life is like in the _**Democrat-run inner city.**_

Your head is constantly on a swivel and you do everything possible to stay safe from the _**rampant crime**_ – **_drug dealing_** , _**robbery**_ , _**human trafficking.**_

_**Peter**_ , my name is **Lauren Pena**. I’m a working-class **Republican** mom who’s running to flip a **blue** congressional district and show everyone that forgotten Americans matter. **[Do you have a minute?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/SpyjA_xf-Pz6ayPNwr9kMNtDBc9JXJjmq_zUzp8ge-oqlPGb7J07CpFQSFyIdMdKXd36r4M4DUB-f5aBjpKV8ALcjDcu00A-mexgvp-1GkRXeG540rXJkRTV6Z7anfFt15HJLb5x43FI-zprbHs8lN_vLOCT28d_zNOqsa3PCOJbDyBufR-BnHu44Nd_1CVhzas72HAKRpj54Hw1mdoHdfh9gSfVtdrPslHKqxx5GF_Oq_enG9tGK297NJwDoeRwORjGJ-5FO4i5fV5zcHu2i88xUIvuc5PwSsvzYbeka1Vgi6IVDTK_9O0XaH9F1tlX1SKTCO0bOV4eySPc2UiOfXnml1LKJfNaO1UpvsXZFvA83kiGLJ5pgSiyCCzGzJgqDEPJl-HMpsXji-DvgDb9xq0_P9Rdh0FKsVrBZjUgyTQhf-ny51sPph1zWrQEkepxYM0uETGgVgzeahZaSZQhrE8Bh8Qk9fwOjD-ttzXvwCEWnjyTIcpmiBp-rZtjucM2ZmNNP4_9F_GJt29A1t8BSDg2Sm8u_A7XvtO5IOIvkFgogRW0eRggCLmYgdcwfe33nUq_uPG-6AoqZqk58fRXeLngeHbrkooJWbv1Z1bSPWbNXPPqU-J6R9OSngCNs-bDaviNqVFDsVkOmJAjvyWQ5J6npyTSqh4yqVQBIuUYeKgkOvOzIsXiyP2m1jSyYubgFnttHVXPhFcjhaT4mI6i4XloqnxS3O-c655ZqhSIPxKgjxSs5oITjq9skoglbKZOGaywBMGgPbvFZr7CxdXLHzUn5mXwaZMC-98igPitiRDtOpNbBUkM/t8O9245056nYdJnV_MfMbEviiQIOAQj9/10)** I want to share why I’m for the people, not politics.

My opponent **Democrat Greg Casar** is the chair of the **Progressive Caucus** but he does **NOTHING to help our community.**

He’d rather go on an 8 hour “thirst strike” in front of the D.C. news cameras instead of actually working with Republicans to help the people in our district who go hungry and thirsty every night.

I’m the only **Republican** who can beat **Greg Casar** —because I can actually flip Democrat voters without compromising our values.

I’m a **human trafficking survivor** , **homeschool mother of 4** , and I know how to talk to my neighbors.

And yes, I’m a proud **Hispanic Republican**. No hyphens. No ifs, ands, or buts. _**I’m 100% America First!**_

If we want to flip this seat, we need a candidate who can bridge the divide, not deepen it. I’m that candidate—and I will win this district.

_**Peter**_ , I’m asking for your help today. **If you can chip in a small donation, we can grow this campaign and BEAT the Democrats!**

I’m not rich. I’ve struggled to make ends meet. So it’s hard to ask for money, but I know that if you can spare _**$5, $10, $25**_ , or any amount today, we can change our communities and our country for the better!

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: TRUTH: The kids will be okay
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

[Feathered Eagle-Logo (1)]
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63]

Friend,

I don’t get this excited often, but something BIG is happening on
college campuses across the United States.

Believe it or not, the younger generation is finally rejecting woke
and radical leftism. You saw this during Trump’s election - a major
shift in the 18-29 year old voters.

And the media hates it!

* “America’s Youngest Voters Turn Right” – Axios;
* “The Not-So-Woke Generation Z” – The Atlantic;
* “Are Zoomers Shifting Right?” – Newsweek; and
* “Analysis: Young and Non-White Voters Have Shifted Right Since
2020” – Washington Post.

Here’s a major reason why this is happening.

An organization called Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is
identifying, recruiting, and training college students to Make Liberty
Win. YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth
organization advancing liberty on campus.

In a moment, I will humbly ask you to send an urgent donation to Young
Americans for Liberty, but before I do that, let me explain why your
support is critical, especially today.

A generous donor is MATCHING all funds raised up to $50,000 until the
end of the month. That means your contribution today will be DOUBLED.

I am personally asking all my supporters to chip in $10, $35, $100,
$250, or even $500 today to Young Americans for Liberty. Please click
here to select any amount below to make a gift.
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63]

DONATE $10
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63&amount=10]

DONATE $35
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63&amount=35]

DONATE $50
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63&amount=50]

DONATE $100
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63&amount=100]

DONATE $250
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63&amount=250]

DONATE $500
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63&amount=500]

DONATE $1,000
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63&amount=1000]

DONATE ANY AMOUNT
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63]

YAL is doing this, first and foremost, by reaching students where
they’re at. By focusing on the issues important to twenty-year-olds
– affordable groceries and gas, healthcare, and guns, YAL is able to
show young people that socialism is not the answer to all of their
life’s problems.

I do not want to take your support for granted – That’s why below
I lay out step-by-step how Young Americans for Liberty is advancing
the ideas of freedom with college students.

_Step 4 is my favorite..._

STEP 1: Expand the number of YAL chapters across the country to over
500 nationwide. America’s college campuses are covered with YAL
chapters actively recruiting and educating hundreds of thousands of
students.

STEP 2: Recruit 10,000 NEW YAL members and collect more than 150,000
student sign-ups. YAL is building a massive network and a strong
foundation to reach the next generation for years to come.

STEP 3: Train an ELITE group of top 1,7000 student leaders on how to
WIN ON PRINCIPLE. YAL’s top student leaders receive exclusive
training on the strategies and tactics to win and advance the ideas of
liberty.

STEP 4: Mobilize YAL-trained activists who have knocked on more than
6,000,000 doors to promote liberty causes and candidates. It’s
called OPERATION WIN AT THE DOOR, and through it, YAL-trained students
have knocked doors to help nearly 400 pro-liberty legislators win
crucial races and push for important pro-liberty legislation.

STEP 5: Fight tyrannical campus policies and college administrators
through YAL’s Student Rights Campaign. YAL chapters and members have
made major policy changes on free speech, self-defense, and defunding
woke campus programs, which now impact more than 3,100,000 students
every year.

Friend, the youth are our future, and I have to say, the future is
bright in America once again. These YAL-trained and YAL-inspired
students will become our future leaders. It starts by equipping them
with the resources they need.

Here’s how you can help:

Please join me in supporting Young Americans for Liberty and help us
reach this important goal of $50,000 this month. Your gift of any
amount will be MATCHED!
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63]

DONATE [https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63]

Organizations like Young Americans for Liberty will help defend
freedom in the future. This isn’t about a single election. This is
building a movement for decades to come.

Thank you for supporting America and standing up for the values on
which country was founded.

Without your support, none of this is possible...

Thank you,

Vivek Ramaswamy

[Vivek_Photo_Circle01]

P.S. - I mentioned step 4 is my favorite. Here’s why. YAL-recruited
student activists have helped elect over 400 liberty legislators who
have passed over 500 pro-liberty bills. They are swinging races by 6%
to 15%. That’s something money can’t buy!

Please donate $10 or more today to Young Americans for Liberty and
your support will be MATCH >>
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-2030b3d50a3f4ed792ef21a2c98d4312/63]

Young Americans for Liberty, 3267 Bee Cave Rd, Ste 107-65, Austin, TX
78746, United States

DCDailyJournal.com

Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam
[https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21?op-notrack]

This email was directed to dpwillis67@gmail.com only | Our Privacy Policy can be
found by clicking here
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/0b82f81ea359489eafda2ea160e92d21-06d5ce16556743c3a500f64c6425822f/63].

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110999342/555892161/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWViZDNhOC1iNTVhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUEsb8LdevKcCt0rwKGYEUWMOtbONqXuM2ozDkFMQaA=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110999344/555892163/957523928?refcode=em-7.06.25-all-rs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWViZDNhOC1iNTVhLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUEsb8LdevKcCt0rwKGYEUWMOtbONqXuM2ozDkFMQaA=) Hi there, it’s Marc Elias. I’m proud to be one of the leading lawyers in the ongoing fight to defend democracy and protect voting rights in the face of Republican extremism. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and his cronies launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for _their_ own gain. **But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it.** My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23190%2E4449941%2Em1WC6p) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23190%2E4449941%2Em1WC6p) [ **BREAKING FROM _GALLUP_ : “American Pride Slips to New Low”...down NINE PERCENT from last year **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63841?t=3&akid=23190%2E4449941%2Em1WC6p) **OFFICIAL FIGHT FOR REFORM POLLING** [**Are you proud to be an American?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63841?t=4&akid=23190%2E4449941%2Em1WC6p) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63841?t=5&akid=23190%2E4449941%2Em1WC6p) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63841?t=6&akid=23190%2E4449941%2Em1WC6p)

Under President Joe Biden, the United States was well respected on the national stage.

And almost 70% of Americans said they were PROUD to be an American.

But under Donald Trump’s leadership, our international standing has tanked. Republicans are cutting social programs that people rely on, American citizens are being detained and deported, and things are dire.

And it’s showing: a record low percent of Americans are PROUD to say they’re American.

[**_With everything that’s going on, we need to update our records ASAP. Please respond before 11:59 PM >> _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63841?t=9&akid=23190%2E4449941%2Em1WC6p)
[**Are you proud to be an American?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63841?t=10&akid=23190%2E4449941%2Em1WC6p)

Every response helps us track how bad the censorship really is – and know the extent of the damage caused by Big Tech leftists who want to END this movement. John James won’t back down. He’s fighting to protect free speech , defeat censorship , and restore power to the people – but he needs you on his side. > **Blue Amp 's building something big. We launched The Soundcheck Fund (TSF) to elevate **_**independent voices.**_**We 're gonna build an ecosystem of bold, hard-hitting journalists, video producers & commentators..[But we need YOUR help](https://substack.com/redirect/7e7bfa38-1c6f-4cf5-a83e-d340027a32da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to do it!**
> **We 're giving grants and using our platform to promote talent. **_**We 've donated five figures to kick off the fund. **_**There 's a link to the form on our homepage. To support the project **_**[get a paid subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/7e7bfa38-1c6f-4cf5-a83e-d340027a32da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**! And join a movement** _**that won 't be stopped!**_
> #### **🔵 Subscribe now! Power indy media & **_**our**_**democratic future!**
> [ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.2E5jWKvpSWGzL93XM-ExrW5c-4eUDxfE51xmzrCCB34?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167678514)
**BY BRIAN KAREM**
After hearing for the tenth time that the only people who will be adversely affected by the "One Big Beautiful Bill" once it becomes law will be young men hunkered in the basement playing video games, I confess, I overreacted.
"Enough of this shit," I said as I flung open my basement door. "You get up here right now and get a job so you can get healthcare!" I expected my 28-year-old son to crawl out of his basement dwelling looking like Homer Simpson after a night with Molly and tequila.
To my chagrin, more than two dozen young men climbed out of the cellar, smelling of popcorn, beer and stale sandwiches. "Damn Mr. Karem, you caught us," one of them said. They all looked like lemurs. "How did you know we were down there?"
I blinked. "You all here for fireworks? Wait a minute. How _long_ have you guys been down there?" I asked. I suddenly realized why I was spending so much on utilities and President Donald Trump was right.
There must be millions of these kids hiding in basements all around the country. All o them unwilling to work and sapping all of our social services along with all the lazy "illegal immigrants" who are taking American jobs.
Yeah. That's why we just had to have the "One Big Beautiful Bill." These kids deserve to lose access to all their entitlement programs. When it comes to Medicaid at least, several GOP politicians have told me; it will be adults between the ages of 29 and 35 who choose to live in their mother's basement--all to avoid working--who will really pay the price.
"You can get a waiter job," I told the kids. "You don't even have to pay taxes on tips!" I was furious. These kids are given everything.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5644428e-27c4-40ce-9a05-c5bb995fb0c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
"And I don't have enough fireworks for everyone," I explained. "So you kids get off my lawn. The Chinese are refusing to sell us our American fireworks because of the tariffs. This a trade war and we will WIN!"
I got angrier as I saw the kids slowly emerging from their cave to face the harsh light of day. Suddenly, I understood why there were so many shoes in my hall closet. I opened it up to start handing out the footwear when I found dozens of migrant workers.
"We're fleeing from ICE. Help us!" They said.
"Aren't you violent criminals who need to go back to your home country?" I asked.
"I operate a booth at a farmer's market," one said. The others nodded. "I'm a day laborer at Home Depot," another told me. "I'm the President of the local PTA," a third man told me. "If you want the real criminals," he explained "look on the shelves in the closet."
"Is that a metaphor?" I asked the earnest PTA President.
"No. Literally look on the shelf." He pointed.
I turned and saw three members of congress; Victoria Spartz of Indiana, Andrew Clyde of Georgia, and Keith Self of Texas. They were all sitting on Senator Lisa Murkowski from Alaska.
"What the Hell are you guys doing in the closet?" I demanded to know.
"We opposed the president on this horrible bill and now he's after us." Clyde said.
"Me too," squeaked Murkowsi. She didn't look comfortable as they sat on her.
"Can someone let her up?" I asked. The senator was obviously in a great deal of distress.
"No. She said she was voting for the Bill because she got cut outs for Alaska." Self explained.
"Yeah," Spartz said as she shifted her weight on Murkowski's back. "Some patriot. She hates the bill but can't stand up to Trump. She's the worst.
"No courage at all," Clyde complained. "It makes us all look bad."
I looked at the members of the House flatly. "Wait. Didn't you all oppose the bill and then vote to pass it? Did you all get cut outs?"
"No. No. No." The three of them said harmoniously. I swear I could hear piano behind them.
"We're not sell outs," Spartz said proudly.
"Yeah," Clyde explained. "We believe in this President. This is an absolutely horrible bill and it will cost all of our constituents, but it's far better than anything Biden ever did."
"Besides," Self said, "We know the Big Beautiful Bill's bad but we had to follow our convictions."
"Felony convictions?" I asked. No one said anything.
`Full Blue Amp Subscription For Just .26/Day!`
_**Get The Truth corporate media ignores from a former Biden ad man & former Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know, and will tell, What Is Really Going on in DC**_
_**And support our new *Soundcheck Fund* to help fund & promote independent media!**_
_**Amplify Good. Support Indy Media!**_
[ Subscribe! Support The Soundcheck Fund!](https://substack.com/redirect/7e7bfa38-1c6f-4cf5-a83e-d340027a32da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Well whatever. At least the senator got something out of the deal. So, literally get off her back. But none of you are Thomas Massie." I said.
"Thank God. What an idiot. He's going to get primaried. I have to think of myself and I wouldn't ever risk my morality to do what Massie did. I have my standards," Self said of himself.
I pulled the members of Congress out of the closet, dusted them off and handed the kids their shoes and showed the migrants, kids and members of congress the front door. Tough day. Tough room.
"Wait!" Murkowski said suddenly. Everyone stopped.
"What?" I replied.
Murkowski had a look of terror on her face. "J.D. We forgot J.D!"
"The Vice President?" I asked.
"Yes." Murkowski said.
"Where is he?" I thought the closet was empty.
"We left him in the living room under the couch." Spartz explained.
I must've had a confused look on my face. Before I could say anything, Self found his voice, "We figured that was the safest place for him."
We walked back into the living room, but as we did Vance emerged from the guest bathroom.
"Where have you been?" Murkowski demanded. "We were going to leave you!"
"I was busy putting on my eyeliner," Vance said. "I got bored under the couch." My dog, sitting on the sofa just looked at Vance. A small string of drool dripped from his lips.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e8d97f39-63cb-4c93-8343-d2f28f955b16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I looked at all of these characters and suddenly couldn't believe what I saw; Members of Congress and the Vice President didn't seem like they had a care in the world. They were actually somehow _happy_ that the "One Big Beautiful Bill" had passed.
It was evident in their cherubic smiles, and their playful banter. They all had come back to the fold and would now reap the rewards of being the loyal foot soldiers there to serve _Donald Trump The King_. Joy. Rapture.
"Aren't any of you guys worried about blowback in the 2026 election?" I asked.
Vance was the first, but not the only one to laugh out loud. "Election?" His grin got even wider.
"Are you saying there won't be a midterm election?" I asked incredulously. "You'd be destroying the government. No one would stand for that."
Vance just snickered. "Thanks for the laugh. Don't be silly. We won't get rid of the election. It will be a comfortable election."
I bit. "Comfortable election?
"Yeah, you know. Be comfortable," The Vice President assured me. The four members of congress all let out a relaxing sigh. "You won't have to wait a day or two to see who wins, you'll know we've won going in. You know. comfortable."
I was sure that would never fly. "Come on man. That would lead to violence if people found that out too. It has to be a free and fair election."
JD grinned. "Who cares? I got a spot in Peter Thiel's bunker when the bombs drop."
"Bombs drop?" One of the migrant workers asked that question.
"Or, you know, the plague hits," Self explained. The other members of congress nodded their heads.
"We're still banking on RFK Jr. for that. There's a reason why we put a worm in his head," Murkowski explained.
"Right," I said softly
". . Or if a meteor strikes, or aliens invade, or a massive solar flare wipes out life on earth. Whatever. We win. You lose," Vance said.
"What?" I said.
"You know," Vance smiled. "There's a bunch a reasons to be in the bunker. But we win."
"What does that say for humanity?" The kids who were in my basement asked in unison.
"Fuck humanity. We win. We're rich. You lose. You're poor. Believe me I know poor. I wrote Hillbilly Elegy. I got mine. You get yours," Vance barked.
"Hmmm.. . okay. So, what are you going to do in the bunker while you wait it all out?" I asked.
"I don't know. Play nintendo?" Vance offered.
I look around. "Can you take these guys with you?"
The kids started screaming. "Yeah. We know how to play!"
I quickly hustled them out of the house and I closed the door as fast as I could.
What a Fourth of July.

Or you get no healthcare! | | | Jul 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Blue Amp 's building something big. We launched The Soundcheck Fund (TSF) to elevate independent voices.We 're gonna build an ecosystem of bold, hard-hitting journalists, video producers & commentators.. to do it! We 're giving grants and using our platform to promote talent. We 've donated five figures to kick off the fund. There 's a link to the form on our homepage. To support the project ! And join a movement that won 't be stopped! #### 🔵 Subscribe now! Power indy media & ourdemocratic future! BY BRIAN KAREM After hearing for the tenth time that the only people who will be adversely affected by the "One Big Beautiful Bill" once it becomes law will be young men hunkered in the basement playing video games, I confess, I overreacted. "Enough of this shit," I said as I flung open my basement door. "You get up here right now and get a job so you can get healthcare!" I expected my 28-year-old son to crawl out of his basement dwelling looking like Homer Simpson after a night with Molly and tequila. To my chagrin, more than two dozen young men climbed out of the cellar, smelling of popcorn, beer and stale sandwiches. "Damn Mr. Karem, you caught us," one of them said. They all looked like lemurs. "How did you know we were down there?" I blinked. "You all here for fireworks? Wait a minute. How long have you guys been down there?" I asked. I suddenly realized why I was spending so much on utilities and President Donald Trump was right. There must be millions of these kids hiding in basements all around the country. All o them unwilling to work and sapping all of our social services along with all the lazy "illegal immigrants" who are taking American jobs. Yeah. That's why we just had to have the "One Big Beautiful Bill." These kids deserve to lose access to all their entitlement programs. When it comes to Medicaid at least, several GOP politicians have told me; it will be adults between the ages of 29 and 35 who choose to live in their mother's basement--all to avoid working--who will really pay the price. "You can get a waiter job," I told the kids. "You don't even have to pay taxes on tips!" I was furious. These kids are given everything. | | ---|---|--- "And I don't have enough fireworks for everyone," I explained. "So you kids get off my lawn. The Chinese are refusing to sell us our American fireworks because of the tariffs. This a trade war and we will WIN!" I got angrier as I saw the kids slowly emerging from their cave to face the harsh light of day. Suddenly, I understood why there were so many shoes in my hall closet. I opened it up to start handing out the footwear when I found dozens of migrant workers. "We're fleeing from ICE. Help us!" They said. "Aren't you violent criminals who need to go back to your home country?" I asked. "I operate a booth at a farmer's market," one said. The others nodded. "I'm a day laborer at Home Depot," another told me. "I'm the President of the local PTA," a third man told me. "If you want the real criminals," he explained "look on the shelves in the closet." "Is that a metaphor?" I asked the earnest PTA President. "No. Literally look on the shelf." He pointed. I turned and saw three members of congress; Victoria Spartz of Indiana, Andrew Clyde of Georgia, and Keith Self of Texas. They were all sitting on Senator Lisa Murkowski from Alaska. "What the Hell are you guys doing in the closet?" I demanded to know. "We opposed the president on this horrible bill and now he's after us." Clyde said. "Me too," squeaked Murkowsi. She didn't look comfortable as they sat on her. "Can someone let her up?" I asked. The senator was obviously in a great deal of distress. "No. She said she was voting for the Bill because she got cut outs for Alaska." Self explained. "Yeah," Spartz said as she shifted her weight on Murkowski's back. "Some patriot. She hates the bill but can't stand up to Trump. She's the worst. "No courage at all," Clyde complained. "It makes us all look bad." I looked at the members of the House flatly. "Wait. Didn't you all oppose the bill and then vote to pass it? Did you all get cut outs?" "No. No. No." The three of them said harmoniously. I swear I could hear piano behind them. "We're not sell outs," Spartz said proudly. "Yeah," Clyde explained. "We believe in this President. This is an absolutely horrible bill and it will cost all of our constituents, but it's far better than anything Biden ever did." "Besides," Self said, "We know the Big Beautiful Bill's bad but we had to follow our convictions." "Felony convictions?" I asked. No one said anything. `Full Blue Amp Subscription For Just .26/Day!` Get The Truth corporate media ignores from a former Biden ad man & former Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know, and will tell, What Is Really Going on in DC And support our new Soundcheck Fund to help fund & promote independent media! Amplify Good. Support Indy Media! "Well whatever. At least the senator got something out of the deal. So, literally get off her back. But none of you are Thomas Massie." I said. "Thank God. What an idiot. He's going to get primaried. I have to think of myself and I wouldn't ever risk my morality to do what Massie did. I have my standards," Self said of himself. I pulled the members of Congress out of the closet, dusted them off and handed the kids their shoes and showed the migrants, kids and members of congress the front door. Tough day. Tough room. "Wait!" Murkowski said suddenly. Everyone stopped. "What?" I replied. Murkowski had a look of terror on her face. "J.D. We forgot J.D!" "The Vice President?" I asked. "Yes." Murkowski said. "Where is he?" I thought the closet was empty. "We left him in the living room under the couch." Spartz explained. I must've had a confused look on my face. Before I could say anything, Self found his voice, "We figured that was the safest place for him." We walked back into the living room, but as we did Vance emerged from the guest bathroom. "Where have you been?" Murkowski demanded. "We were going to leave you!" "I was busy putting on my eyeliner," Vance said. "I got bored under the couch." My dog, sitting on the sofa just looked at Vance. A small string of drool dripped from his lips. | | ---|---|--- I looked at all of these characters and suddenly couldn't believe what I saw; Members of Congress and the Vice President didn't seem like they had a care in the world. They were actually somehow happy that the "One Big Beautiful Bill" had passed. It was evident in their cherubic smiles, and their playful banter. They all had come back to the fold and would now reap the rewards of being the loyal foot soldiers there to serve Donald Trump The King. Joy. Rapture. "Aren't any of you guys worried about blowback in the 2026 election?" I asked. Vance was the first, but not the only one to laugh out loud. "Election?" His grin got even wider. "Are you saying there won't be a midterm election?" I asked incredulously. "You'd be destroying the government. No one would stand for that." Vance just snickered. "Thanks for the laugh. Don't be silly. We won't get rid of the election. It will be a comfortable election." I bit. "Comfortable election? "Yeah, you know. Be comfortable," The Vice President assured me. The four members of congress all let out a relaxing sigh. "You won't have to wait a day or two to see who wins, you'll know we've won going in. You know. comfortable." I was sure that would never fly. "Come on man. That would lead to violence if people found that out too. It has to be a free and fair election." JD grinned. "Who cares? I got a spot in Peter Thiel's bunker when the bombs drop." "Bombs drop?" One of the migrant workers asked that question. "Or, you know, the plague hits," Self explained. The other members of congress nodded their heads. "We're still banking on RFK Jr. for that. There's a reason why we put a worm in his head," Murkowski explained. "Right," I said softly ". . Or if a meteor strikes, or aliens invade, or a massive solar flare wipes out life on earth. Whatever. We win. You lose," Vance said. "What?" I said. "You know," Vance smiled. "There's a bunch a reasons to be in the bunker. But we win." "What does that say for humanity?" The kids who were in my basement asked in unison. "Fuck humanity. We win. We're rich. You lose. You're poor. Believe me I know poor. I wrote Hillbilly Elegy. I got mine. You get yours," Vance barked. "Hmmm.. . okay. So, what are you going to do in the bunker while you wait it all out?" I asked. "I don't know. Play nintendo?" Vance offered. I look around. "Can you take these guys with you?" The kids started screaming. "Yeah. We know how to play!" I quickly hustled them out of the house and I closed the door as fast as I could. name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Believe Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Anyone who thought Trump wasn’t going to implement project 2025 was wrong – he already is. Anyone who thought Trump loves “blacks” was wrong. Anyone who thought Trump would only deport “bad immigrants” was wrong. Anyone who thought Trump was going to reduce the cost of eggs was wrong. We all saw Trump’s first presidency...and you know what Maya Angelou says: **_“When someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time.”_** None of Trump’s actions since he took office are surprising to anyone who recalls his first term – _**but we have to fight back against him all the same.**_ **I need your support to build a movement that will stand up to Trump, win back the House, and get the country back on the right track in 2026.** [**So right now, please split a donation of any amount to my campaign and Ohio House Dems. body:

Congressional Republican cronies passed a bill with steep cuts to Medicare and SNAP food benefits — **just to hand out more tax breaks for billionaires.**
[**We can’t lose sight of what’s happening in Congress and the importance of winning back our congressional majorities. Trump is counting on all of the chaos he’s causing both here at home and around the world to distract you while his allies in Congress rob you of your healthcare.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene just launched their newest anti-democracy stunt and it’s a big one.
Marjorie, with Trump’s full support, is introducing a bill to force a new census that would immediately redraw congressional maps based on that manipulated data that could potentially give House Republicans more seats in 2026.
And Trump is already calling it “a great idea.”
At GOTV PAC, we’ve been sounding the alarm about what the far-right will try to do to cling to power. This is gerrymandering at a national scale and we cannot let them get away with it.
If you can, rush a donation now to help us fight back against this unconstitutional census-rigging scheme and elect leaders who will defend democracy, not destroy it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07062025&amount=25]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

subject: It will come down to individuals like YOU to resist Donald Trump over the next four years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Sign our pledge to RESIST Trump today »
#

_We’re counting on you to sign on before midnight, Peter._ **[PLEDGE TO RESIST TRUMP: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250706?t=1&akid=9092%2E614464%2E34ZrpU)** **Donald Trump is using his power as president to relentlessly attack everyday Americans.** He’s coming after our hard-fought freedoms, rights that are clearly enshrined in the Constitution, _and now even citizenship itself._ GOP members of the House and Senate let him get away with it. They’re too scared to go against Trump’s extreme administration. **Ultimately, it will come down to individuals like YOU to resist Donald Trump and the GOP’s actions over the next four years.** **[PLEDGE TO RESIST TRUMP: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250706?t=2&akid=9092%2E614464%2E34ZrpU)** It will take millions of everyday Americans like you, uniting together from every corner of this country, saying enough is enough to Donald Trump’s reign of chaos, cruelty, and control. **The good news is that momentum is already on our side. But now, we’ve got to keep it going.**_Every. Single. Day._ **[So now, while it’s still early in Donald Trump’s second term, we’re asking you to join our pledge:](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250706?t=3&akid=9092%2E614464%2E34ZrpU)** _I, Peter, will resist every illegal action, act of corruption, and attack on everyday Americans by Donald Trump until he leaves office._ **[PLEDGE TO RESIST TRUMP: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250706?t=4&akid=9092%2E614464%2E34ZrpU)**

name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: Slump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Truthfully, this drop was more than we expected.
#

Here is the truth: July is almost always one of the slowest months of the entire year for fundraising.
But after our June FEC deadline, donations slumped _even more_ than we’d expected, and we need a surge of support now to ensure we’re on track to hit our July goals.
And honestly, the timing is pretty terrible. Jon’s opponents and their GOP-funded Super PACs have _already spent millions_ on TV ads attacking Jon. And they’re only going to ramp up between now and Election Day.
[**Peter: will you chip in $5 or anything you can today to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign to help us fight back?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250706-1-f&t=1&akid=530%2E5691347%2EIKBAo1)
Donations historically tend to drop off in July, so we’re not panicking. But truthfully, this drop was more than we expected.
We get it — it’s a busy time of year, it's the 4th of July weekend, and politics might not be the first thing on your mind. But if we’re going to hold this seat, now is not the time to slow down.
Our campaign is in a strong position and we’re building momentum all across the state. But we cannot slow down. We have to be ready for whatever comes our way.
[**Can you make your first online contribution to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign and ensure we have the resources to build the strongest campaign possible across ALL of Georgia?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250706-1-f&t=2&akid=530%2E5691347%2EIKBAo1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-july25.o6csNP&amount=5&refcode=em250706-1-f&t=3&akid=530%2E5691347%2EIKBAo1)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-july25.o6csNP&refcode=em250706-1-f&t=4&akid=530%2E5691347%2EIKBAo1)**
---
****
Thank you!
Team Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=530%2E5691347%2EIKBAo1) if you'd like to unsubscribe.
